Just like when everything else goes wrong... _**Joe Biden is trying to blame Republicans!**_ First, Joe Biden embraced AOC, the Squad, and the rest of the radical Democrats by advocating for open borders and criticizing anyone who pointed out the dangers of these policies. Now, after millions of illegal border crossings under his watch, Biden is trying to blame Republicans for his failure to secure the border. **_How can we expect Joe Biden and the Democrats to come up with a solution to this crisis[ _if they can't even recognize it's their policies that cause this problem?_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=43b6986e8a4045549d8c35b481bbd377&_e=-75PoxBaKRlUs3psFvvXM47NYDOVVqh18CbQIJ-ptCz3ykyOAiJZGOsSVkCgv1O6XRKkBZGuPjvVfBZEdYsJjby9x1fNKYwi05XNfjC7r9fo9CdWoPzMQTueJHf98J1G39NRJ05u8FQEENFekteLbZ8eSG1DApuF5HAFM3IEUwTyY-_ctDBeTfLnd7n3DqNXR3sSTPas36HZYb4jy0HIJmSwBG6-g29f6xp2sk4svxcha_ecs_CuD_FOSFqYOQPT)_**

If you need any proof that Biden's agenda is making this problem worse, check out these figures:

**[_BORDER CROSSINGS STATS_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=43b6986e8a4045549d8c35b481bbd377&_e=-75PoxBaKRlUs3psFvvXM47NYDOVVqh18CbQIJ-ptCz3ykyOAiJZGOsSVkCgv1O6XRKkBZGuPjvVfBZEdYsJjceW7k9vgAvUtlMugyHoIvTDEhH7_iZ8xhpdRFZwCjKF2N1KIXtNQrrbJ94o4s5BOj12C0qZ_sKW1baAQf8NBkDIJrydPqF8RIHzzYAxksPGuAFDemjMhTNahGlXbYI7qvJEp_xiQ9NxnTKxR69rrrgcFMiLPeg37Q2s5ozg3iVt)**
* _Southwest border patrol encounters topped above**128,877 **in February 2023._
* _Encounters of unaccompanied children**increased 16% between January and February.**_
* _In February, the average number of unaccompanied children in CBP custody was**438 per day** , compared with an average of 332 per day in January._

We can't let Biden get away with his lies and mismanagement. name: Steve Scalise (House Majority Leader)
subject: I just heard Joe Biden’s FBI got caught SPYING on Catholic organizations and even sending in an UNDERCOVER AGENT to collect intelligence on churchgoers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My blood is boiling.

| |

---
| | | I won't mince words with you...

**My blood is boiling.**

I just heard Joe Biden's FBI got caught **SPYING** on Catholic organizations and even sending in an **UNDERCOVER AGENT** to collect intelligence on churchgoers.

**I'VE HAD IT!**

The Radical Left and Deep State operatives are targeting religious Americans like me, undermining our freedoms, and ripping apart the very fabric of our nation.

_I won 't let them get away with it._

_**[And I'm PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the Radical Left and their Deep State allies >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3eoc69vlibelncol6f3d0o372iv1bc0qd44nveo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob7cph2bs "And I’m PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the Radical Left and their Deep State allies")**_

Listen:

If they're willing to deploy the FBI to infiltrate churches, then we have to be willing to stand up to them. They have rich and powerful friends so I'll admit this won't be easy, but it'll be worth it.

By my calculations, I'll need **AT LEAST** 10,000 strong Conservatives to step up to the plate or we won't have the resources to prevail.

_Can I count on you to be one of them? _

_**[There's no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z48ssrqddsg3kkk56sajb7utvuv6bth7ifhqpc10_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob7cph2bs "There’s no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now")**_

For America,

Steve Scalise (Majority Leader)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16848%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bXJL3ZgX74UC1Xyv1EQEvQ&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16849%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fG5TKDU8spXqp77HrWVkhA&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16840%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bbTtD0AGztcbwxn0oBZPfQ&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16848%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bXJL3ZgX74UC1Xyv1EQEvQ&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16841%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wvUOSvCCMHlO8U65PF26kg&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16842%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cLB23FrsSinf5ncroATl3A&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hVUAahklimGV4R3W2B9xXQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RtdhsSPE07q3%2fXx5UcrNug&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z874fjrpj5b1lkf10dphaj84g401ts5buobdcgp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob1cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkobrfkt68k5hng746aq964g95kved62overpsi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob1cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8ql7ttsn1qr6gij21tencsf2u4i70v317lcg2f8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob1cdh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Only open this email if you want children to support freedom
body:
Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1i3jurptjk554egtripeekda30kp99c2b66dlto_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools to believe in radical ideas such as socialism is good, our Founding Fathers are bad, and the ideas of freedom are outdated or even racist.

You know what this means for our future?

It means a generation of students will grow up to accept socialism and create a less free and less prosperous society.

Not good.

**Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom.**

The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. [**You can help me distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins by making a donation of any amount by clicking here!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc44qe02jtabfcnir1mapcvq8pvompktr1ujie08_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbid8223ocjhjlsrqbbb6sulmi5eddj9h2dlsv08_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you.

I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty.

When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING.

Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda.

This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country.

**It costs roughly $10 to print, package, and distribute each copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can use one of these links to donate and help me supply more children with our message of freedom!**
[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6ch0feug1mvdklq4bk1jk6jk2m0k2b1q5p8iu2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkabe5vlg7c2cbb06gap370obqah588b57pgipto_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjge4bvvo950c9jeg2u01hr21jp76cgleq12bdio_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbi4jfjjb2kfvb349k6pqp4a2b5qktrmp31chan0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4b3bom6nshbvvq3r3448tq77g2btn3s6f5cc0so_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9ehkvdnpgjdil0ivvo1eil3kosn28e6n7q8uhm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6nv16os8k7b2h5qdj5hjl6m2ca5qjp21t5h7kq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsckh45aaooo6ma2ino67fret0ummi8u5ghbuhm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)
Here are a few examples of the books and what lessons they teach young students:
* _**Creature from Jekyll Island:**_ This book teaches children about the concept of inflation, reckless money printing, and the Federal Reserve.

You might be asking yourself, "Can children grasp these concepts"? I write each of these books to both entertain and educate kids. They aren't written for adults (although I'm sure plenty of adults could learn from them!). The Tuttle Twins breaks down big concepts for children to understand.

* _**12 Rules Bootcamp:**_ Jordan Peterson gave me permission to create a children's version of his famous book, "12 Rules for Life". Now, you can share Jordan Peterson's wisdom with kids!

* _**Miraculous Pencil:**_ This book breaks down Leonard Read's classic lesson on how free markets work. Parents can help their children understand why capitalism is the best economic system and why socialism fails.

The Tuttle Twins books are changing the direction of education in our country.

Before the Tuttle Twins books, parents did NOT have many alternatives to provide for their children other than the brainwashing happening in our schools...

Now, millions of students are learning the principles of free markets, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, REAL American history, and the values you and I love and cherish about our country.

**So ... what's the next step?**

The pro-liberty non-profit organization I founded, the Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 7 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins.

You and I can share the Tuttle Twins with families and young children across the country. My goal is to raise an additional $50,000 in the next 48 hours to deploy more books.

Can I count on you to make a donation and help me distribute more books?

[**Please use one of these links to support the Tuttle Twins, educate the next generation about freedom, and fight for the future of our country:**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1nggqfubociofei7es7kfo9im8428abk3tonia8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5hm6ob3clh2bs)

clean_body: Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools "Tuttle Twins" Friend, Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools to believe in radical ideas such as socialism is good, our Founding Fathers are bad, and the ideas of freedom are outdated or even racist. You know what this means for our future? It means a generation of students will grow up to accept socialism and create a less free and less prosperous society. Not good. Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom. The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you. I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty. When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING. Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda. This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country. It costs roughly $10 to print, package, and distribute each copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can use one of these links to donate and help me supply more children with our message of freedom! Here are a few examples of the books and what lessons they teach young students: Creature from Jekyll Island: This book teaches children about the concept of inflation, reckless money printing, and the Federal Reserve. You might be asking yourself, "Can children grasp these concepts"? I write each of these books to both entertain and educate kids. They aren't written for adults (although I'm sure plenty of adults could learn from them!). The Tuttle Twins breaks down big concepts for children to understand. 12 Rules Bootcamp: Jordan Peterson gave me permission to create a children's version of his famous book, "12 Rules for Life". Now, you can share Jordan Peterson's wisdom with kids! Miraculous Pencil: This book breaks down Leonard Read's classic lesson on how free markets work. Parents can help their children understand why capitalism is the best economic system and why socialism fails. The Tuttle Twins books are changing the direction of education in our country. Before the Tuttle Twins books, parents did NOT have many alternatives to provide for their children other than the brainwashing happening in our schools... Now, millions of students are learning the principles of free markets, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, REAL American history, and the values you and I love and cherish about our country. So ... what's the next step?** The pro-liberty non-profit organization I founded, the Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 7 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins. You and I can share the Tuttle Twins with families and young children across the country. My goal is to raise an additional $50,000 in the next 48 hours to deploy more books. Can I count on you to make a donation and help me distribute more books? Reminder: Our goal is to raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours. You and I cannot wait any longer to reverse the ugly trend happening in our schools. Without the Tuttle Twins, young students may not have an alternative to what 's being taught in the classroom. I am counting on your help. Thank you for everything you do for liberty and our country,> Connor Boyack Author, The Tuttle Twins President, Libertas Institute The Tuttle Twins is a project of the Libertas Institute. Our mission is to change hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society by creating and implementing innovative policy reforms and exceptional educational resources. name: Steve Scalise (House Majority Leader)
subject: Biden’s FBI got caught SPYING on Catholic organizations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My blood is boiling.

| |

---
| | | I won't mince words with you...

**My blood is boiling.**

I just heard Joe Biden's FBI got caught **SPYING** on Catholic organizations and even sending in an **UNDERCOVER AGENT** to collect intelligence on churchgoers.

**I'VE HAD IT!**

The Radical Left and Deep State operatives are targeting religious Americans like me, undermining our freedoms, and ripping apart the very fabric of our nation.

_I won 't let them get away with it._

_**[And I'm PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the Radical Left and their Deep State allies >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsjijk8msjuqniam6hoddc8lkeg1b0ol6sjjie0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5jm0o32cdh2bs "And I’m PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the Radical Left and their Deep State allies")**_

Listen:

If they're willing to deploy the FBI to infiltrate churches, then we have to be willing to stand up to them. They have rich and powerful friends so I'll admit this won't be easy, but it'll be worth it.

By my calculations, I'll need **AT LEAST** 10,000 strong Conservatives to step up to the plate or we won't have the resources to prevail.

_Can I count on you to be one of them? _

_**[There's no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zphen5f265ga881ef1uthjho5349e15lcu3dsug0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5jm0o32cdh2bs "There’s no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now")**_

For America,

Steve Scalise (Majority Leader)

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here It’s a very special Friday in the Haley household, Peter! I’m sending this to you on the eve of my daughter Rena's wedding day, and although it may embarrass her, I wanted to take a moment to say how proud I am of the daughter Nikki and I have raised. For those who haven’t had the pleasure of meeting her, Rena is a strong, kind, caring, intelligent and passionate young woman. She reminds me a lot of her mother. If you’re a parent, you understand how tough it can be raising children especially in today's world. Our dream, like many of you, is to give them a better life than we had and protect them at all costs. You can do everything in your power to raise your kids to be kind, good-hearted individuals, but if these last few years have taught us anything, we plan and God laughs. There is nothing easy about watching your children try to navigate a global lock down, get a new job or buy a home in a failing economy. No parenting book can prepare you for that. It's easy to get frustrated or even feel a little hopeless. My fatherly advice is to always remember that life is full of choices. On this $5 Friday, I’m asking you to choose to secure America’s future. If not for you– our children because they deserve a future filled with hope and opportunity. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7a1ec4ee6bc34714b43ab01e91c3d7c43f74d7f58df9fe06ae2ab1a20a9fd90b22d7cbbf33e85964af8f982441a6c9bee9daeae19708a148b3babd28129e6082 Will you chip in $5 to help us get Nikki elected so she can lead our country into a brighter future? Thank you for being a massive part of Nikki’s fight to restore this country’s greatness. I look forward to speaking with you all next Friday – but first I have to go tear up the dance floor! #JourneyToJackson2023 #LightsCameraJackson2023 Till next week, Peter, Michael Haley, Father of the Bride GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! I’m sending this to you on the eve of my daughter Rena's wedding day, and although it may embarrass her, I wanted to take a moment to say how proud I am of the daughter Nikki and I have raised. For those who haven’t had the pleasure of meeting her, Rena is a strong, kind, caring, intelligent and passionate young woman. She reminds me a lot of her mother. If you’re a parent, you understand how tough it can be raising children especially in today's world. Our dream, like many of you, is to give them a better life than we had and protect them at all costs. You can do everything in your power to raise your kids to be kind, good-hearted individuals, but if these last few years have taught us anything, we plan and God laughs. There is nothing easy about watching your children try to navigate a global lock down, get a new job or buy a home in a failing economy. No parenting book can prepare you for that. It's easy to get frustrated or even feel a little hopeless. My fatherly advice is to always remember that life is full of choices. On this $5 Friday, I’m asking you to choose to secure America’s future. If not for you– our children because they deserve a future filled with hope and opportunity. Will you chip in $5 to help us get Nikki elected so she can lead our country into a brighter future? Thank you for being a massive part of Nikki’s fight to restore this country’s greatness. name: Alan Keck
subject: Home is where the heart is.
body:
...and my heart has never left Kentucky.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-r/) Home is where the heart is-_and my heart has never left Kentucky._**** [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-j/) [$10 | DONATE YOUR TREASURE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-t/) [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER | DONATE YOUR TIME AND TALENT](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-i/) With my wife Tiffany by my side, it's been the blessing of a lifetime to travel and meet Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth, to share my vision, [__**my Keck Game Plan**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-d/) , and to unite in common cause, _to see Kentucky win again._ From the day I announced my campaign, _supporters like you have continuously proven to me that the Commonwealth 's best days aren't behind it_-_**but far out in front -and with a bit of commonsense and Commonwealth ingenuity, we can solve the greatest of challenges.**__That 's what I'm proud to say I've brought to my hometown of Somerset, **the private sector and public sector experience and successes that just frankly, no one else can.** I've fought to protect the liberties Kentucky's current administration fought to take away; and when we were told to defund the police,**in Somerset we doubled down.**_ That's the kind of governor we need for tomorrow, because Kentucky doesn't deserve a continuation of the status quo, it deserves a leader who shares our values and understands the needs of working families; someone who refuses to do what's easy over what's right. _**That 's the kind of governor I'll be for Kentucky. **_ [$10 | DONATE YOUR TREASURE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-h/) [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER | DONATE YOUR TIME AND TALENT](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-k/) But, I have to be honest, we're officially in the homestretch of the primary cycle, [__**and I 'm coming to you again for your support.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-u/) _**We just cannot make it across the finish line if Kentuckians ready to see the Commonwealth win again sit out. **_[__**You 're not sitting out are you?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-o/) _**Because any amount of support, whether your time, your talent, or your treasure helps us to reach every Kentuckian with the Keck Game Plan. **_So, if you're willing and ready to see Kentucky win again-[__**I hope you 'll chip-in, giving our campaign the final leg up it needs to overcome the odds, accomplish the impossible, flip Kentucky red, and save our state.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-b/) [$10 | DONATE YOUR TREASURE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-n/) [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER | DONATE YOUR TIME AND TALENT](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-p/) I hope to hear from you, and in the meantime, God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-x/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-m/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pekjkd-dytiuyidkd-c/)
---
clean_body: ...and my heart has never left Kentucky. Home is where the heart is-and my heart has never left Kentucky.** With my wife Tiffany by my side, it's been the blessing of a lifetime to travel and meet Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth, to share my vision, , and to unite in common cause, to see Kentucky win again. From the day I announced my campaign, supporters like you have continuously proven to me that the Commonwealth 's best days aren't behind it-but far out in front -and with a bit of commonsense and Commonwealth ingenuity, we can solve the greatest of challenges.That 's what I'm proud to say I've brought to my hometown of Somerset, the private sector and public sector experience and successes that just frankly, no one else can. I've fought to protect the liberties Kentucky's current administration fought to take away; and when we were told to defund the police,in Somerset we doubled down. That's the kind of governor we need for tomorrow, because Kentucky doesn't deserve a continuation of the status quo, it deserves a leader who shares our values and understands the needs of working families; someone who refuses to do what's easy over what's right. That 's the kind of governor I'll be for Kentucky. But, I have to be honest, we're officially in the homestretch of the primary cycle, We just cannot make it across the finish line if Kentuckians ready to see the Commonwealth win again sit out. Because any amount of support, whether your time, your talent, or your treasure helps us to reach every Kentuckian with the Keck Game Plan. **_So, if you're willing and ready to see Kentucky win again- I hope to hear from you, and in the meantime, God Bless. Alan Keck ### |

name: Brandon Williams
subject: It’s Been 50 Years Since This Happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
Before entering politics I proudly served my country in the US Navy which taught me the importance of leadership, teamwork, and sacrifice
|
---
Peter, I am the first Nuclear Submarine Officer to serve in Congress in 50 years, and I am so proud to serve as your Congressman! Before entering politics, I proudly served my country in the United States Navy during the Gulf War. My time in the Navy taught me the importance of leadership, teamwork, and sacrifice. It was a steep learning curve, but I was able to successfully navigate it and make six strategic-deterrent patrols in the Pacific aboard the USS Georgia as a Strategic Missile Officer. This unique experience as I served in the Navy instilled in me a strong commitment to public service and a desire to make a difference in the lives of others, and it has given me a rare perspective on the challenges facing our country. We need competent leaders and patriots, not politicians, in Congress. People willing to put the needs of their constituents above their own political aspirations. I am that leader. I’m a patriot, not a politician, and I am proud to represent you in Congress. I understand the importance of sacrifice to serve our great country, and I am proud to do that once again. Thank you for the opportunity to represent you in Congress. I am eager to continue our work and build a brighter future for Central New York, the Mohawk Valley, and America. For common sense and a stronger future, Congressman Brandon Williams www.letsvotebrandon.com
---

clean_body: Before entering politics I proudly served my country in the US Navy which taught me the importance of leadership, teamwork, and sacrifice | Peter, I am the first Nuclear Submarine Officer to serve in Congress in 50 years, and I am so proud to serve as your Congressman! Before entering politics, I proudly served my country in the United States Navy during the Gulf War. My time in the Navy taught me the importance of leadership, teamwork, and sacrifice. It was a steep learning curve, but I was able to successfully navigate it and make six strategic-deterrent patrols in the Pacific aboard the USS Georgia as a Strategic Missile Officer. This unique experience as I served in the Navy instilled in me a strong commitment to public service and a desire to make a difference in the lives of others, and it has given me a rare perspective on the challenges facing our country. We need competent leaders and patriots, not politicians, in Congress. People willing to put the needs of their constituents above their own political aspirations. I am that leader. I’m a patriot, not a politician, and I am proud to represent you in Congress. I understand the importance of sacrifice to serve our great country, and I am proud to do that once again. Thank you for the opportunity to represent you in Congress. I am eager to continue our work and build a brighter future for Central New York, the Mohawk Valley, and America. For common sense and a stronger future, Congressman Brandon Williams www.letsvotebrandon.com | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79876%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yl3%2bLxHGTimBFM5e3WUiLQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79877%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2fS7yzNDCLKNSx76m4zF%2fQ&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79878%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c3uQHkLLsVzux1wJUkLfVA&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79879%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XFYiXeNGGMrVLNP1NOiE3Q&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zff39jgu1i84o1tjn31n273kr5iud9kn1fs2ktig_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5jmeoj6cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaq54v6q4s1gqubt9prmd9hclam90p7buiv49uh0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5jmeoj6cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3dggcds560aok9mulfe5adm2g5do43sbfed2ogg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5jmeoj6cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. | |

| | Support our Law & Order Agenda

Ensuring that our communities are safe and that our law enforcement is given all of the resources needed will be a top priority of mine.

State Republicans currently hold: 58 of 99 state legislative chambers 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats 27 of 50 secretary of state offices 12 of 12 independently elected agriculture officials Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like YOU. | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675 Washington, DC 20004 Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Passing the 100-day Mark
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Passing the 100-day Mark_
---
Yesterday marked 100 days since the 118th U.S. Congress officially convened for the first time on January 3, 2023. Of course, members were sworn just a few days later, and since then, they hit the ground running. During the campaign last year, you'll recall House Republicans released the "Commitment to America," a bold agenda focused on building an economy that's strong, a nation that's safe, a future that's built on freedom, and a government that's accountable. If you regularly receive our emails, you've already seen a glimpse of what House Republicans have done in fulfilling that commitment — repealing the Democrats' army of IRS agents, eliminating the military vaccine mandate, passing the Lower Energy Costs Act, establishing the bipartisan select committee on China, and so much more. In fact, the House, under the new Republican majority, has sent more bills to President Biden's desk than the 117th Congress, despite the Senate being under Democrat control. They've gone on the offensive, bringing bills and resolutions to the floor for votes and exposing Democrats for their extreme beliefs and policy positions on the issues of crime, COVID, and socialism. House Republicans even set a new record for the most congressional hearings in a single day at 42.

The new majority and our Republican congressional delegation of Reps. Rudy Yakym, Jim Banks, Jim Baird, Victoria Spartz, Greg Pence, Larry Bucshon, and Erin Houchin are working hard every day to get our country back on track and hold the reckless Biden administration accountable. And they're just getting started. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/9a53bf7857d3a7e6c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Investing in Cities, Towns, and Counties_ 🛣️
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** welcomed the Hagerstown Little League team that represented the Great Lakes region in the Little League World Series las summer to the statehouse this week._**
---
On Wednesday, **Governor Eric Holcomb** and the Indiana Department of Transportation (INDOT) announced the recipients of a combined $133.4 million in state funds as a part of the Community Crossings program, a part of the governor's Next Level Roads initiative. The program offers matching funds to communities with planned roadwork projects. In total, 224 cities, towns, and counties will split the funds. “The continued success of the Community Crossings program becomes more evident each year," said**Gov. Holcomb**. "Improving transportation infrastructure at the most local level makes communities that much more attractive for business and Hoosier families alike to connect and grow." Since 2016, this program has awarded more than **$1.27 billion** to local communities to complete vital infrastructure projects. In 2017, state Republican lawmakers identified long-term funding for the Community Crossings program as part of HEA 1002, which Gov. Holcomb signed into law that April. _Community Crossings is a Republican win that continues paving the way for even more growth! (See what we did there?)_
---
|
---
**MORE: Governor Eric Holcomb**[backs](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/4fe88e21559a7ca2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the Midwest Alliance for Clean Hydrogen's (MachH2) application to bring a regional clean hydrogen hub to the Midwest.
---
| | |
---
# _Early Voting Has Started ... Knock It Out Now_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/137f88f2b13f635ec3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
You don't have to wait until May 2, 2023, to cast your ballot for the municipal primary election. You can visit [indianavoters.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/8b6691545d58bcb4c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to see who is on your ballot and find your voting location and hours and knock out voting at your own convenience. You can also apply for an absentee ballot if you qualify and learn more about the processes and tools that the state uses to keep our elections safe and secure (which Indiana has long been a pioneer in).
---
|
---
# _Save the Date: Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
This week we released a save the date for our upcoming municipal candidate training — **IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns **— to be held on **Saturday, June 10, 2023** , at the University of Indianapolis. We're fielding candidates across Indiana's cities and towns who will work to deliver results for Hoosiers like you. And to help them get across the finish line first on election night, we're helping skill them up with this one-day training session on all things grassroots, finance, and communications. **Be on the lookout for more details!**
---
|
---
# _Inflation Outpaces Wage Gains Now for Two Years_
---
The latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) report released Tuesday showed inflation has now been at or above 5% for **23 straight months** , well above the Federal Reserve's average target rate of 2%. Meanwhile, real wages have been negative for **24 straight months** — two years! **Don't forget:** Democrats [**fueled**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/5e5bc6d0aa9ccfc2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) inflation with their partisan $1.9 trillion spending spree, then spent two years saying it would be **["temporary."](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/129bae991026e926c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** From [Market Watch](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/622d20af2c2a6b00c3d6b838967d376c/40313): **The numbers** : Consumer prices rose a scant 0.1% in March largely because of lower energy costs, but U.S. inflation more broadly was still high and showed little sign of quickly subsiding. Economists polled by the Wall Street Journal had forecast a 0.2% increase in the consumer price index. It was the smallest uptick in three months. The yearly rate of inflation slowed to 5% from 6% and and touched the lowest level since May 2021. What’s helped have been extremely high inflation readings in early 2022 dropping out of the yearly rate. More negatively, the so-called core rate of inflation that omits food and energy rose a sharper 0.4%. Wall Street had forecast a 0.4% gain.Federal Reserve officials don’t ignore food and energy given their importance as household staples, but they view the core rate as a more accurate predictor of future inflation trends. _Article continues._

# _ICYMI: NCAA March Madness: 'Chairman's Bracket Challenge' Winner Announced_
---
It wasn't pretty for _anyone,_ but congratulations to "**rupe47** " for winning the "Chairman's Bracket Challenge" with 670 points and a 94.9%. If that's you, please reach out to **Luke Thomas** at [lthomas@indiana.gop](mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Chairman's%20Bracket%20Challenge%20prize "lthomas@indiana.gop") to claim your prize. In case you were wondering, here are the top five finishers:
1. rupe47, Marquette, 670 points, 94.9%
2. AD Ritz, Texas, 590 points, 91.2%
3. CubsLucas, Purdue, 580 points, 90.4%
4. wabashman11, Texas, 550 points, 87.2%
5. MattOrgan, Marquette, 540 points, 85.6%

# _This Week at the Statehouse_
---
Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. _Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb_ This week, the Senate Committee on Appropriations passed an amended version of HB 1001, the state budget (this will eventually head to conference committee). Meanwhile, the Senate Committee on Appropriations also amended and passed HBs 1492, 1590, and 1591 sending them to the Senate floor. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ This week, there was a lot of movement on priority bills. HBs 1002 and 1004 passed the Senate Committee on Appropriations and will now head to the Senate floor. Meanwhile, HB 1006 was returned to the House with amendments, HB 1008 passed the Senate, and the House concurred with the Senate's amendments to HB 1009. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ This week brought more movement on priority bills. SBs 1 and 7 passed their second reading and were ordered engrossed. Meanwhile, SBs 3 and 4 were amended on second reading and ordered engrossed, the Senate concurred with the House's amendments to SB 5, and the Senate dissented to the House's amendments to SB 8 and will head to conference committee. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/d2669d3bb704c105c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and the governor's bill watch page [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/907e991a7e179f53c3d6b838967d376c/40313). **TOTAL BILLS SIGNED (as of TODAY at 10 AM): 14**

# __Now Hiring Interns__
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/a32797ec3d8c9d27c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
If you know a college student that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, **we've got them covered**. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. **Have someone in mind? Send them to[this link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2c2efdb62d61740e/b6272243e6b564f3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for more information and to apply!**

If that's you, please reach out to Luke Thomas at mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Chairman's%20Bracket%20Challenge%20prize "lthomas@indiana.gop" to claim your prize. In case you were wondering, here are the top five finishers: 1. rupe47, Marquette, 670 points, 94.9% 2. AD Ritz, Texas, 590 points, 91.2% 3. CubsLucas, Purdue, 580 points, 90.4% 4. wabashman11, Texas, 550 points, 87.2% 5. MattOrgan, Marquette, 540 points, 85.6% | | This Week at the Statehouse Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb This week, the Senate Committee on Appropriations passed an amended version of HB 1001, the state budget (this will eventually head to conference committee). Meanwhile, the Senate Committee on Appropriations also amended and passed HBs 1492, 1590, and 1591 sending them to the Senate floor. Priority Bills of House Republicans This week, there was a lot of movement on priority bills. HBs 1002 and 1004 passed the Senate Committee on Appropriations and will now head to the Senate floor. Meanwhile, HB 1006 was returned to the House with amendments, HB 1008 passed the Senate, and the House concurred with the Senate's amendments to HB 1009. Priority Bills of Senate Republicans This week brought more movement on priority bills. SBs 1 and 7 passed their second reading and were ordered engrossed. Meanwhile, SBs 3 and 4 were amended on second reading and ordered engrossed, the Senate concurred with the House's amendments to SB 5, and the Senate dissented to the House's amendments to SB 8 and will head to conference committee. To stay up-to-date, visit and the governor's bill watch page . TOTAL BILLS SIGNED (as of TODAY at 10 AM): 14 | Now Hiring Interns If you know a college student that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, we've got them covered. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. Have someone in mind? subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/895e96b8401ed55afe543b97ca4c8b36503afb1c/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) here at any time. April 14th, 2023 Please see the special promotion going on for Gun News USA subscribers from our sponsor below.
* * *
| | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact [you can get it for $0.00 today](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**[So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: NY AG Letitia James is taking one for the good of the country, deposing Trump in a lawsuit to expose his lies, while he stirs up his hateful followers against her. Let’s have her back.
body:
Trump never did believe in oversight.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfc78888-4180-435d-9042-1434ae92c728/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a bad day this week. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e40c96e-b0f3-4049-9403-7e57b40cb074/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20a3df8e-8906-41fd-bccb-80362d234716/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64375fab-7dcd-44d9-8566-89cf7164b9e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’ve got some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks,
I hate to bother you, but this is really important.
My finance team just called to update me on where things stand with our critical mid-month goal coming up.
Here’s the bad news: they told me we’re still about $25,000 short. Early deadlines like this can make or break a campaign, so it’s critical we report the strongest numbers possible.
The GOP has already launched early attacks against me so this is the worst time to fall behind.
Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, but we’ve got to close the gap between now and Saturday.
I’ll get to the point: Can you split $10 (or more!) between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us get back on track before our mid-month deadline? I’d really appreciate it. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for your time,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: STOP fracking in critical habitat
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1721072?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Picture this: crisp morning air over brushy plains. In the distance, snow-capped mountains tower over the sprawling grassland. **But staining this majestic scene is an ugly, grimy metallic structure.** It **CREAKS** and **GROANS** , shaking the ground, sending animals scattering, and filling the air with the noxious smell of sulfur. This is a fracking rig -- and many more could soon come to our public lands without your help, Friend. Instead of conserving these critical habitats, the Department of Interior is about to lease _**137,159 ACRES**_ to corporate polluters to frack and drill away on public lands and nearby communities that will suffer from **CONTAMINATED AIR, WATER, and SOIL![Please take immediate action, Friend! We’re running out of time to PROTECT our public lands from FRACKING!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1721073?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1721074?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Fracking is a _**DANGEROUS GAME!**_ Its wastewater can sometimes contain **radioactive waste** and may contaminate local drinking water. That’s not even to mention the constant drilling noise and horrific smells that can cause blistering headaches.
So much is at risk, Friend. Our public lands, nearby communities, threatened wildlife, and our entire planet. But the DOI is moving forward anyway. **YOU CAN CHANGE THAT, but we need you to act now! [Tell the DOI to STOP putting our public lands in the hands of corporate polluters!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1721075?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1721074?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

**[Help All On The Line push back against anti-democratic lawmakers’ attacks on voting rights.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61794594/401218760/1063997082?refcode=20230414_AOTL_F_FLUpdate_RedLitexKY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzNzcwNWNjLWRmZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=17qj0oMxHO1CRfxz7P07xp7xr9V4NDAT6Le1OlGtOEs=)**
Extreme attempts to suppress the fundamental right to vote and weaken our democracy are escalating. Conservative legislators’ recent introduction of Senate Bill 7050 is deeply troubling.
The fact that this 98-page elections bill was filed with only 24-hour notice to be heard is a clear indication that these conservative legislators are attempting to rush it through the legislative process without public engagement.
[**This is unacceptable, and our elected officials must be accountable to the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61794595/401218761/1063997082?refcode=20230414_AOTL_F_FLUpdate_RedLitexKY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzNzcwNWNjLWRmZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=17qj0oMxHO1CRfxz7P07xp7xr9V4NDAT6Le1OlGtOEs=)
All On The Line is doubling down on our multi-prong approach to ensure our elected officials are held accountable and pushing back against gerrymandering that places extreme lawmakers in positions of power, like those in Florida. **[Will you chip in to help us keep up this fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61794596/401218762/1063997082?refcode=20230414_AOTL_F_FLUpdate_RedLitexKY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzNzcwNWNjLWRmZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=17qj0oMxHO1CRfxz7P07xp7xr9V4NDAT6Le1OlGtOEs=)**

clean_body: | Have you seen what’s happening in Florida? = = Extreme attempts to suppress the fundamental right to vote and weaken our democracy are escalating. Conservative legislators’ recent introduction of Senate Bill 7050 is deeply troubling. The fact that this 98-page elections bill was filed with only 24-hour notice to be heard is a clear indication that these conservative legislators are attempting to rush it through the legislative process without public engagement. = All On The Line is doubling down on our multi-prong approach to ensure our elected officials are held accountable and pushing back against gerrymandering that places extreme lawmakers in positions of power, like those in Florida. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Support from folks like you helps us have the tools to educate and mobilize voters in states like Florida and nationwide. We all deserve fair representation that prioritizes our concerns and protects our right to vote. body:
Congressman Donalds is a true conservative and an unwavering champion of individual liberty, the sanctity of life, and the Second Amendment. Like me.. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9f30a59aaa6d/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8123077?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=2dd825f780&e=0426928d91)
**THANK YOU, CONGRESSMAN BYRON DONALDS!**
Peter,

I am proud to announce that I have received the full and total endorsement of Congressman Byron Donalds (FL-19) in my campaign for Congress in Ohio's 9th congressional district.

Congressman Donalds is a true conservative and an unwavering champion of individual liberty, the sanctity of life, and the Second Amendment. Like me, he believes that Washington, D.C. is in desperate need of reform, and that the power of government must be returned to the people.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a00e219dbf&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN CONGRESSMAN DONALDS WITH AN URGENTS GRASSROOTS DONATION OF $20.24 OR MORE TODAY >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=dddba0071c&e=0426928d91)
---
_**“I need patriots like J.R. to join me in DC to defeat the Washington machine and restore power back to We The People."**
__-Congressman Byron Donalds_**I invite you to join our movement and support our campaign to defend the principles that have made our country great: Individual liberty, free markets, and limited government. Select an option below to make an URGENT donation today!**
[**Chip in $20.24 >>>
Chip in $50 >>>
Chip in $100 >>>
Chip in $250 (MOST POPULAR) >>>
Chip in $500 >>>
Chip in $1,000 >>>
Chip in any amount to Take America Back >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=d79cebfa82&e=0426928d91)

I am deeply honored to receive Congressman Donalds’ endorsement, and I pledge to work tirelessly to represent the people of Ohio with integrity, honor, and courage.

With the support of patriots like Congressman Donalds, we can defeat the Washington machine and restore power back to "We The People."
[**Can I count on your support, Peter?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=296e58cf2d&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=4615a1a43d&e=0426928d91)

Ohio CD-09

Tennessee MAGA Republicans shamelessly expelled two Democratic lawmakers for protesting gun violence – just days after a mass shooting at a Nashville elementary school left six dead.

Which is why I’m officially launching a critical petition to send a powerful message that our freedom to peaceful protest is non-negotiable.
[**I refuse to stand by while extreme MAGA Republicans assault our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61795872/401223912/-1894805931?source=20230414_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGFjMDJiMC1lM2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ta3PWW2RQn1Nwkx6qxOqAs5x-pn_cSnO27DAYqiuf_U=&emci=e66f5ac5-e2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a4ac02b0-e3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
[_**So I just launched an emergency petition to show undeniable support for the Democratic lawmakers in Tennessee. I need a massive response – 10,000 signatures before midnight – to make our voices heard. Hakeem

name: Joe Kent
subject: US Troops in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Peter,
We've now learned that our government has been lying to us about deploying our military to Ukraine.
Just a year ago, President Biden pledged not to send US troops to Ukraine - and he himself said that it would be "World War III" if we did:
"The idea that we're going to send in offensive equipment and have planes and tanks and trains going in with American pilots and American crews, just understand, that's called World War III, okay? Let's get it straight here, guys. We will not fight the third world war in Ukraine."
But now we know that US and NATO personnel have been deployed to Ukraine, confirmed in the leak caused by the incredibly irresponsible and reckless handling of our national security secrets.
What we need now are members of Congress who can bring oversight and accountability to the defense and intelligence community, and that's what I can deliver.
I spent over twenty years in our nation's military and I worked for our top intelligence agency. If you agree we need someone like me in Washington DC right now, please support my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Fn892Jd939892LNn892ML12jspOg/nQ97evEsqR8dESbSdQZGiA).
My opponent, woke extremist Marie Perez, has been an enthusiastic supporter of sending billions of dollars to defend Ukraine's border but zero dollars to defend our own. She herself said in a debate with me that nobody supported putting US or NATO troops in Ukraine.
The simplistic naivete of her and others like her in Congress has real consequences. Do you agree we need to replace her with someone whose understanding of foreign policy goes beyond watching CNN?
If so, please support my campaign today with a contribution at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Fn892Jd939892LNn892ML12jspOg/nQ97evEsqR8dESbSdQZGiA).
Just a year ago, Biden himself said the actions that we now know he has ordered would cause World War III - all despite no formal declaration of war from Congress.
I've had a front row seat to our nation's military adventurism since our 2003 invasion of Iraq. I've seen too many of the men and women I served with end up in Arlington National Cemetery, including my wife who perished in Syria.
I'm doing my part by trying to bring experience and accountability to Washington. Will you do your part and help me get there with a contribution today? Please give what you can.
**[https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Fn892Jd939892LNn892ML12jspOg/nQ97evEsqR8dESbSdQZGiA)**
Thank you,

Joe Kent

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---

I'm doing my part by trying to bring experience and accountability to Washington. Will you do your part and help me get there with a contribution today? Please give what you can. Thank you, Joe Kent Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665629%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aYEBY7%2bWw9H8%2beOqyLIUnw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won’t work! This is only more evidence that I’m fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I’m on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665620%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3dpjDMOL96cKUrEUwqaHsA&sysid=1)
