| | Let's not be confused about what this means.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61776633/401162102/182157091?sourceid=1048917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjdiZDk1NC1jNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXf9GEip1rqo1UQ7Djh3S-RZf38veVUPNXWZFjd-q2Y=&emci=15f5828f-3dda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ab7bd954-c5da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **ABORTION ACCESS NEWS: Florida Governor Signs Near-Total Abortion Ban** Late last night, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law.

Let's be clear about what is dangerous about this: _everything_.

**FIRST:** Many people don't know they're pregnant after just six weeks. And even for those that do, it will still be almost impossible to overcome Florida's additional barriers to access, including _two_ doctor's appointments and a 24-hour waiting period, before the six-week window closes.

[**This is effectively a total ban on abortion, hiding in plain sight. If you're ready to fight back, donate right now to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61776635/401162104/182157091?sourceid=1048917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjdiZDk1NC1jNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXf9GEip1rqo1UQ7Djh3S-RZf38veVUPNXWZFjd-q2Y=&emci=15f5828f-3dda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ab7bd954-c5da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

**THEN:** There are other near-total bans, like Florida's, in the works. We already know, for example, that the Nebraska Legislature is working on a ban very similar to Florida's. Nebraska, like Florida, already had abortion restrictions in place after _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last June, but is now opting for a harsher ban. The Republicans are showing us again and again: _The cruelty is the point._

It was never about a number of weeks. It was never about "women's health." (Stripping a person of their bodily autonomy DOES NOT improve their health.) **For anti-choice extremists like Ron DeSantis, it is about making anyone who can get pregnant _less_ free.** ****We have never needed Democratic pro-choice women in office more than we do right now. clean_body: Biden can’t hide from the TRUTH... | | | Friend, Don’t be fooled. Joe Biden may be feeble, but it makes him no less of a crook. Reports are now surfacing that Biden’s White House may very well have granted a “special access request” that led to the FBI RAID on my home. And after the Soros-funded prosecutor in Manhattan had me arrested and arraigned for committing NO CRIME, the true hierarchy of the Deep State is beginning to unravel. The TRUTH is: this witch hunt is outright election interference orchestrated by Biden’s cronies to weaponize our justice system and secure him a second term. But what they fail to understand is that our MAGA movement is the most resilient movement in HISTORY. Because we have something they NEVER will: more than 74 MILLION American patriots with an unbreakable resolve to SAVE our country. No matter how many lies, attacks, or phony witch hunts they throw our way, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. _We need to fight back to protect our reproductive rights in every corner of the country!_

[I'm counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to stand with me right now by signing my petition to defend reproductive rights!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61777659/401166178/583292334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&code=jtk1051-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTE5YzJiYi1jN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPb3JGbabpPtk9MJKnmlHYToIy5KCjXN7b4izs47UGY=&emci=f686dc45-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba19c2bb-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Peter, in less than a year, the entire landscape of reproductive health has changed drastically:
**_FIRST,_** the conservative-leaning Supreme Court OVERTURNED Roe v. Wade, plunging our nation 50 years back in time and leaving millions of Americans without access to reproductive care.
_THEN,_ a Texas federal judge issued a decision that struck down FDA approval of mifepristone, which could take this pill off the market for 40 million people.
_NOW,_ Florida's far-right governor has signed a **_six-week abortion ban_** into law.
Peter, we always knew that restricting reproductive freedom was a key part of the Republican platform, but I _never_ thought they would be so blatant in their attempts to strip this fundamental right away from millions.
This sequence of events further proves that overturning Roe v. Wade was never about constitutional rights; it was always about stripping autonomy away from pregnant people and exerting control over the masses. And now, it's up to us to stop them.
I vow to never relent in my fight for reproductive freedom. I vow to do everything in my power to ensure that New York _remains_ a safe haven for all those seeking an abortion. And I vow to use my position as New York’s attorney general to support and defend people struggling with abortion restrictions in other states.

**But, Peter, we’re stronger together. That’s why I’m counting on _you_****to sign my emergency petition to defend reproductive freedom.**

**[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition before midnight tonight to protect reproductive rights? We must act NOW, before more people lose their rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61777661/401166180/583292334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&code=jtk1051-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTE5YzJiYi1jN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPb3JGbabpPtk9MJKnmlHYToIy5KCjXN7b4izs47UGY=&emci=f686dc45-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba19c2bb-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61777663/401166181/583292334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&code=jtk1051-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTE5YzJiYi1jN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPb3JGbabpPtk9MJKnmlHYToIy5KCjXN7b4izs47UGY=&emci=f686dc45-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba19c2bb-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

body:
| | | Team, I needed to reach out right away:

Donald Trump will soon take the stage at the NRA conference to rally his far-right base against President Biden and our Democratic Senate -- all while refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence that’s gripping our country.

**We simply can't let Trump be the loudest voice on this issue, so we need to take action _right now._[That’s why I’m asking you personally: Sign our petition to show your support for commonsense gun safety reforms >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-ChuckSchumer-SchumerGunSafetyPetitionNRA-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-ChuckSchumer-SchumerGunSafetyPetitionNRA-Pros-sl1&akid=10449%2E9716520%2EQQ-_AC)**

For years, NRA-backed Republicans like Donald Trump have opposed meaningful gun safety reform. We need to stand up to the cynicism of Trump and the NRA and _prove_ that we won’t stop until our communities are safe from the terror of gun violence.

**The time to speak out is NOW, and that’s why I’m calling on 250,000 Democrats to show their support for commonsense gun safety reforms. Voters need to know that Democrats are with them on this issue, so _don't let Donald Trump drown us out._**

**[Please add your name to show that you support _urgent action_ to stop senseless gun violence >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-ChuckSchumer-SchumerGunSafetyPetitionNRA-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-ChuckSchumer-SchumerGunSafetyPetitionNRA-Pros-sl1&akid=10449%2E9716520%2EQQ-_AC)**

Every donation that we raise before midnight tonight will go directly to funding our work in critical state legislature races. [**_So please, pitch in right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61778363/401168544/710125701?refcode=20230414.1_GADFT_4AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAyNTdiOS1jOGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3wy6Y_9aISIQvPIbJ22vBm0Glw7W8f3g9JASRwM98Ps=)_**

We’ve told you how state legislatures are the first line of defense for democracy, and you only need to look at states like Tennessee or Wisconsin to recognize their power.

[**_We can’t allow the GOP to remain in power in Georgia. name: Cecile Richards
subject: Gov. DeSantis just signed a 6-week abortion ban in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm absolutely terrified.
Just after a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas overturned the FDA's approval of medication abortion, Florida Gov. DeSantis signed a bill BANNING abortions after just six weeks.

**I simply can't believe I need to keep saying this, but at six weeks, most people DON'T EVEN KNOW THEY ARE PREGNANT. **

This horrific decision WILL fundamentally change access to safe and legal abortion services for millions of Floridians.
**Last year, nearly 50 years of precedent was overturned when the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, ending the constitutional right to abortion in America. And with today's decision, Republicans are inching closer and closer to passing a national abortion ban.**
[**We simply cannot allow that to happen, friend. That's why we need to fight back NOW. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: 3 questions❓
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here are three quick answers to why we are asking you to contribute
#

Tomorrow is our mid-month fundraising deadline, so in lieu of a longer message, we are going to get straight to the point:
[**Here are three quick answers to why we are asking you to contribute $3 today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230414-1-onb&t=1&akid=552%2E734936%2Ejy9GYd)
**Q1: What is a mid-month fundraising deadline?**
It’s not an official deadline, but it’s an important checkpoint as we chart our progress toward monthly goals — which we use to make important budget decisions.

**Q2: Do these emails matter?**
These emails are the single most important source of donations our campaign receives. Without them, we would be out-funded, out-spent, and out-matched by Senator Sinema’s wealthy donors.

**Q3: Do I really have to donate today?**
You don’t have to donate to every email we send, but we do hope you’ll give to this one. We’re behind on our goals and hoping we can catch up before we hit our checkpoint tomorrow.
[**Peter, we’d really appreciate it if you were able to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends tomorrow.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230414-1-onb&t=2&akid=552%2E734936%2Ejy9GYd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-apr23.sAB--R&amount=3&refcode=em230414-1-onb&t=3&akid=552%2E734936%2Ejy9GYd)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-apr23.sAB--R&refcode=em230414-1-onb&t=4&akid=552%2E734936%2Ejy9GYd)**
---
****
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=552%2E734936%2Ejy9GYd). Team, In case you missed it, earlier this week **our former far-right opponent Yvette Herrell announced her campaign to challenge Gabe** for New Mexico’s 2nd District in Congress. She was joined and endorsed by none other than House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who would give anything to flip this seat red again next year. Take a look at the headlines:
## “Extremist Republican launches bid to reclaim New Mexico House seat she narrowly lost in 2022”
— DailyKos
## “GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy attends southern New Mexico rally for former Rep. Yvette Herrell”
— Fox News
## “New Mexico Republican bidding to win back congressional border seat”
— NewsNation
**This is shaping up to be the most important 2024 House race in the entire country, team.** If we’re going to defend the 2nd District from anti-choice extremists like Herrell and McCarthy, Gabe needs your support NOW. **[We’re just two weeks out from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re not quite on track to reach our April goal. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’m missing your name
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbpr92b7vtal2mfpcsg9p0hkjn4evp5fi5u7le0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie2p36c5h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zov5sic5upo91227se7p7cj3nbtuiui8dib65qa8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie2p36c5h2bs) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5o7vaheem9e748pe7q4svrc20rpq1g4k4m2saj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie2p36c5h2bs) After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk7spu5j575rl5hnqbl1r610ufeemc4hqtv7vo28_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie2p36c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp30c3gmeo71c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7t50ffhqmqm9q3knuqfds4v888647pn913q8d0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie2p36c5h2bs)_

| | Derek, Following the _Dobbs_ decision last June overturning _Roe V. Wade,_ it's estimated that 40% of active duty women serving in the United States face limited or no access to abortion services where they are stationed. Military servicemembers have absolutely no say in where they are stationed, even if their duty station is in a state that restricts access to reproductive health care. That’s why Senator Warner and 37 of his Democratic colleagues are pushing the Secretary of Defense to make sure reproductive healthcare access is taken into account when stationing active-duty women. ****[_**If you agree that active-duty women deserve the ability to access the full spectrum of reproductive rights, sign Senator Warner’s petition right now to urge our government to take these restrictions into consideration when making personnel decisions.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61786886/401187666/1659656590?refcode=mw_em_230414_1_b&ms=mw_em_230414_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ExMWIxYi1jZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJC-jZ4SBmOGb9byvJNtAA5cX1HPNl77W30SVm5mvHs=&emci=29ab6a95-43da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a3a11b1b-ceda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**** Protecting our servicemembers’ access to reproductive care is a national security imperative. The reality is state laws prohibiting the right of servicemembers to make their own decisions about their health care won’t stop them from needing or seeking care – abortion bans only force them to travel farther to states that haven’t restricted abortion, jeopardizing the health and overall readiness of the military. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zujjc8h4bmsmie0ujbsrp1t9k39vktuf34qkrvi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6p36cph2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvljnfrup4i04lckga1cg7kav7r3n0ij4e957lbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6p36cph2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvj663jc6sr7lel7kmsgifhqdcorlphlbtqqqvig_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6p36cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zetvckp8gl0tcgp9uavnfestp20fkn1guttcv2u0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6p36cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs25ahq3l4ro54ivsvq0f1cmvh2o5lhntungtv80_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6p36cph2bs)

clean_body: It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Michael Haley
subject: On the eve of my daughter’s wedding
body:
This is important.

|
| | |
It's a very special Friday in the Haley household, friend!

I'm sending this to you on the eve of my daughter Rena's wedding day, and although it may embarrass her, I wanted to take a moment to say how proud I am of the daughter Nikki and I have raised.

For those who haven't had the pleasure of meeting her, Rena is a strong, kind, caring, intelligent and passionate young woman. She reminds me a lot of her mother.

If you're a parent, you understand how tough it can be raising children especially in today's world. Our dream, like many of you, is to give them a better life than we had and protect them at all costs. You can do everything in your power to raise your kids to be kind, good-hearted individuals, but if these last few years have taught us anything, we plan and God laughs.

There is nothing easy about watching your children try to navigate a global lock down, get a new job or buy a home in a failing economy. _No parenting book can prepare you for that._

It's easy to get frustrated or even feel a little hopeless. My fatherly advice is to always remember that life is full of choices.

On this $5 Friday, I'm asking you to choose to secure America's future. If not for you- our children because they deserve a future filled with hope and opportunity. **[Will you chip in $5 to help us get Nikki elected so she can lead our country into a brighter future?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3nsc4r775fop1tt9051lkr3kbh6j6oq0cj51v9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5ie6pb3chh2bs "Will you chip in $5 to help us get Nikki elected so she can lead our country into a brighter future?")**

Thank you for being a massive part of Nikki's fight to restore this country's greatness. I look forward to speaking with you all next Friday - but first I have to go tear up the dance floor!

#JourneyToJackson2023 #LightsCameraJackson2023

Till next week, friend,

Michael Haley, Father of the Bride

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Though Jon Tester represents a red state, he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family, fits Montana perfectly. So, unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating.
body:
Heads they win, tails you lose
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9d3c449-6441-4445-95f2-209f02a63824/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Among the things that are exhausting about Republican lawmakers is they'll cheat any chance they get. Often, they don't even try to hide it. ** **Take Democratic Senator Jon Tester. _Though he represents a red state, he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family, fits Montana perfectly. So, unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating._** _>From a Montana Public Radio story on a state-senate bill:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38f32ab5-a436-42d7-9a6b-c919bca87e2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Smaller parties often win some of the anti-incumbent vote, splitting it up._ **_**So the state senate passed a bill creating a top-two primary regardless of party.** _**_Yet, they only applied this change to one person--Jon Tester. They specifically targeted the only Democrat elected statewide. _****_In other words: Cheating._** [**_We can't let them get away with this or we'll lose a great Senator and control of the U.S. Senate. Will you join us in donating to Jon Tester right now to ensure he runs and wins no matter how much Republicans try to cheat their way to victory?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd679f3a-a3fb-465e-8c66-8705a4d45d4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for not letting them cheat their way to victory._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf20244d8-7913-4cf2-a493-ed92daf23917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

## The Kellen Courier - Weekly Newsletter, Edition 2
---
| |
---
| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. Friends, Family, and Supporters, Every week gets more exciting, and this last week was no exception. I chatted with local reporters about the campaign and my mission to connect with the community. I met with Robert Pelaez from The Island 360, a media organization serving the North Shore of Nassau County. [Read it here.](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/ceOTzjEXM/c?w=y00c_m0x0JIISEWzDJ_aR8z0lPJqBrVXf1ZMNtpdpJc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVpc2xhbmQzNjAuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzLTk5L2tlbGxlbi1jdXJyeS1zYXlzLWhlLXNlZWtzLXRvLXJlLWluc3RpbGwtdHJ1c3QtaW4tM3JkLWRpc3RyaWN0LyIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ) I also met with Ethan Marshall from Schneps Media, writing for The Queens Courier. [Read it here.](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/ceOTzjEXM/c?w=_F_p3ElTnflX1nkDAw_nK3KBfw4u2qa-ONZYFuauQHw.) We need local media who can champion the voices of the community. I am honored for their time this week. Your many messages of encouragement keep me going, and I cannot thank you enough. I hope to continue to count on you to share my campaign. Like, follow, and share on social media. I’m even on TikTok! Here’s my favorite of this past week when Seth Meyers dropped my name but not my photo!...we found a fix.
---
| | [](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/ceOTzjEXM/c?w=lyPffqBhHhW3v2G6buqmh5F33HTmklKzFVTzJ11J_KI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL3NvL2NlT1R6akVYTT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiJjOGRlN2EyMy00OGZkLTQzZmYtOGM3Yy1jMzQwZmY0NWE1MTMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ)

Please share this newsletter with your community! All the Best,

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a clarion call for action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789230/401196983/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=zoiNuWOgoSItRlLhNU0yB9/0JV1a03HfWHsEz/ay+3NmtxzbR/7ZXuOQHgKc6z0W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjgyYzlhMi1kMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4sDwfV4Ifc6buhQgKiTIQKccnxQ9TsDwIide-2LJdk=)

Last week, the Republican-controlled state legislature in Tennessee took the dramatic and unprecedented step of removing two Democratic lawmakers from office for allegedly violating the House's 'rules of decorum.'
State Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson were removed from their elected positions for joining gun control advocates in their protests in the wake of the horrific Nashville shooting the week before. They weren't expelled for breaking the law. They were expelled for breaching the chamber's rules by speaking when they weren't recognized.
The vote to expel these two legislators was a clear attempt to shut down the urgent Call for Action on gun safety coming from young people and others in Tennessee — and to marginalize the voices of the largely Black communities that voted to send these two young leaders to represent them in Nashville.
[**Add your name to our petition today to stand with Justin Jones and Justin Pearson and all those standing up and speaking out for urgent, consequential action to end the killing and stop gun violence in our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789231/401196984/-1861063965?refcode=em230414TN&refcode2=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=zoiNuWOgoSItRlLhNU0yB9/0JV1a03HfWHsEz/ay+3NmtxzbR/7ZXuOQHgKc6z0W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjgyYzlhMi1kMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4sDwfV4Ifc6buhQgKiTIQKccnxQ9TsDwIide-2LJdk=&emci=85a03eae-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)
Republican lawmakers in Tennessee have no shame in their decision to expel these two young Black lawmakers. They thought they could get away with it — but Tennesseans didn't let them! Just days after their expulsion both representatives were sent back to the Tennessee legislature by the people in their districts. And thanks to those Republican lawmakers in Tennessee, the eloquent and forceful voices of these two young legislators have now been heard far beyond the borders of the state of Tennessee!
In many ways it's a particularly heartwarming outcome. And one we can hope sends a warning to Republican lawmakers across the country. The tide is turning. It must turn. The killing in our streets must stop. Common-sense action on gun safety is a necessary and vital step to ending the daily carnage in our communities and saving lives.
[**Sign your name to show your support for Justin Jones and Justin Pearson and their calls for urgent and consequential action to address the epidemic of gun violence in our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789232/401196985/-1861063965?refcode=em230414TN&refcode2=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=zoiNuWOgoSItRlLhNU0yB9/0JV1a03HfWHsEz/ay+3NmtxzbR/7ZXuOQHgKc6z0W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjgyYzlhMi1kMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4sDwfV4Ifc6buhQgKiTIQKccnxQ9TsDwIide-2LJdk=&emci=85a03eae-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)
****[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789233/401196986/-1861063965?refcode=em230414TN&refcode2=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=zoiNuWOgoSItRlLhNU0yB9/0JV1a03HfWHsEz/ay+3NmtxzbR/7ZXuOQHgKc6z0W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjgyYzlhMi1kMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4sDwfV4Ifc6buhQgKiTIQKccnxQ9TsDwIide-2LJdk=&emci=85a03eae-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)****
Thank you for raising your voice.
Chris

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord St. Ste 202
Kensington, MD 20895
[www.vanhollen.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789234/401196987/-1239931627?refcode=em230414TN&refcode2=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=zoiNuWOgoSItRlLhNU0yB9/0JV1a03HfWHsEz/ay+3NmtxzbR/7ZXuOQHgKc6z0W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjgyYzlhMi1kMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4sDwfV4Ifc6buhQgKiTIQKccnxQ9TsDwIide-2LJdk=&emci=85a03eae-c7da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7f82c9a2-d2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Exposing Abuses of the Deep State
body:
CRA has been leading the charge to expose abuses at woke and weaponized government agencies like the FBI. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10351403?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

With Congress in recess, I wanted to give you a quick update on a few projects we’re working on at the Center for Renewing America. (CRA)

As you know, CRA has been **leading the charge** to expose abuses at woke and weaponized government agencies like the FBI. A recent [nationwide poll](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5e093d5d25&e=17913c7d6d) revealed that 64% of Americans agree that “the FBI has become politically weaponized, starting from the top in Washington.”

_They’re not wrong_.

The Center for Renewing America released a [new report](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e3826feaf4&e=17913c7d6d) detailing systemic issues within the FBI, including how the FBI is colluding with Big Tech to gather information on the American people and often militarizes investigative processes.

But the woke and weaponized bureaucracy is not just corrupting domestic agencies; as CRA documented in our recent [Budget in Focus](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=bb473d05c6&e=17913c7d6d) study, the Department of State and the U.S. Agency for Internal Development (USAID) are working against American interests abroad.
---
| **CRA Report: The Top Ten Systemic Issues Within the FBI**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b01e23db9d&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| As CRA highlights in our [new report](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b2a30c2d25&e=17913c7d6d), the FBI has evolved into an increasingly politicized law enforcement agency that is weaponized against groups of Americans who are disfavored by the ruling regime.

A few examples include:
* The FBI’s National Security Branch is expanding its role into domestic criminal investigations.

* The FBI is colluding with Big Tech to gather intelligence on Americans, censor political speech, and target citizens for malicious prosecution.

* The FBI is attempting to purge employees who choose not to get vaccinated.

The below full list identifies the top ten issues within the FBI that have incentivized it to work against the interests of the American people, instead of protecting them.

**CRA Report:[The Top Ten Systemic Issues Within the FBI](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c6452111f4&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| **CRA Budget in Focus: Department of State and Foreign Aid**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5f3be259bf&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| As you may have seen, the Center for Renewing America released our [FY2023 Budget](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e19134df7a&e=17913c7d6d) addressing the nation’s fiscal challenges. The budget includes a comprehensive effort to both revitalize the economy and remove the scourge of woke and weaponized government bureaucracy aimed at the American people, including agencies working against America’s interests abroad.

Our recently released [Budget in Focus](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=9ab5792864&e=17913c7d6d) explains how the Department of State and the U.S. Agency for Internal Development (USAID) have become exporters of woke ideology abroad and offer cuts to discretionary spending.

Examples include:
* The State Department uses “family planning” programs to normalize and push access to abortion and promote the LGBTQIA+ agenda under the euphemism of “reproductive health.”

* The State Department’s Equity Action Plan (EAP) is a framework designed to advance race essentialism and radical gender ideology as a guiding principle of U.S. diplomacy.

* The U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) operates several “capacity building” programs abroad and uses these programs to introduce an unsuspecting world to a woke ideology.

---
| **Join The Fight**
---
| As you can tell, we’ve done our research and have identified how the left has weaponized the federal bureaucracy.

But we’re not just another think tank. We’re activists and organizers who fight 24/7 to stop the left’s destructive agenda.

With patriots like you by our side, we know we can win this fight. As always, thank you for [your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6cd128f53c&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f0e34fe3e3&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cb03f7f771&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c1c58e679e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=a1b211cf7e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=a1b211cf7e).
---

name: Courtney Bourgoin, Evergreen Action
subject: Writing to you from Detroit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Where Michiganders are supercharging the clean energy transition
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4452?t=2&akid=13311%2E53494%2EI3P4gO) _U.S. Climate Alliance Executive Director Casey Katims alongside myself and my Evergreen colleagues, Justin Balik and Emily Halvorson, at the Michigan Healthy Climate Conference in Detroit._ Friend, Passing the Inflation Reduction Act was just the beginning. With billions of dollars of investments flowing from the federal government, states have the historic opportunity to pick up the baton and supercharge the clean energy transition. **And we’re seeing it happen in Michigan first-hand.** I'm writing to you following the first-ever Michigan Healthy Climate Conference in Detroit, where Governor Gretchen Whitmer highlighted momentum around the clean energy transition in the state. And Michigan Senate leaders just introduced the Clean Energy Future Plan, which would take the climate and clean energy provisions from her climate plan and make them into law. **This bold legislative package includes:**
* 100 percent clean electricity standard by 2035
* Investments to expand solar and wind energy and advance building electrification and efficiency
* Reforms to the Public Service Commission’s authority to ensure climate and affordability considerations are incorporated into its work

[This move towards clean energy is not only necessary but wildly popular.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4452?t=3&akid=13311%2E53494%2EI3P4gO) We polled Michiganders and found they overwhelmingly support building a cleaner, more resilient, and reliable energy system by transitioning to a fully clean energy grid.

* * *
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4454?t=4&akid=13311%2E53494%2EI3P4gO)
* * *
**
When states invest in ambitious climate policy, we all win. Hitting these goals means creating jobs, cutting pollution, and advancing environmental justice.** States like Michigan have a generational opportunity to both implement and build on the national victories the climate movement has secured over the past year—and the momentum is on our side. We're proud to be on the ground in Detroit and in D.C. helping to make that opportunity a reality. Onward, Courtney Bourgoin
Senior Policy and Advocacy Manager, Midwest
Evergreen Action
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=13311%2E53494%2EI3P4gO). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Ron Owens
subject: [DO NOT SHARE] re: our path to victory

Hey Peter!

Let me introduce myself — my name is Ron, and I’m the Campaign Manager for Team Presley.

I'd like to take this moment to discuss how we win.

Brandon and I believe in full transparency, and we want to keep you informed about every move we make during the campaign. So I've prepared a memo that outlines our strategy, our roadmap to victory, and our plans for investing every dollar raised.

[Before we dive in, would you be able to chip in a few dollars to help us reach our $25,000 online mid-month goal in just a few days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789541/401198183/-761526316?refcode=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5YzI3YTAtZDNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ripzUvNxaloYsW-_nfasutrJsAInxIwgYxACrASjPY=)
* * *
Brandon Presley’s Path to Victory
Date: April 14, 2023 **The Facts:**

The most recent polls show Governor Tate Reeves and Brandon within single digits of each other. Meanwhile, a majority of Mississippi voters (57%) would choose “someone else” over Reeves in the upcoming election — and he’s involved in the largest public corruption scandal in Mississippi history.

He is backed by the rich, powerful, and special interests who are fueling his campaign war chest.

This helps us mobilize voters who are fed up with corruption and “good ol’ boy” politics in the state.

**Voter Outreach:**

To win this race, we need to turn out every persuadable voter we can and engage our base.

Our operation will include a strong canvassing effort, phone banking, email program, TV ads, and more. We will also leverage digital advertising to reach voters with Brandon’s powerful message of hope.

**Our Message:**

Brandon is all about fighting corruption and serving working people and families, not special interests. We need every voter to know his record as Public Service Commissioner and Mayor of Nettleton, where he was known for delivering real results for Mississippians.

Tate Reeves is all about himself and his special interests. His only message is to protect his bottom line. We're confident that by showing voters the stark contrast between Brandon's people-focused agenda and Reeves' self-serving motives, we can win this election.

**Key Date:**

At the end of April, we have our very first public filing deadline. Republicans, reporters, and national pundits are all going to be watching to see how much we’ve been able to raise since the start of the campaign. This is a major test for us — if we fall short here, Tate Reeves will take it as a sign of weakness. We can’t let that happen.
* * *
Peter, the bottom line is that this race is highly competitive, and Brandon has a strong chance of pulling off an upset victory — and building a better Mississippi for all.

[But we need you on our side, especially right now. Chip in whatever is right for you toward our mid-month deadline. There’s never been a more important moment to make your first investment toward winning this race >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789543/401198186/-761526316?refcode=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5YzI3YTAtZDNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ripzUvNxaloYsW-_nfasutrJsAInxIwgYxACrASjPY=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789546/401198189/-761526316?amount=5&refcode=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5YzI3YTAtZDNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ripzUvNxaloYsW-_nfasutrJsAInxIwgYxACrASjPY=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789548/401198191/-761526316?amount=10&refcode=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5YzI3YTAtZDNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ripzUvNxaloYsW-_nfasutrJsAInxIwgYxACrASjPY=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61789551/401198194/-761526316?amount=25&refcode=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f49c27a0-d3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5YzI3YTAtZDNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ripzUvNxaloYsW-_nfasutrJsAInxIwgYxACrASjPY=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, This should have every American worried. As of last year, over a THIRD of Americans have a positive view of socialism! And that number grows to 44% when looking at Americans age 18-29! Our youngest citizens are being led astray, and right now, we have a deadline to set the lies straight. Our mid-month deadline is in just TWO DAYS, and we MUST meet this critical deadline to defeat socialism in America. Peter, I know firsthand how dangerous socialism and communism are. My family was on a kill list in communist Vietnam before legally coming to the United States. I owe my life to American freedom - and I spent my career fighting to defend it in the U.S. Navy. But now, too many of our citizens - especially our young people - are falling for the same lies that cost millions of lives in communist regimes around the world. It’s up to tell the TRUTH about the horrors of socialism, and right now, we’re running out of time. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

name: Chanita Thompson
subject: They’re choosing polluters over people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Dear friend,
You may have heard of the “The Polluters over People Act” and what it means, so we want to break it down to you.
"The Polluters Over People Act”, also known as HR-1, is an energy bill that _says_ it’s goal is to lower energy costs, but _really_ it prioritizes corporate profits and Big Oil over everyday Americans.
The act does not lower energy costs for everyday Americans but instead INCREASES the deficit by _$2.4 billion_ over the next decade. **While Democrats are striving to lower costs for everyday families, Republicans are advocating for polluters, Big Oil, and mining conglomerates.**
Not only are special interests being prioritized over working people, HR-1 reverses environmental protections that safeguard public health and keep air and water clean. To put it simply: This act undermines _years_ of progress in the fight against climate change, and leaves thousands of clean energy workers out of work.
Friend, last Congress _100,000_ clean-energy jobs were created as a direct result of the Inflation Reduction Act being passed – lowering energy bills for families and expanding clean energy production. Rep. Jahana Hayes voted for this historic act, preventing Big Oil from price-gouging Americans when gas-prices were hitting all-time highs.
**However, not one Republican in Congress supported President Biden's energy plan, despite being a massive leap towards America's energy independence.**
Jahana believes that everyone deserves to live safely and free from pollution, now and for future generations to come. That’s why she’s fighting for legislation that will make energy prices more affordable, create good-paying, clean energy jobs, and ensure America is ready to lead the world in fighting climate change – no matter what. **And she’ll do whatever it takes to stop dark money groups from putting pollution over people, and profit over progress. **
Thank you,
Chanita, Team Hayes

Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes

Waterbury, CT 06721
United States

name: LTC (Ret.) Alex Vindman
subject: Tucker Carlson is a clear and present danger to our national security.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
His lies and disinformation have no place on any military installation, at home or abroad.
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-fox-apr23.iMrA25&refcode=em230414-1-15&t=1&akid=8168%2E3013755%2EPOkVXy)
Derek, it’s Alex Vindman.
Tucker Carlson is a clear and present danger to our national security.
Tucker’s lies — weaponized disinformation and propaganda — drove countless veterans to take part in the insurrection on January 6th.
And on his show last night, Tucker defended the Air National Guardsman who was just arrested for leaking classified documents online. He turned him into a martyr.
Make no mistake: Tucker Carlson’s seal of approval last night will encourage more members of the Armed Forces to leak critical national security secrets.
I can’t emphasize enough how dangerous this is. The Pentagon needs to act. Tucker Carlson’s lies and disinformation have no place on any military installation, at home or abroad.
This is a critical moment, so please: [**Make your first $3 donation and help us continue our campaign to ban Tucker Carlson and all the other liars on Fox News from broadcasting on military bases.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-fox-apr23.iMrA25&refcode=em230414-1-15&t=2&akid=8168%2E3013755%2EPOkVXy)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Personally reaching out to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Did you know that you are INACTIVE?

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy.

body:
This is why we need your immediate support:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61790978/401204067/823540626?refcode=ea.50faf48d-d6da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.50faf48d-d6da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGZhZjQ4ZC1kNmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7sDrzlAUaWTTVSL6lmdsjOe4I6_UrtAl7gZoa5ocjX8=&emci=28523970-30da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=50faf48d-d6da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**_Here are 3 things you need to know, Peter —_**
1. North Carolina is a 50-50 state. In 2020, our state provided Trump’s slimmest margin of victory _anywhere_ , while Roy won his re-election for governor.
2. North Carolina hasn’t voted blue in a presidential election since 2008 — but 2024 is the year we WILL change that...
3. Because Roy told President Biden that he’d help deliver his re-election victory by turning NC blue in 2024.

Peter, so much is on the line in next year’s elections. Abortion rights, voting rights, and more are under attack by the far-right. Meanwhile, Democrats are working hard to keep up our progress expanding health care access, creating jobs, securing our democracy, and fighting climate change. To keep moving forward, we HAVE to win _everywhere_. **Roy is counting on your help to turn North Carolina blue, but he needs your help. Meanwhile, Democrats are working hard to keep up our progress expanding health care access, creating jobs, securing our democracy, and fighting climate change. To keep moving forward, we HAVE to win everywhere. Roy is counting on your help to turn North Carolina blue, but he needs your help. We have to raise $5,000 by midnight tomorrow to keep our April fundraising on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16055%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qqya2jsy51JhvuSSrmu1GQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C. is to tell people you’re going to do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing. You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as bullcrap.

Frankly, I can’t stand it. I’m not always the smartest guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround.

**If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up. **

**_Right now, we’re in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common-sense in our country._**

**I’m happy to be on the front lines every single day fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border, fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy, and fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers.**

**[All that I ask from you is to have my back. Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE will go miles to help me. I’m counting on you the same way you can always count on me to shoot you straight.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16056%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B0Ua5vuGA4cVhzdSp7hRsg&sysid=1)** | [**RUSH $500**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16057%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b90sIJl8CtuH5zRWpNnEkQ&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $250**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16058%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BKnLp4gJY89GDV0ExWZGBQ&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $100**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16059%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i5mFVmWLHPJLlJgKa2LepA&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $50**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2fejMSOB2wv3N8bbgG3gwg&sysid=1)
---
[**RUSH $25**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PRuAhPipygZ6wIVdHlDRgw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you for having my back. I can’t tell you how much of an honor it is to fight for you every single day.

God Bless,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CWFTPuCW1%2bEbJinTz4i1ug&sysid=1)

Senator John Kennedy

* * *

_[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u1NS4DG8mWRP5u0%2bq5bRCA&sysid=1)
Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class.

**[Chip in $35 today to ensure that we give our future generations a fighting chance.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16054%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=huv4E7wh6vtYXvr40mmbWw&sysid=1)**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carla=20Sands?=
subject: Spring into Action!
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/4ae28eaf2aa5/spring-into-action?e=b254a3b575)
Greetings from Pennsylvania, I hope you are enjoying this beautiful Spring weather!

Since my last note to you, it has been action-packed. As part of my recent travels, I was delighted to attend my first WWE event at the Sofi Arena thanks to my friend and generous hostess Linda McMahon. She served as the Small Business Administrator in the Trump Administration.

The Heritage Foundation is coming up on its 50^th Anniversary and many of us are looking forward to celebrating it! The Heritage Foundation wrote the playbook for President Ronald Reagan’s administration and also helped vet supreme court justice candidates for President Trump.

Additionally, I have had many opportunities to advocate for energy and security regarding Russia and China with businesspeople, parliamentarians, politicians, and students.

Please join me on June 2 for a discussion about global issues and their effect on Pennsylvania at 6:15 pm at the Briar Cliff Financial Services offices located at 404 Thorn Street in Sewickley, PA. (see flyer below)

One issue that I am worried about is America’s equal justice and the rule of law. The Department of Justice and our laws have been weaponized against individuals.

I am encouraged by our new congress under the leadership of Speaker McCarthy. His actions show that the new Congress is determined to bring fiscal sanity back to Washington. Just passed in the house, the once-in-a-generation sweeping HR-1|Lower Energy Costs Act reforms is a wonderful first step, with its 5 pillars:

1. Increasing domestic energy production
2. Reforming the permitting process for all industries
3. Reversing anti-energy policies advanced by the Biden Administration
4. Streamlining energy infrastructure and exports
5. Boosting the production and processing of critical minerals

You can listen to my conversation about HR1/American Energy here. (https://www.iheart.com/podcast/139-the-scott-show-27091419/episode/why-hr1-is-so-important-111794183/) with Scott Sands on iHeart Radio.

It is amazing that America First Policy Institute was founded only 2 years ago today! AFPI was the convener and host for a discussion about HR-1 with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and Representative Kathy McMorris Rodgers, Chairman of the Energy and Commerce Committee.

President Biden has directed his EPA to mandate that 70% of all cars sold by 2032 have to be electric. Today only about 6% of cars are electric. “This is Chinese-style central planning, as automakers answer first to their political overlords, rather than consumers and investors.” (WSJ, 4/13/23) I encourage you all to do your part to defeat this unconstitutional mandate.

If Shark-tanker Kevin O’Leary can commit to building the first new oil refinery in America since the 1970s, just think what all of us can do to make life better and more affordable for our kids and grandkids.

Until next time, you can catch my latest hit on “Just the News” below.

Warmly,
Carla Sands
US Ambassador to the Kingdom of Denmark (ret.)

Please see my latest news hits,
AFPI's Newsletter and event flyer below.

** AFPI President and CEO Brooke Rollins's Response to the Indictment of former President Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
The New York prosecutor's indictment of former President Donald J. Trump is just the latest example of the radical Left's weaponization of government to silence their ideological opponents.

AFPI President and CEO Brooke Rollins had this to say in response to this egregious use of government force by the radical Left:
“Today, the radical Left proved yet again that it can weaponize the government against any American who dares to challenge their power, voice differing opinions, or believe in the fundamental greatness of our Nation.

Crime is out of control in New York. The people don’t feel safe. But a woke prosecutor decided to ignore the real concerns of people living in fear, and instead spend time and money to bring felony charges against a political opponent that the federal government didn’t even pursue as a misdemeanor.

There’s clearly a two-tier justice system that protects certain kinds of people and is weaponized against others. This is un-American and must stop now."

** AFPI Hosts First-of-its-kind National Security Symposium
------------------------------------------------------------
On Thursday, March 23, the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) hosted its inaugural National Security Symposium, which included discussions with members of Congress and national security experts on the landscape of an America First approach to foreign policies.

Want to watch the event in full? You can access the full event livestream HERE (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1UE1rhDAU_DV6i8QXN8aDh25lD3soCP2-SIxxDU2imEjx3ze767ZQWgiBNzNveDOyTCnDwFiG07grW9lh1seqBAwEE5KmLKOEJHhHZY8FpSwrCJEkyrAYrefCJ9zIWQneq9n5adRKrIkYTTyUkHc07_NCMpHijqV5ATltUw4gRE9aHuty8H5yEbmL4BDe306B0NxL538U6CJBlns1Wq6Rk2KZlV-RW800OrWYiBwWbxoju8tQScOVjoCeQTcus5ABtEI33Exa9etGiTBydbKBvMZHtx4aKz-dlt7LudmS8366rQVAWn-1RE-7vc3q9vmjD3RjteoC8QscVBdyV3VbPxYvxzWeS-G4DViG_-lzO7SM8n0EcNkHuFQHq9jz16UbHt7Q-7FG83yqjmcS7sPv10l-KzeTZKsDorz6AmcDp0c) .

Here is what AFPI leaders and special guests discussed:

PANEL I - GROWING THREATS FROM CHINA (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kEtrhDAUhX9N3CkxcTQuXHQqQxlKQZjSx0biTTIGkigaKc6vbzrjdFEohDy-c-8l58gqzRkmjGU4jUTVSYGZinRFMKGY0jRlWU5pgne5VBjynGUlpZKiDMPgPAefcCsnDVzpafbjYDSsCQw26quSp5xyrlS6YwWIIhOy6xRQVvAsnGVkqt77cUb0AZFDWOuw-CXpZLiaz-by7JbhCb8ievCI1ukOU0TyxdvWSqEXG5i0XJsNzsMygQzQgWm5HY1W6yZBeHJ9dkG8mYrv7lonv2YjvZdTu_nhary3BSCdv42Mzw3pTnAZLQS5dUaLIPyBvRbBTd10zal8O67RVMHMXWAZ_iel7aMVKvaIkGs_IddAyAp7_r6I_uUj_jw28TSd6-OPSB7D7tdR_lZuQ5ItDoKK-hthkJZZ)
Steve Yates, AFPI Chair of the China Policy Initiative, kicked off the day by moderating a panel on the threats from Communist China. The discussion featured Sen. Ron Johnson (R-WI), Rep. Mark Green (TN-7), former Governor of Mississippi Phil Bryant, and noted commentator Gordon Chang.

PANEL II - PROTECTING AMERICANS HERE AT HOME (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kF9vgyAUxT8NvmnwokgffFhnmsUsy8z-dX0xFLGSABrFLe7Tj7V2D0sWCIHfufeGc2QeU4aBsQTHQZMfZYNZG6gcMBBMSByzhBIS4ZTKFgtKWbIhRBKUYNFbx4WLuJGjErxV4-SGXiuxRKI3QZezOMYtxbwBCjz1SyYxBZaSLMXZJskCnXfODRMiNwh2fi_97OboKP1VH6qvezv3d_gFkZ1DpMhgAwjo7ExtZKNm45k0XOkVTv08CumhFbrmZtCqXVZJ-CdXJ-vFi6nw6q628nPS0jk51qsf3g7XNg-kdZeR4XZvytcDPD1-eLm2WjVe-AM71Xg3RXWsnjdv5RKMuZi49SzB_6S0fjRH2RYBnPsBzoHAIrZ8Pzfdw3t4KKtwHE9F-SPCrT_dMsjfynVItMYBKCu-Aev0k2g)
Chad Wolf, AFPI Executive Director and Chair of the Center for Homeland Security and Immigration, led a discussion regarding homeland security that focused on securing the southern border. The panel featured Rep. Wesley Hunt (TX-38); Stephen Miller, President of America First Legal; Pam Bondi, AFPI Chair of the Constitutional Litigation Partnership and Co-Chair of the Center for Law and Justice; and Morgan Ortagus, the founder of Polaris National Security and former State Department spokesperson. The panel was moderated by Hogan Gidley, AFPI Senior Advisor for Communications.

LUNCHEON - AMERICA FIRST AND U.S. MILITARY POWER (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kFFrgzAUhX9NfFNiYqN98KFOymhHQdjY1heJyU0Ni1E0MtyvX9baPQwGIeR-J_dyz4E8ZhkmWZbgOJB5AxJnKtA5wYRiSuM4SxilEd4wUFgwliVbSoGiBIveOi5cxDsYteBKj5MbeqPFEom-C9o8w2nKoYm54g0WG8EJA5KweCNkIhWhgclb54YJ0R0ie3-WfnZz1IB_mnP19WTn_hG_ILp3iJax3wcjwmbX1R1IPXceQse1WeHUz6MAD60wNe8Go9WySsKXXF-sF2-uwru92sLnZMA5GOvVEFfDvc0DsO42MjwdVZkWR7v78HJtjZZe-ANbLb2dsmqq5-3rYQnGXEzcepbgf2JaF81RWiBCrv2EXBMhiyj42yzb03t4PlThOF7Kw49IHvztlgF-f65DojUOgtLyGx4_lKc)
Fred Fleitz, AFPI Vice Chair of the Center for American Security, then moderated a luncheon panel on America First foreign policy and military power. This discussion featured Rep. Ronny Jackson (TX-13); Lt. Gen. (Ret.) Keith Kellogg, AFPI Co-Chair of the Center for American Security; and Robert Wilkie, AFPI Distinguished Fellow in the Center for American Security.

PANEL III - PRESERVING PEACE IN THE MIDDLE EAST (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kEFrhDAQhX9NvCkxiRoPHnZrFyq0sNBl214kJuMaatTGSPHfN921PRQKIWS-lxnmPSjilGPCOcNxoIoGFOZtoAuCCcWUxjFnKaURTlJosUxTznJKgSKG5Tg4IV0kDFgtRavt7Kax13KN5GiCrqC0zQRjiiZNpnLJc4oZYY1guUxEkjZBX3TOTTOiO0QO_qzj4paoAf-8X0thqgc4dydEDw7RknFE0sWZ2oDSi_EEjND9BudxsRI8HGRfCzP1ul03SfpS6MvgxZul8MdbPcDn3INzYOvNjWinnzYPYHC3kWF1Uo95tftI3r1cD71WXvgDO628l_LYHJ_zc7UGtpCzGDxj-J-MtkULlO0RIdd-Qq5xkFXuxcuiuqfX8K06htZeyupbJHf-dusEvz-3IdEWB0FZ-QXPc5Nc)
The afternoon panels began with a discussion on preserving peace in the Middle East by building upon the success of the Abraham Accords. The panel featured Sen. James Lankford (R-OK), the co-founder and co-chair of the bipartisan Senate Abraham Accords Caucus; Rob Greenway, Executive Director and President of the Abraham Accords Peace Institute; and Victoria Coates, Senior Research Fellow at the Heritage Foundation. This panel was moderated by Dr. Jacob Olidort, AFPI Director of the Center for American Security and Middle East Peace Project.

PANEL IV - RUSSIA & THE WAR IN UKRAINE (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kE9rhDAQxT9NvClxEv_swUO3dmk9LAgt2_Yi2ThZA0ZFIyXfvumu20OhEELm9zKTvIdFnOYU8pzTOGiLM7Y0V4EugAKjjMVxzlPGIpqkqKhM05zvGENGOJXjYIW0kTA4aymUnhc7jb2WLpKjCbpC8iRrFU0SlqlcgBSIKs7Qv5UolWIW9EVn7bQQ9kDg4JcbV7tGZ_THJ1cKU73gqXsj7GAJKzlwIJCu1jQGW70az9AI3W9wGddZooeD7Bthpl4rt0nSl0JfBi_eTIV3d82AX0uP1uLcbH6Emu5tHuBgbyPDt_3z8VIvzCZeboZet174Azvdejdlfa5fd6fKBXMhFzF4xuk_KW0fLUi2JwDXfoBrIODkXryvbXf8CD-rOpznS1n9iPDod-sm_L25DYm2OIBk5TedvJR9)
Rounding out the day was a panel led by Lt. (Ret.) Gen. Keith Kellogg on ending the war in Ukraine and the need to define the American interest in the conflict. Gen. Kellogg was joined on stage by Robert Wilkie and Editor-in-Chief of the Federalist Mollie Hemingway. James Carafano, Vice President of the Heritage Foundation’s Kathryn and Shelby Cullom Davis Institute for International Studies, also participated in this panel discussion.

** AFPI Launches Biblical Foundations Project
------------------------------------------------------------
On Monday, March 27, the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) launched the Biblical Foundations Project.

The Biblical Foundations Project empowers local church and ministry leaders with language that communicates the foundational biblical principles that will safeguard AFPI’s 10 policy pillars on eternal truth. This project is about saving the soul of America. Our call to action is for all pastors, ministry leaders, and parishioners around the country to pray for our country, get connected with the Biblical Foundations Projects, and get involved in their local communities!

You can find the published content of our first sermon here (https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1kMtqwzAQRb_G3tnIkuvHwoumJossCoFAHxszlkaxgiwZWSb476skbhelBaHHPTNXw8UmKypCqyonWSyaHgWpZKwaSigjjGVZlReMpeSpQEl4UVR5zRiyKCfcGg_cpzCiUxykcrOfrFZ8Tbkd46FhBatRSsZryHkpiCyB1bLIszoHQAKxbgbvpzlizxHdh_W3UwAaPM4-XHrVBxl0Iu1iBHhlzZxMzl6Q-0QZ76xYuLduTWZ0ozW3Q2H4Yb_4sRtRqGWMWIsjKB3R4ibOdnEcg2i47mCctJLrhnh4gjqbAB9hJN-pdAavs0bv0XVbDiCn77YgoPEPy4St4jTRy_VSBdwZrUQAv8RBiTBje-yPp_rtsMau4TOYoOXkn3S3QZuo3EWU3vspvQdJV76D90UMrx_J5-GYOHduDzdIX8Lu1wl_KjeTdIuDRmX7BdfzrcE) and the corresponding bible study worksheet here
(https://email.contact.americafirstpolicy.com/c/eJx1UcFu3CAQ_Rp8m5UBL7YPPnRrRdEeIq0UKW0vFoZhjYKxZbA2_vuyiZND1EpoNLzHPGbeYENFlbOqKnKa6aZHnVcmsw3LGc85p7QqBOeH_CjQ5EqIqqg5R06KXE0-ShUPcsTFKmnsEuI8Oau2g5rGbGhKLTgtRV2XRV-XfUGPpjd4NKWk1VHQPnPNEOMcCP9B2EM6_1ZKhJMRQ0xJb_sESwdmWr2W0U4-wB1ECHHVG1CItwlW7-wrug3MYtHrALch5dLGAaTXcNeOVgXQE4z2DayH_WvCH9Y4diNqu46EtzhK6wgTdzBM66IwgV65To6zs2bbKZWu0l59Ij9cg0_7Oo-34DBGXLrdMGnmz7IEoI8fkvD8cmoNikcfEt2lCXQivoGD1cmu9tJfnuuX85YtjQppopDW8Z817I02pDwRxt7rGXt3nG3qJH-tenj6DX_OF1iWa3u-k-xninGb8evlLnLY7WCkbP8CK-O7Dw) .

To launch this project, AFPI President & CEO Brooke Rollins and Chair of the Center for American Values Pastor Paula White-Cain were honored to be joined by nationally and internationally recognized faith leaders, including Dr. Alveda King, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, and Pastor Scott Turner, as well as Bob Unanue, one of the world’s top business leaders and the President and CEO of Goya Foods. These leaders shared incredible insights into the foundational principles that made America the greatest country in the world and how biblically based policy solutions are the best way to set our country and the American people on a path toward phenomenal success.
