** AFPI Hosts Majority Leader Steve Scalise and Members of Congress to Preview H.R. 1 Before its Passage in the House of Representatives
------------------------------------------------------------
Yesterday, March 30, H.R. 1, the Lower Energy Costs Act, passed the U.S. House of Representatives. The legislation now heads to the U.S. Senate.

On Tuesday, March 28, the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) held a roundtable discussion moderated by AFPI Vice Chair of the Board Larry Kudlow. The participants discussed the Biden Administration's war on American energy and the critical importance of embracing the solutions this vital legislation offers.

We were honored to be joined by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise, Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers (WA-05), Rep. Bruce Westerman (AR-04), Rep. Sam Graves (MO-06), and AFPI Chair of the Center for American Freedom David Bernhardt.

Did you miss this great discussion between AFPI experts and Members of Congress? Jacob Olidort is from Queens and Manhattan, New York, and serves as the Director of the Center for American Security at AFPI and as Director of AFPI’s Middle East Peace Project. Olidort recently served in the Office of the Vice President, where he contributed to the federal response to COVID-19. Previously, Olidort served as the senior foreign policy advisor to Senator Josh Hawley and Senator Orrin Hatch, as well as in positions at the Department of Defense, the State Department, and the Central Intelligence Agency. Olidort previously was a Soref Fellow at the Washington Institute for Near East Policy and taught at George Washington University and American University. Olidort was a Fulbright Scholar in the United Arab Emirates, a non-resident fellow at the Modern War Institute at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, and is a term member in the Council on Foreign Relations. Olidort received his Bachelor of Arts in History and Islamic and Middle Eastern Studies, magna cum laude, from
Brandeis University, his Master of Arts in Near Eastern Languages and Civilizations from Harvard University, and his Master of Arts and doctorate in Near Eastern Studies from Princeton University. When Jacob is not writing, he enjoys visiting family in New York, browsing used book shops, and fishing on Long Island.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: $3 to take on the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dismantling the NRA’s decades-long stranglehold on our political system won’t happen overnight
#

Friends -
Today is the first day of the annual NRA convention. This year, it’s taking place in Indianapolis.
Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Ron DeSantis are on the list of featured guest speakers.
Surely they--along with NRA CEO Wayne LaPierre and others--will peddle the fiction that the only way to stop gun violence in America is by selling more guns.
This is what we’re up against--a gun lobby and the politicians they pay for who are so committed to the profits of gun manufacturers that the impact on our communities is simply the cost of doing business.
For example, at the beginning of this month, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis passed permitless carry legislation, even though it is highly unpopular among Floridians. All because he’s in the pocket of the gun lobby.
But Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike have had enough of politicians like Ron DeSantis who are putting the gun lobby over the safety of their constituents.
However, dismantling the NRA’s decades-long stranglehold on our political system won’t happen overnight. As the NRA begins its convention, we need to fight back. The only way we can stand up to the gun lobby and its dark influence on our politicians is through the support of people like you.
[**So please, make a contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your donation is a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the gun lobby’s influence on our politicians.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230414-1-15&t=1&akid=5107%2E3935704%2EQlEHeW)

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: 5 reasons, 5 dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Lucas Kunce is Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat in 2024 — but he can’t do it without your help.
#
Peter — here are 5 reasons why you should donate $5 or more toward our goal of raising 1,500 individual donations before midnight on April 15:
1. **Lucas Kunce is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024** — and after he launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley earlier this year, _National Journal_ even said our movement “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” this cycle.
2. **Josh Hawley’s cowardice on January 6th made him the GOP’s most vulnerable senator.** His support base in-state is crumbling and a recent report showed a growing “intensely negative sentiment” about Hawley among Missourians.
3. **Lucas’ bold message is already resonating with voters.** Whether it’s calling out Hawley for being a fraud or corrupt politicians for failing to actually serve the people they were elected to represent, Lucas has earned in-state and national media attention for speaking truth to power.
4. **National Republicans are attacking Lucas relentlessly.** Hawley’s campaign and GOP insiders at the NRSC know Lucas has the message + momentum to flip this seat — and they’re doing whatever it takes to tear him (and our grassroots movement) down before it’s too late.
5. **If we start strong, we can win — that’s why your early investment could make all the difference.** If we have the resources right from the start to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and stave off GOP attacks, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and take this seat back for everyday Missourians.

**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in $5 or more toward our goal of raising 1,500 individual donations before midnight on April 15 so we’ll have the resources to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30832?refcode=em20230414-2995&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2995%2E614464%2EIh_PbQ)**

name: CourierNewsroom.com
subject: 185 million Americans
body:
That’s why we’re doing things differently.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)
Peter, 185 million Americans don’t trust the news... and we’re not surprised.
[**We’re going to explain where this distrust comes from and how Courier Newsroom is working hard to restore that trust by delivering no-nonsense, relevant local news. But before we get into that, will you chip in $5? We’re $7,500 away from our mid-month fundraising goal, and every dollar chipped in makes a big difference in these final 24 hours.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3659?refcode=em-20230414&t=2&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)
**Okay, let’s get into it:**

**First** , many mainstream media outlets (like Fox News) aren’t focused on informing the public — they’re focused on pushing right-wing propaganda and churning out huge profits.
**Second,** a lot of mainstream media outlets hide their most important, in-depth reporting content behind paywalls — effectively burying good journalism for a huge number of voters and news consumers.
**Third** , many mainstream media outlets rely solely on algorithms to reach their audience. The algorithms tend to push sensational stories and dangerous right-wing messaging full of fake news.

**That’s why we do things differently.** Courier Newsroom provides in-depth local reporting to audiences in ‘news deserts,’ who are targeted by bad actors spreading false and misleading information.
[**We serve communities in eight battleground states by delivering trustworthy journalism to the online spaces where people actually get their information. Will you support our vital work by chipping in $5 (or whatever you can afford) today?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3659?refcode=em-20230414&t=3&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3659?refcode=em-20230414&t=4&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)**
Peter, we’re not Fox News. We don’t spread right-wing disinformation. In fact, we do the opposite: **we push back against misleading and dishonest content in real time** , correcting the record whenever and wherever we can.**
****
****Unlike mainstream media, we don’t chase profit.** Because grassroots supporters like you fund our work, we’re free to report on important stories that truly matter to our readers.
Also unlike the mainstream media, **we don’t keep our news stories behind paywalls — and we**** _never, ever will_****.**
**Every donation (big or small!) allows us to keep our journalism free and available to everyone.

[Our honest, original reporting relies on grassroots support from people like you. To keep the lights on in our existing newsrooms and expand into new states, we have to close this $7,500 gap in the next 24 hours. Please help us keep up this important work by contributing $5 today:](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3659?refcode=em-20230414&t=5&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3659?refcode=em-20230414&t=6&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=853_120351_GMo0rZ&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=853%2E120351%2EGMo0rZ)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

subject: I’ve got some news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I’ll cut right to the chase, I can’t stress this enough... | |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVfazTuJ2oYEimEIiuwDoFscFLpSFoGfJxwf2QOroV-GUB43HCgGXrRoWCS1U7mjOU6avFLj54EF3doef_zrHywv3hSZGE14O9p3g2Eqemya2PANzkxV_hdDfGJplQjW0peL4wzdFajCM7F-Py8G2vx6OCSNYze8H_Uo0wzzc9mbTjJ9xS29pwXPY1w4da-pz90Lge9tjoFI6H1PI426mIUBA-_89rU4Xe7UbLHho_tgTce3UOQ3hvXhf24Qk1z--AfhikIIx1Wvf8VU0S8i97gDH1IUfjW82NV_n8Xgr7a5Dy9mStb0dowE-YBvCxoHfXW)
---
It's Tim Scott.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: **I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
I believe in securing the border.
I believe in election integrity.
I believe in parental rights.
I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement.
**And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVfazTuJ2oYEimEIiuwDoFscFLpSFoGfJxwf2QOroV-GUB43HCgGXrRoWCS1U7mjOU6avFLj54EF3doef_zrHywv3hSZGE14O9p3g2Eqemya2PANzkxV_hdDfGJplQjW0peL4wzdFajCM7F-Py8G2vx6OCSNYze8H_Uo0wzzc9mbTg2_pT4yVF0Icn9X2SfsOV8rkMQSe9cihHv_-NVI-TdZKd27P2IikCrx00Pjgrpao53rhCKZXt2b0apCKkjXZw6RXDURFU3hN94WbZQAlApMltuhFYVebH_Fts70q8W2fayijC4gxnWUoCVX_lEpWq6 "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---

Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values.

I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either.

_**[So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I'm humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVfazTuJ2oYEimEIiuwDoFscFLpSFoGfJxwf2QOroV-GUB43HCgGXrRoWCS1U7mjOU6avFLj54EF3doef_zrHywv3hSZGE14O9p3g2Eqemya2PANzkxV_hdDfGJplQjW0peL4wzdFajCM7F-Py8G2vx6OCSNYze8H_Uo0wzzc9mbTgh1nIPsjjdYTVJ001nPXt-pHcV-yHX59bcJ0dzYNSTA89oGK56wqUMiV4sIzGXO2gL1TbuBwKQjwsG81MTT0mpkZS8zp6KDd188rDY7DYCretGNQlrey-josqcPesKGdpCKcq8n1pi4MD6kSywnZ8P "So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I’m humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?")**_

---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVfazTuJ2oYEimEIiuwDoFscFLpSFoGfJxwf2QOroV-GUB43HCgGXrRoWCS1U7mjOU6avFLj54EF3doef_zrHywv3hSZGE14O9p3g2Eqemya2PANzkxV_hdDfGJplQjW0peL4wzdFajCM7F-Py8G2vx6OCSNYze8H_Uo0wzzc9mbTjp4r20FFTf7UEBO2rfT1ycz55FS1XjLoU9O3cRzSBZvSwXFRTNwGiVtnh-CtRwtLwrmR3KUZ16JxWcQ06a46zeijMvEaYdwAR3Nsyp4Vd3HvqPszErYWlhdqueDg1HiF-nj12je87q177KSlwAg04P "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")

I hope to see you're with me.

God Bless,
Tim Scott

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=PdbvVJmc5zSiX6J9Mi2zh_8FnAOUGutIaQG_wIQxFk90ZfrKFNEd3MSEX9dnq_8VmEPSnssY2ypKuWDIF4UTrOlw50iucR-Zvxou5-PtLGKCumavXwiGkpxmLkbalk9WvkA3Jl6OyXxZzOdLp4BEBjZNKjHFLq9r2iPp-CgEvLayYaQ0K_q1jDUJzY1B1LsfTqCWHhZU__NqajLpQaWGs2faP4Ll2fOL756n9cGBdm6IUMM3s3UkqMHcvOA6mIU5gAQxVWSDp2dzezD-UBkR5w788r-BYcNAvOQT5KpGG5hDOtKF187ATh9o-ckX0H_mB5lrcTsbqLRaDLbZxRSL1Derjeh8pfVIPV2A_SxhZEMtACA4_y10vkczlqsjXeD9 "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVf7yKuFPxjA1fDBfzRX2Lw57PLvZMUVr3usmhJrbvEhXD_IGkvBoV--DuxPVzGTdfVJI-CoccNjawhXF_An7f7RNbFXC6J1RDaM7Xjipo_KCfZWH4MRNTTW7ewgMjaAzxv05EJHSyj9THRlHw9KP01ke6ZgAfAH8j1kZX1vwltdZ7ptYe_1wESQe206-h0c_rF70Xm-EPr8uCgAjfi9AJnp8Tgtw8-5K2AMDtPQezlIXELJcKWJH7HBWV9zKOPmYnBfYXArWG6Onj3hFd57iSsLBI1BHN89YgFStXdWdTJn6jrt0r9rqnLa1LT38KOrpuv "JOIN MY TEAM")

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e82a6c1aa7442cd93304dd2065a4df4&_e=MDqToeNxjTqkGrZkg7dMH4N7qbjRMb6xBJQ9uIgEqAo0YzdSU4CpocLQjRXSUiVf7yKuFPxjA1fDBfzRX2Lw57PLvZMUVr3usmhJrbvEhXD_IGkvBoV--DuxPVzGTdfVJI-CoccNjawhXF_An7f7RNbFXC6J1RDaM7Xjipo_KCfZWH4MRNTTW7ewgMjaAzxv05EJHSyj9THRlHw9KP01ke6ZgAfAH8j1kZX1vwltdZ5lZRljADFXmpYL6D3R21xns9QTawiu288acLgnxDKSEO0oYEBxYrchDFILNEYbImNJqO_ULv6pemkMoi9V3WMAUANYTKyaoQW7RjviKOnrke6x4B1na78kK2d2DhgigAqQz5rQdXZHuGvmTLrQtbGE "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

clean_body: I’ll cut right to the chase, I can’t stress this enough... | | | | | | It's Tim Scott. I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee. I believe in securing the border. I believe in election integrity. I believe in parental rights. I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement. And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us. | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE" Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values. I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either. "So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I’m humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?" | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE" I hope to see you're with me. God Bless, Tim Scott | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE" | | | I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America." I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me? | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America."** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 |

[In part 1](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDQtYmU1NzZjMTMwNzBiNDJmYWE5MzczZThmMWI1MTU2YWUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8veW91dHUuYmUvdXhqdVVpNjA4ODA_bWlkPTQ2MzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/KnjNu2-KyEwzSfDQW2wPyQ), we take a deep dive into Steve’s new film _Nefarious_ which was released in theaters across the nation today! Be sure to support Steve and go watch his new film this weekend. More details at [whoisnefarious.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDQtYmU1NzZjMTMwNzBiNDJmYWE5MzczZThmMWI1MTU2YWUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lndob2lzbmVmYXJpb3VzLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/13cEyxRn9TS_MDZGP4x3vQ). [In part 2](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDQtYmU1NzZjMTMwNzBiNDJmYWE5MzczZThmMWI1MTU2YWUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8veW91dHUuYmUvTmE5ZC1WQk5ocTA_bWlkPTQ2MzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/rOCOU9OYYl9SiyQInWUGBw) of my conversation with Steve Deace, we go more into some of the major challenges we face as a nation today. It was a lot of fun to get to meet Steve and to get to take over his studio to interview him for the podcast. I hope you enjoy the conversation. Please respond and let me know what you think about [The Jenny Beth Show](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MTkyODY4NTksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMDQtYmU1NzZjMTMwNzBiNDJmYWE5MzczZThmMWI1MTU2YWUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbGlua3RyLmVlL2plbm55YmV0aG0_bWlkPTQ2MzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/zSsGj9DvZyavaVbUwaurRQ), and if there are any special guests you’d like me to interview, please let me know that as well. Jenny Beth Martin

In a new Wall Street Journal article, Democrats revealed that Wisconsin’s 1st district is now one of the most important districts in the nation for the Left to flip Blue! I’m working hard to hold the line against the Left and these Democrats, and I’m proud to serve Wisconsinites every single day doing that. But I won’t lie to you – without your help, I won’t be able to keep up as Democrats pour money into this toss-up district in hopes of flipping this all-important seat. I’m humbly asking for your support. Please. I’ve always relied on a grassroots army of conservative donors, just like you Friend, to power me to victory. Can I count on your support? There’s no time to sugarcoat this: if we fail this early in the year, the consequences will be devastating for 2024 and America could suffer. Thank you in advance, Rep. Bryan Steil Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

subject: Our goals are fairly modest

body:
#
Team,
Tomorrow we will hit the midpoint of April and we are pacing behind our April fundraising goal.
At this point in the month, we should be nearly halfway to our $44,000 goal but are only 37% there. We are so close, but in order to get there, we need to have a big day today.
So will you help us close the gap? We have less than 48 hours to make up lost ground and need to raise $6,000 by then. Every single dollar will count. Whatever amount you donate — $5, $30, or $100 — will put us one step closer to reaching our goal.
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today? We would not ask if it weren't important.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230414-1-t1&t=1&akid=4362%2E196590%2E3KDd-Z)
Our goals are fairly modest — but these goals are important in order to keep our movement up and running so we can continue helping Democrats across the country. So when you donate today, you are paving our path to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Please add your contribution today.
With gratitude,
The team at the Long Run

**[Every day our conservative values are under attack...](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1sNh5mZVPaMes0nnrssWQgEzW9rY28xJO22y-eokdtJp6k2ERJzGcPMfcYGCpOBhb4oplcmweA40DcUBk8Der7mKEIOJ8OxV8fbpZCA3OIvSyUhg_qLO2YjfQjtJ9pdFJPSQpHellsZnMmIBsMHOrPBTL-UKoXVOZL8I4Jq7iQjg%3D)**

Just look at the past few years under total Democrat control:

* Our economy has crumbled, and Americans are paying _**more**_ for everyday essentials to live.
* Our children are being used as political pawns and parents have no say in their children’s education.
* Woke culture is becoming the norm – with major companies forcing employees and customers to conform to their radical ideas.
* The war on American energy is evident, with China and other foreign countries continuing to be a _**major**_ threat.

**Under the Democratic stronghold, our conservative way of life is being chipped away.**

**[We need a strong team of Conservative warriors on hand to fight back,_and I’m leading the charge._](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1AbF3P-q2QqDuimMtU6NU5VR0vyATEBfwP8KXPO8Rguvn5geUTNwEbyVztEZJ0gBeuKGzRRILConCUPa5OObn9NqYqHkIuoP2pwTbWIPQC3PHaiFK2pw4wTTepNWZAYMIz1aW65k80uSFZOOJ075_1Mt8qQrLzeR6InzrvzzHXYw%3D)**

**Fellow Conservative, I might not be the loudest conservative in the room, but I will put my head down and do the work of the American people. If that means something to you,**[I need your immediate help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1tsDiLJHAWAXsXsGywFtCPgFvI3MFBah_P4yXBvKdxiyWCZCwxewZSQHa6SSZ-zVaBKyAqiluGDTMfgIhXgVG6Hzh4He0Mw27oZeX3bXtWGzFJK0-UIVO0Ij-CIARz28YNLdor57Z0wVqWHDQZjz9daOL0MGVePhGFM_rcun_rSQ%3D)****

[** TAKE BACK AMERICA: SAVE THE SENATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1z3tuAgPktR20pgii9kleeoXdOX5iHraic_PcbNmc33xOOPJ8twBxU4h5SbF2ZTTG-iqop8aTmyAynI4_IQi4a9EHAwjGzLYznszH2gHAOk6WMHaGWxcljldLxOEStvPFUhUN81MGwrat4FC4JL-zrn6IaNBj67DamNif4jlxxFc%3D)

As Americans, we deserve elected officials who fight for issues that __you care about.__

We need to revive our conservative values in this country – the things that make us great: **family, faith, and freedom.**

**The way to do that is by saving the Senate –** **[can I count on you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1j7V72Ae9KDnSXfNDwTA1J2z43Azn2MVJdVtOQoX3vzPqT_Uq4ZU9N3P9tWJj6-fSYEvhCyotc08fIGUvXe7C-jj-428nc9kJr1iZ5v2tQaS9IjRW61O44C6XRwspUBxsvM5Q9SHENLfsu1l8GN5lfesfFXN2xzJnnD-DkhURuuk%3D)**

For America,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a7bc3e216fd463b9e4a5d0d64f39c03&_e=VWQi00O-PYg_Nk6pCYBPUCjedobOkgIB7CWNCKONxj2H7Zw5iloALR-I9AqJA-Zs4PyhOL2wznnPzB5TRVtBiqCyj6SOxasIGEjB-pfoKATh_vPtPTtk8oOz1aIa62OwPd1_0sIh1jcIrWz7NNirL0RbES1YtyWV7_3m2pqwqGQgz43G1basFj7G_gt15vzeWZnMVw-FI46RpaR3sHibw3F_jUrm3I977PxfBDDb-xpPXWGbozv-LiEaIon1_0h1TXKxEY1qhtK_ELrTwDaS9Jp-L18wSDVgUB3825LVWIVlHLXHPYtY9zImrsOXYFf6AFVFc2u4Ti-kjAbGsNJkdOXnyvUOxuI3kUs7Yfthfl-BrUSz2yNbFeZK7QyVPSFdIxHrknniJ5OWMnYdepQkf6yXCj24RVFJhdyRvkWnPsQ%3D)

**We cannot let self-funding millionaires and their billionaire supporters spend their way into the Mayor’s Office!** That’s why it’s crucial we hit this last mid-month goal: to ensure we have the resources to close the gap and get Helen’s message out.

Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. clean_body: The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats from the school board to Senate. | | Very quickly: The Democratic National Committee is facing a critical mid-month deadline, so I'm asking: The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats from the school board to Senate. And if we’ve learned anything over the past few years, it is that your early support is critical to Democrats’ electoral and legislative successes. I’m so glad to know I can always count on you when it matters most. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. | | Friend, The numbers are in, and I am simply humbled. Our campaign raised $831,000 during the first three months of 2023 - _the single largest fundraising haul ever for a freshman New Jersey member in their 1st Quarter._ We have had a huge outpouring of support because people understand that we need to continue the legislative momentum built in just the first three months of the 118th Congress. Whether it is lowering energy costs or stopping inflationary spending, I am proud of what we in the House have accomplished so far. I will continue to listen and lead on behalf of New Jersey families in Washington, DC.
---
Thank you for your continued support.
---

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: This is a major victory
body:
While this is an important step, millions of other undocumented people without DACA still lack access to life saving health care. | | | This is amazing news, Peter: The Biden administration just expanded eligibility for health care through the Affordable Care Act to DACA recipients. **This is a major victory for DACA recipients and their families that is the direct result of years of tenacious organizing.** Having good reliable health care is a human need, and this rule change will mean that more people will have the life saving health care coverage they need to take care of themselves and their families. While this is an important step, millions of other undocumented people without DACA still lack access to life saving health care. The only fix is citizenship for all 11 million. That’s why we are demanding President Biden and Congress not only protect DACA recipients, but deliver a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. **Will you rush in a donation to help UWDA secure an inclusive, expansive pathway to citizenship? We’re moving in the right direction, but the job’s not done yet.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FEmRAeIw6Wf78r9QhC6Gkt6GCcSrMNViHVkPaNG64IJHfaXjdOXffGyy_MtmPVsua0DsexHZvMG1tdi5vI3ezZbguT4RXXEYcWGWvuN7eopfLVTU_euVuaOHOlep_ZykrsduZDI2-C8dZBAe_CrEMdEefnloFwGD-Xdmz-xwQv9lRfaNTgyhp7NkA5mWHVJrPFnzVtukUYfGuKPuM_6juj9mgRrVE7Z8GrabKTZROeyoTvLJ5U6FXV06SdgMt62ZcGkXJ6SDw3ZqXQSK-EpQdH0LEr4B6SeIoU0KQgSM1Gav5V8__QQ7dmpOJxWMl_SGB8qv34lFCAmu1hx42ACvuQl/3vc/-2AdWCEvTSGRAd6VSKaACw/h0/tvkPXsBLgOYRBB4ZWLejmBys-o-5KdNNumj2la4F1mo)

As a result of tenacious organizing by immigrant youth and allies, hundreds of thousands of people will be able to access vital and lifesaving health insurance.
We all contribute to the health care programs so it was unconscionable that DACA recipients were barred from eligibility for ACA, Medicaid and other government subsidized health care.
Going to the doctor for an annual check-up or when you’re sick is a human need. Unfortunately, for far too many people, especially undocumented people, affordable health insurance is often inaccessible or outright denied. This new rule will ensure that people with DACA are no longer denied health care coverage by being able to buy insurance through the Affordable Care Act marketplace.
But even after this victory, there are still millions of undocumented people who don’t qualify for DACA and still lack access to decent, affordable health care.
**That’s why we’re fighting for permanent protections and a pathway to citizenship — for all of us. Will you add a donation to join our fight and help us secure our demands?**

clean_body: While this is an important step, millions of other undocumented people without DACA still lack access to life saving health care. | | | This is amazing news, Peter: The Biden administration just expanded eligibility for health care through the Affordable Care Act to DACA recipients. This is a major victory for DACA recipients and their families that is the direct result of years of tenacious organizing. Having good reliable health care is a human need, and this rule change will mean that more people will have the life saving health care coverage they need to take care of themselves and their families. While this is an important step, millions of other undocumented people without DACA still lack access to life saving health care. The only fix is citizenship for all 11 million. That’s why we are demanding President Biden and Congress not only protect DACA recipients, but deliver a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. Will you rush in a donation to help UWDA secure an inclusive, expansive pathway to citizenship? We’re moving in the right direction, but the job’s not done yet. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | As a result of tenacious organizing by immigrant youth and allies, hundreds of thousands of people will be able to access vital and lifesaving health insurance. We all contribute to the health care programs so it was unconscionable that DACA recipients were barred from eligibility for ACA, Medicaid and other government subsidized health care. Going to the doctor for an annual check-up or when you’re sick is a human need. Unfortunately, for far too many people, especially undocumented people, affordable health insurance is often inaccessible or outright denied. This new rule will ensure that people with DACA are no longer denied health care coverage by being able to buy insurance through the Affordable Care Act marketplace. But even after this victory, there are still millions of undocumented people who don’t qualify for DACA and still lack access to decent, affordable health care. That’s why we’re fighting for permanent protections and a pathway to citizenship — for all of us. Will you add a donation to join our fight and help us secure our demands? name: Jon Tester
subject: You won’t believe what happens next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| I have an important state-of-the-race update for you, Peter:

**First:** Democrats lost our House majority, making the Senate the last line of defense in the fight for reproductive freedom, getting dark money out of our politics, and more.

**Then:** Political experts from _CNN_ to Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ kicked off the 2024 election cycle by saying that Montana is one of the GOP's top targets.

**Now:** I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me. We need to be ready to respond.

**[We can’t — and won’t — win without the support of this grassroots team. So if you can, split a donation now between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help us overcome the attacks and defend Montana. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: We're suing California
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
|
---
Fellow Free Speech Lover,
---
| | This is Seth Dillon, CEO of the Babylon Bee. Whether you've seen me on Tucker Carlson's show, or if you've come across our biting satire online, you probably know that, despite jokes being our bread and butter, The Babylon Bee takes free speech and fighting censorship seriously.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper._Rj948__7PXYyNXISWjvQ)
---
| | **That is why we've filed a lawsuit against California's Attorney General to stop the enforcement of its new censorship law.** If you care about protecting free speech and your right to push back against radical ideology online, then the Bee needs your support in this fight. [**I hope you'll consider standing with us today by becoming a Babylon Bee subscriber.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
The state of California passed a law in 2022 that imposes new regulations on social media companies. This law, AB 587, requires companies to give the California Attorney General's Office regular reports regarding disinformation, misinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech. The law allows the state to impose fines if companies do not comply with these reporting regulations. You may be asking, "Isn't controlling misinformation and hate speech online a good thing?" The truth of the matter is that the government and Big Tech companies working together to control what everyone is allowed to say is a bad thing. A good thing is when everyone is allowed to speak freely. Not everyone's definitions of "misinformation" or "hate speech" are the same. In the case of our work at The Babylon Bee, jokes and satire are often incorrectly cited as examples of misinformation or hateful conduct by organizations and government agencies who think our views don't fit their prescribed narrative. When people in power don't like what you have to say, they can use that power to categorize your speech as "hateful," even if what you're saying is factually accurate.
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
** _This law is not about keeping social media companies transparent - it's about censorship._** The state of California, along with other government entities and Big Tech firms, is seeking to use censorship to protect their preferred narrative. We believe this is a violation of the First Amendment and we - along with our co-plaintiffs Tim Pool and Minds - are taking California to court to fight it. [**In times like these, your support is crucial**.](http://trk.secureandprosper.) If you have not taken the step to become a paid supporter of The Babylon Bee, now is the time. Each paid member helps us keep fighting these attempts to control what we can and can't say. Free speech - even when it comes to satire and jokes - is a vital pillar of our nation. Standing up for this fundamental right is something we will never back away from -- and thousands of free speech-loving Americans have shown us that they're ready to do the same. [**Are you one of them? If so, I hope you'll click here to view our subscription plans and sign up to offer your support.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) With your help, we will continue fighting these battles in and out of the courtroom, in any way we can.
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.--QSwJkQMw07Fg)
---
Thank you in advance for joining us in the battle for free speech.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
---
|
---
_Copyright © 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTA0LTBmMTEzMTJhMTNiYzQ3OWQ4NDkwNWZjNTcyYTg1YzkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/-wKXM6eOXPMGokSTRu7iqg) to unsubscribe.
---

I wanted you to hear this from me

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.
But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: This week’s rulings remind us how much elections matter
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Once again, Texas is at the epicenter of efforts to take away our freedom to make our own decisions about our bodies, our families, and our futures and to deprive us of access to services, information, and care that enable us to do so.
Over the last few days, I’ve been speaking up and speaking out about the unprecedented ruling from a federal judge in Texas staying the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a decision that is devastating to women and families and to our established drug-approval system.
It is critical that we do everything we can to preserve and protect the FDA’s authority to approve safe and effective medication, including abortion medication. That’s why Congressman Pat Ryan and I introduced the Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act: a resolution affirming that medication abortion was appropriately approved, and is appropriately regulated, by the FDA.

https://www.axios.com/2023/04/10/house-democrats-abortion-pill-bill-texas [https://www.axios.com/2023/04/10/house-democrats-abortion-pill-bill-texas]

READ MORE [https://www.axios.com/2023/04/10/house-democrats-abortion-pill-bill-texas]

It’s one of the many things we can and must do, as this case makes its way through the courts.
Yesterday, the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals issued an order staying a part of the district court’s order. It provides some relief from the catastrophic impact of the lower court’s unprecedented opinion, but it leaves in place restrictions that undermine the science-based process and authority of the FDA and health and freedom of American women.
Attorney General Garland has announced that the DOJ will seek emergency relief from the Supreme Court, and I support this action to defend the FDA’s scientific judgment and to protect Americans’ access to safe and effective reproductive health care.
All of these things remind us how much elections matter. Who appoints the judges, who appoints the attorney general, who writes the laws — it’s all about elections. That’s what we are focused on every day on #TeamLizzie. And that’s why I am grateful to all who are a part of it.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf-footer]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=YmhHjREFP3A2EemkB4YxyKnUuEX9SVvJ8vGcsD6G27JHgBsoHjueV3mHbSmUHaz%2BmPgu1uoU5YvR7dXdq19amzJtLg0uKCMF%2FkGt79nkb%2FTua7EC8FSsbtRdgutMoOneiQHXHAxkRQGhNBvbGRwxUsQ2HI6m0pU6SM2ZsvIisHS9od%2FEqOlVrc3qKMGpd1sibYKpPDeIbnlShdDmcfemJPMahAipnu3Tu79Kd7K%2FbnYZR54eYRwEfLnGR%2Blk638bYMqk74z0ebM%2FJx4p26Vedp5avE2xQbI17YRnV7BRlYOo%2BVB53JZlw2nXcTT9O8wO7lgdUi25eBHzrJbNnvrpZAJ5TXyQOwN089K3NqqJrcrq9dIt0n3BFDV0MdrQDrhpvP56IkcVroXn7QbwpZcHpEefFPLVZHvfOscY4oH4sGKZUAJ5L6fJbWNNayJUfZk%2B www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

* * *

As far-right extremists continue to wage war on women’s reproductive freedom and personal privacy, bipartisan problem solvers like Josh who fight for a woman’s right to choose are in their crosshairs. That’s why it’s so important that we come out strong this deadline and show the NRCC that we aren’t backing down. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Josh is in Congress to drive real change for Jersey families and communities. Every day, he fights for the best interests of NJ-05 and wards off any semblance of extremism. Josh’s bipartisan leadership is the key we need. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Your Guide to the Culture Wars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_L13lf_bVZxIFk2xSBlEt3XY-rMI_2w0oOC0IB6P2qUMBW1PqtQyXvdHG7WA6XmKp1vbluV_EVYXx1W8cXX7yPbxUGjqpIr6_AuqpUQmZRN28VoKeGAHDitJdppjRCo-VHHOJQai02JZa5C9v2fRwUqfd2KhWstMZJxa0ZANf9twxPgfa4onr90OfFmyTpB5GpePxP4KwvTmV9AVdLOJqKwSVx5ykugi_wdhgJ2s89eIdtfZayJfBs0TBA8cMdBvNgfEfgBqERP1ZF4ynV3P1J1xbme_TQ_PBQ==&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==)

|
Peter-
It has been a little over two years since I first released my [Conservative Guide to the Culture Wars](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_PWqs3imzJwKw644_Rxul3pZeKiHdwRXnE4MKYBVk_bdjm9lTZOUP1GUG2qSzAANT4PfYFNFLrceWzcewwKcZbjj4vjm1t398llkb4E_nj4gXYeiHDOo-iLQxO9Z-N6TDg==&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==). I intentionally left the principles in this guide broad and evergreen, so that conservatives could draw upon them when our country and our culture is steeped in contentious political debates. And that is exactly what is happening in our country right now.
The same topics I addressed in 2021 are still at issue today. Somehow, we are still debating [whether biological men should be able to play in women's sports](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_PWqs3imzJwKpxl6JdI2vqxEeXMsbJIfsH-XHquyFeorvowRVZB7tLuNLGH7Oxe0cZB2U87jlxdzAefhsR0qLMqL96zXFNzkxGOQItLYFEjJy5BUWqddkrAW6L3t_JDxP2IInIYVXEGB_kJOL5QG7M1Di_fRTiqkcfB9eh3mWSAfrvMzYpiikYqH1fK-iVrwyFRtdlkpnzSk&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==), whether [America has a right to sovereignty and a secure border](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_PWqs3imzJwKYMXDkyWAZ8N3iWDYoqZJL45BeFneJdxtHw4Yovqtw4y4ACuNSQddV2PxXSGTOhBNGW-cth8K81o5-T3FkTIZSINMfCCrTYuwjAJ2EZvy2gCGETbkeiSL6HpDOKXNm1S2t3EGxVWn-1Ktn_F9lYwMGm2fFuvH01hfFFgCHQS-iExnaW7q2jALW9yamLV0RIFXCKR0miyvjrJXZiwGd7_a3A==&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==), and whether we should punish [law-abiding gun owners](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_L13lf_bVZxIHh6yyCIyYeTHLqDB8AhowejEosjEssrx34NgqktX10AatyzoFqg4yb4bgpMKCfmJ4u62GCpKMhzen8qn_7IGkyWEMcvN7y6SBnaXFJko1Jw=&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==) for the actions of criminals.
This is exactly why I created the Conservative Guide to the Culture Wars, so that we can articulate the sound principles we stand upon throughout these debates. If you haven't watched this guide recently, I encourage you to do so below and read the full list of principles.
If you agree with this guide and would like to help me spread this message far and wide, I would be grateful for any support you can give to my campaign. Thank you as always for your support.
God Bless You. God Bless America.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xp4-TatcS1kMUA4kYGgKOqsPdzKyR4gaqpcWoJ6pGMBrxHDMDjae_PWqs3imzJwKw644_Rxul3pZeKiHdwRXnE4MKYBVk_bdjm9lTZOUP1GUG2qSzAANT4PfYFNFLrceWzcewwKcZbjj4vjm1t398llkb4E_nj4gXYeiHDOo-iLQxO9Z-N6TDg==&c=uMLqAAD0opVrdb-Pl7XxZYll_Jb0fhTZLq18DCWKCGxLQxo-KOE3Gw==&ch=4sePtej5mCca1sun0hd6kBLqrg6MjmBWKh5X2uDLkiTsq8s047JaWw==)
---
| |
---
| The Conservative Guide to the Culture Wars (in no particular order):
1\. America is worthy of our love and patriotism.
2\. Victor mentality is better than a victim mentality.
3\. Free speech is absolute. "Hate speech" is not an objective term.
4\. It doesn't matter what kind of gun you restrict, criminals still hurt people. Let us protect ourselves.
5\. You get to keep the wealth you create and pass it to your kids.
6\. The government has no right to shut down your business or invade your home without due process.
7\. Women should not have to compete against men in women's sports.
8\. Verifying ID to vote is not racist. It is common sense.
9\. Borders and national sovereignty are not racist or xenophobic.
10\. You can't have freedom without order, order without law, law without morality, morality without religion, or religion without God.
11\. Innocent until proven guilty \- not the other way around.
12\. Personal responsibility is a virtue.
13\. Never give in to cancel culture (but stay humble and apologize when you're wrong).
14\. The founding was 1776, not 1619.
15\. Stand for the anthem.
16\. Policy that favors one race over another is not "social justice," it is racist.
18\. Less abortion, more adoption.
19\. Only women can be pregnant and breastfeed.
20\. It's ok to lose in competitive sports, and second place trophies don't help anyone (but also see #7).
21\. More police, not defund the police.
22\. We don't tear up the past, we learn from it.
23\. This list is not exhaustive.
---
| |
---
| Have more to add to this list? Text CULTURE to 49500 to send me your suggestions. I look forward to reading them.

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8184dca542724130970868a88ba9ab63&_e=UgefluIXkyVt9QeghuaIKbWyjqiUDv7R7mW6_ZCk2IwO2O8iWoyo4N3dli4p--XatpkI7p2Ht1bZOPzvDe5iCm796lPLiVLEu7Xg4rJayKw-Hxt48RA8-t2pj9ywPWWkUxctdZN1n3pu0qohLOLsZ3kc-UageqSFk96DbhnXWiVHLEnGjH7BdQ5Oi68Ricio63Y8kQC761PoOOFYT8QzMdDb-56dQ1uCk0yH-U5L4W2dHM0AnZvZWHz_lM_SGcHkXvbxn4HSJ6fm2BU-Y2GY57oS0weRCJ9S9wG8K6ZvzsOKnMPRaUksCaCwo9rthd-qzEYuff9ceIFdn8pPFwBKQ44r1Q_a94bQ41_KlPrdUONlKMjX5otnvkxv0tqSfQeo3k7md9ZDJ1_i7U5SpU996fQsz46rdzByGI6plUbWoze0vtMKZuDnXtlTXS_1SdI9UXm4rx19Bu0fv-wZeXyc2A%3D%3D "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8184dca542724130970868a88ba9ab63&_e=UgefluIXkyVt9QeghuaIKbWyjqiUDv7R7mW6_ZCk2IwO2O8iWoyo4N3dli4p--XatpkI7p2Ht1bZOPzvDe5iCm796lPLiVLEu7Xg4rJayKw-Hxt48RA8-t2pj9ywPWWkUxctdZN1n3pu0qohLOLsZ3kc-UageqSFk96DbhnXWiVHLEnGjH7BdQ5Oi68Ricio63Y8kQC761PoOOFYT8QzMdDb-56dQ1uCk0yH-U5L4W2dHM0AnZvZWHz_lM_SGcHkXvbxn4HSJ6fm2BU-Y2GY57oS0weRCJ9S9wG8K6ZvzsNeHshX4bbPGswpuJckF3VH0CPzW6mOG_mxEDrvcgxTHx9dMbq5bJ7Vga3ZJat9iwNAGY8_WWcw2OK2bx6v3gca34bwgEhYju4vJPnE0-XLF2_9TpvyQyOV9JzKB8o-fjMMIn25O9-gqBYV6rX2zX1w48GVOf00E8GiZY5APAskhg%3D%3D "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

subject: Reproductive freedom is a fundamental right.

body:
We're coming up on an important deadline. But first, I want to tell you about what your early support means as we look to the fight ahead in 2024:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61795825/401223857/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTNhYzAyYjAtZTNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DX1VWOyKi8mYpZhaEB-btQ2GZz0GaD7plvRrtwE9jg=&emci=d86e976a-d8da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a3ac02b0-e3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

In a moment, **[I'm going to ask you to chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us reach our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61795826/401223858/1071353790?refcode=em23_230414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a3ac02b0-e3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTNhYzAyYjAtZTNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DX1VWOyKi8mYpZhaEB-btQ2GZz0GaD7plvRrtwE9jg=)**

But first, _please let me explain why your early support is so crucial:_

Last year, when the far-right Supreme Court decided to strike down over 50 years of settled law with the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , we knew that millions of women all across the nation would be forced to deal with the consequences.

Just last week, a Trump-appointed Texas judge ruled in favor of anti-choice extremists to suspend the FDA's approval of mifepristone – a pill used in medication abortions. As access to safe, non-surgical reproductive care remains in limbo, **anti-choice legislators and judges have proven just how determined they are to lay the groundwork for a total abortion ban.**

Peter, I know the uncertainty surrounding the future of reproductive rights is a personal and unnerving issue for folks all across our district, state, and country.

**But let me be clear:** I will never stop fighting to protect reproductive freedom. I will always be proud to stand by the majority of Americans, and Washingtonians, who support the fundamental right to choose. I will continue fighting to pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House. _But with Republicans holding onto a razor-thin majority, it could take some time, and it's not going to be easy._

Here's the bottom line: Elections have consequences. And we need to do everything we can to work toward taking back our House majority to codify the right to reproductive freedom. But change doesn't happen overnight. **If we're going to defend reproductive rights, we'll need to start building power now to prepare for a tough election in 2024.**

**[That's why I'm asking: Will you consider chipping in $5 to fund this grassroots campaign and elect pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61795827/401223859/1071353790?refcode=em23_230414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a3ac02b0-e3da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTNhYzAyYjAtZTNkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DX1VWOyKi8mYpZhaEB-btQ2GZz0GaD7plvRrtwE9jg=)**

But first, I want to tell you about what your early support means as we look to the fight ahead in 2024: Peter, In a moment, = But first, please let me explain why your early support is so crucial: Last year, when the far-right Supreme Court decided to strike down over 50 years of settled law with the overturning of Roe v. Wade , we knew that millions of women all across the nation would be forced to deal with the consequences. Just last week, a Trump-appointed Texas judge ruled in favor of anti-choice extremists to suspend the FDA's approval of mifepristone – a pill used in medication abortions. As access to safe, non-surgical reproductive care remains in limbo, anti-choice legislators and judges have proven just how determined they are to lay the groundwork for a total abortion ban. Peter, I know the uncertainty surrounding the future of reproductive rights is a personal and unnerving issue for folks all across our district, state, and country. But let me be clear: I will never stop fighting to protect reproductive freedom. I will always be proud to stand by the majority of Americans, and Washingtonians, who support the fundamental right to choose. I will continue fighting to pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House. But with Republicans holding onto a razor-thin majority, it could take some time, and it's not going to be easy. Here's the bottom line: Elections have consequences. And we need to do everything we can to work toward taking back our House majority to codify the right to reproductive freedom. But change doesn't happen overnight. name: Lexie, Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: Through the toughest fights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter — It’s Lexie, Tammy’s finance director.

Tammy recently announced that she is running for reelection to continue
her fight for hard-working families.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]Today, I am reaching out to our top supporters, asking you to become an
official Founding Donor of Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign. But before
you donate, I want to give you a few reasons why your support today is
essential:

1. Having Tammy’s back from Day One will be key to defending our
Democratic Senate majority in 2024. Between now and Election Day, we
need to build a big, sustainable campaign operation — so having your
support early on is crucial.

2. We might not know who Tammy’s opponent will be — the options right now
are not great — but the truth is that whoever they are, they'll have
the full support of Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s dark money allies.

3. It won’t be long before Republicans flood our state with attack ads
lying about Tammy’s record. They are willing to spend unthinkable sums
of money to flip Tammy’s seat and take the Senate majority.

4. Pundits across the country are saying that Tammy’s race will be one of
the most competitive (and therefore expensive) of the 2024 elections.
And while Republicans rake in dark money dollars, we’re relying on
this team.

Knowing we can count on your donation even through the toughest fights
will make all the difference as we begin the groundwork for the election
ahead. That’s why today I am reaching out to ask:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]Peter, can we count on you to make a contribution to our
campaign? You’ll become a Founding Donor of the movement that will drive
our country forward.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-launch23.l0WzBv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-launch23.zrlp7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-launch23.xa76pe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-launch23.Givb53&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230414_AM3_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=164%2E35263%2EtjA5p8 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Today and always, Tammy and our team are grateful to rely on this
dedicated, passionate, and strong team. Your support powers our fight.

Thank you,

Lexie
Finance Director
Tammy Baldwin for Senate

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Alvin Bragg is suing me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM JORDAN FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015
body:
That’s because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden’s likely opponent HAS JUST SUED ME!

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0retbjmdscnjtp1mndm5f61o53h1vcn82d4l4vo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)
|

Fellow Conservative,

>From the Russia Hoax to multiple failed investigations and impeachments, to the latest legal actions from NYC, the left has been trying to destroy Donald Trump every day since 2015.

**But the stakes just got higher...**

That’s because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden’s likely opponent **HAS JUST SUED ME!**

**He wants to intimidate us!**

That’s right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, **Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump.** And now he’s targeting me!

But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I’ve squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn’t back down then...and I’m not backing down now!

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE LEFT'S POLITICAL TARGETING
CHIP IN A COUPLE DOLLARS TODAY»» **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3dvv5mh7i1b8mhsmj8e1cdiieic6fjdds04g9d8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)
This lawsuit shows me one thing: **Alvin Bragg doesn’t think the Constitution applies to those who use their position to target political opponents on the right!**

He’s wrong! And **[with your help](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc46iqq76tibe83lkul3je8eap2stbqbkdtasr80_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)** , I’ll fight his bogus lawsuit with everything I’ve got!

[**LET ME KNOW YOU'RE WITH ME » »**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z79tfrhdjcp4p18vi38r06ptq55b1ouo3d3g8tr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)

We will not be intimidated. We will not be deterred. We will not be stopped from doing our job on behalf of the American people, **no matter what.**

God Bless,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zob252rgsssdveo8mh9u2m6jk1uv63s16bfk5pjo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Our legal battle could become extremely costly, draining the resources we have earmarked toward helping us hold onto our majority in next year’s election, which is why I’m asking for your financial support today.**[Will you kindly chip-in $5, $25, or even $100 right now to help ensure we’re able to mount the best possible defense against this purely political lawsuit?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3kf4ik58blbqfosn4gcfev1qi5pdd7d63u4mc0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)**

|
---
**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0ua0r8lkb4j6j72p0e8ti85ar1vnmmgdlr0plug_rp22sh2s8i66o74clg6ap32cdh2bs)

name: WFP Election Alert
subject: HuffPo: Mayoral candidate goes viral for stunning debatecomment​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Luckily, Philadelphia voters have a better choice on May 16th. | | | Peter,
On Tuesday, May 16th, Philadelphia voters will go to the polls to decide the Democratic nominee for mayor in November’s general election. **But while the candidates in this race are running in a Democratic primary, Republicans clearly have their own favorite of the bunch: multimillionaire grocery store magnate Jeff Brown.** In the past few days on the campaign trail, Jeff Brown has:
* Secured the endorsement of the Philadelphia Fraternal Order of Police, the same police union that endorsed Trump in 2016,1
* Gone viral for provoking “audible gasps” from the audience in the first televised debate with dismissive insults directed at Black and brown communities in Pennsylvania,2 and
* Earned the allegiance of hundreds of Republican voters who have reportedly switched their party registration in order to vote for him in the primary.3

Luckily, Philadelphia voters have a better choice on May 16th— a much better one. **WFP-endorsed candidate for mayor Helen Gym** **is a former public-school teacher and union organizer who has been a champion for working families on the Philadelphia City Council for the last 6 years.** With multiple polls currently showing her in second place in a tight race, we need to get behind Helen now if we are going to power a progressive champion to victory in Philadelphia — the same way we did in the Chicago mayoral race earlier this month. [**Will you split a donation between Helen Gym’s campaign and the Working Families Party today to help reach critical voters in these final few weeks?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqJT0H8L3C9z4XVP2f8WZVeTv3ssZxYAaYlukKLQKG5hnmR8AVOC9YqOJzNN9fMiJ-MYMBm2LBD5vYD7YZtcRBCtWK6SOQleUEl5UKclcNkaounFR1uncpOH8Iw_lOybNTwouomVAiAYEKefowZAivpjQBRvwz6ZyrE_4UcBeqTKOVoBwoHVbB_-lZncbHmvlq3lIgsQAjchPIZah4Ih1hc88cGQ-VevjFvzRiZ6EC_cJhFCSHPbdKD6cD1Ec5pmmE60QMZNxSRjPg3bAkfbwAvMuFckeY0mUiHrlcsPSoND8Gdz57RSWrhOROTXVjx3UmnO-dlzRBZtsuqog0xGfMjJX-UBjCg52gA7NvQlOjB0VeBComatAdVnF0Z105nQgQ/3vc/0LqMhHSpRaag-kV5iyNStA/h0/qxK2tHcTQenQdIkNImk66h0lTjQ95ugUV0wGDL9XJuQ) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqJT0H8L3C9z4XVP2f8WZVeTv3ssZxYAaYlukKLQKG5hnmR8AVOC9YqOJzNN9fMiJ-QzyogfzvkvvuEcFJ3nzZsPqtZBc0tyiaPSp0Ht3IJRg3Tb6U-vV3lyso7CtBLEdRL6B76JhgqpRogUvib1vvwtJMdGEEE59xv1pKHNfTFqGfx6SoUJz1SS4djZuOmJ7Cuq2i5kyDZpYfAxeDBUduXFYviiuidmysJ4Q2MuMDVxq7mz48mNdcK9g4lcqHoGCF3aBJJ-Vn0tmFeQuGEEzeOA7ecjTW7hzZ1NAbsMo4Ru-xTFVZ5j3vZEuE178UQ792QKnAyE3CsDTdvIj1kZzIK6Y2l4p_ZQ2qRDpQftgtBcXsjAwVHBSpckzirsjPj3qt/3vc/0LqMhHSpRaag-kV5iyNStA/h1/VmTk95rqwhLeYoV4lpooSIDCbAwqQoERKQrDYUTXocA)** Yesterday, the Philadelphia Fraternal Order of Police endorsed Jeff Brown, and it’s not hard to see why. Previously, **Brown said that "more police and more money for police" is his number one priority.** 3
Meanwhile, Helen Gym believes the key to public safety is expanding investments in our public schools, affordable housing, and mental health mobile crisis units. She’s proposed a $10 billion plan to modernize school buildings, provide free subway transport for students, and guaranteed jobs for teenagers, and will declare a State of Emergency on gun violence to get illegal guns off our streets. **That's why Helen has earned the backing not just of the Working Families Party but of groups representing teachers, city workers, service workers, and working families from diverse communities across Philadelphia.** Helen is a fearless fighter with a proven track record. She’s exactly who we need as the next Mayor of Philadelphia. But while multi-millionaire Jeff Brown can largely self-fund his campaign, Helen relies on grassroots supporters like you, Peter, to help get her message out to voters. [**With just over four weeks to go, will you split a donation between Helen Gym’s campaign and the Working Families Party to help reach more voters? clean_body: Luckily, Philadelphia voters have a better choice on May 16th. | | | Peter, On Tuesday, May 16th, Philadelphia voters will go to the polls to decide the Democratic nominee for mayor in November’s general election. But while the candidates in this race are running in a Democratic primary, Republicans clearly have their own favorite of the bunch: multimillionaire grocery store magnate Jeff Brown. In the past few days on the campaign trail, Jeff Brown has: Secured the endorsement of the Philadelphia Fraternal Order of Police, the same police union that endorsed Trump in 2016,1 Gone viral for provoking “audible gasps” from the audience in the first televised debate with dismissive insults directed at Black and brown communities in Pennsylvania,2 and Earned the allegiance of hundreds of Republican voters who have reportedly switched their party registration in order to vote for him in the primary.3 Luckily, Philadelphia voters have a better choice on May 16th— a much better one. WFP-endorsed candidate for mayor Helen Gym is a former public-school teacher and union organizer who has been a champion for working families on the Philadelphia City Council for the last 6 years. With multiple polls currently showing her in second place in a tight race, we need to get behind Helen now if we are going to power a progressive champion to victory in Philadelphia — the same way we did in the Chicago mayoral race earlier this month. Yesterday, the Philadelphia Fraternal Order of Police endorsed Jeff Brown, and it’s not hard to see why. Previously, Brown said that "more police and more money for police" is his number one priority. 3 Meanwhile, Helen Gym believes the key to public safety is expanding investments in our public schools, affordable housing, and mental health mobile crisis units. She’s proposed a $10 billion plan to modernize school buildings, provide free subway transport for students, and guaranteed jobs for teenagers, and will declare a State of Emergency on gun violence to get illegal guns off our streets. That's why Helen has earned the backing not just of the Working Families Party but of groups representing teachers, city workers, service workers, and working families from diverse communities across Philadelphia. Helen is a fearless fighter with a proven track record. She’s exactly who we need as the next Mayor of Philadelphia. But while multi-millionaire Jeff Brown can largely self-fund his campaign, Helen relies on grassroots supporters like you, Peter, to help get her message out to voters. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Philadelphia Inquirer, April 13, 2023 2\. , HuffPo, April 12, 2023 3\. , Philadelphia Magazine, April 11, 2023 4\. , Philadelphia Inquirer, January 26, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . | | | Trump has already decided to run in 2024, and we need to ensure he never sets foot in the White House again. The report of the January 6th committee agrees with that, as do most Americans. We need Congress to BAN Trump from holding office ever again. Congress has the power to do it. Democrats would overwhelmingly support this. And if Republicans don't, then we need to keep up the pressure, and force these cowards to explain again and again why they are defending a monster. Trump is already laying the groundwork to try to overturn the next election. His loyal cronies are running for office across the country, openly declaring their intentions to break the law and ignore the will of the people to get Trump back into power. Enough is enough. We cannot allow this man to come anywhere near the White House again. [Sign your name: Demand Congress BAN Trump from holding office EVER again >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcdf887d-85b3-44b0-b652-21d38c45b7bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What we’re up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re up against a Republican party that has driven to the far right and will do anything to roll back any progress we’ve made in the last few years.
#
Peter,
Our movement is invested in improving the lives of working class people across the country. But **we’re up against a Republican party that has driven to the far right and will do anything to roll back any progress we’ve made in the last few years.**
Here’s what the GOP is invested in right now:
* Pushing offensive and plain wrong rhetoric about trans folk in an attempt to distract the American public from the real issues, like
* How the GOP is working to roll back 50+ years of legislative progress in the fight for reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy,
* Or how NRA-backed politicians continue to obstruct any meaningful gun control legislation that would protect our communities and our children;
* And now they’re obstructing the actual democratic process by working to quiet or wholly remove democratically-elected progressives from office through censures and expulsions.

Peter, **we know that our fight is on the right side of history.** Defending our progress and pushing forward is _possible_ when we're able to effectively organize and mobilize around the issues that impact our communities the most.
[**Which is why I’m emailing you today: We’re counting on an urgent $3 donation from you right now to get us to our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow and help us fight back against far right attacks on our progress and freedoms. Can you chip in now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230414.GD1e-h&refcode=em20230414-2375&t=1&akid=2375%2E420207%2EzljgJC)
Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the narrow Republican majority in the House.
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230414.GD1e-h&refcode=em20230414-2375&t=20&akid=2375%2E420207%2EzljgJC)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
