name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Conservative News Update: Why Consultants Should Be Graded
body:
If a campaign consultant has a track record of losing races, then a candidate should know that. And if the consultant wins, they should know that too.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0fbacf4b3421/conservative-news-update-why-consultants-should-be-graded?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Why a Grading Scale for Political Campaign Consultants, to Include Online Reviews and Star Ratings, Can Help Candidates Start Winning Again (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Aaron P. Bernstein/Getty Images)

In nationwide surveys, 95 percent (https://findstack.com/resources/online-review-statistics/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of consumers read reviews before making a purchase, and 58 percent said they’d be willing to pay more money if a brand or service had good reviews.

Consumers also trust reviews just as much as personal recommendations – demonstrating the power and influence of online reviews in today’s marketplace.

The surveys also included some interesting data points.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

For example, 72 percent of consumers depend on Google reviews when looking for businesses; star ratings matter more to consumers than the number of reviews; and 94 percent of consumers have avoided a business or service altogether because of a bad review.

Good reviews reward good products and services, while bad reviews result in a decline in sales or services.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Statista)

So if the average consumer relies on reviews as part of their daily decision-making process, then why not create a platform for star ratings and reviews of local and statewide campaign consultants – allowing candidates the chance to review consultants before making a decision to hire them on their campaign?

Far too often, candidates – especially first-time candidates are deceived into hiring campaign consultants who care more about how they can make money from their campaigns, then actually creating a winning campaign strategy.

Campaign consultants find interesting ways to make money off of campaigns and candidates, by persuading a candidate to only use their vendors for mailers, printing, literature, walk cards, signs, television and radio spots and website development – and taking a “referral fee” on the backend.

Campaign consultants can also come with their own donor list or voter data, negotiating with campaigns an additional fee structure that pays the consultants a certain percentage of all money raised from their own fundraising lists, or from the data that they collect and provide.

For candidates, all of this can be overwhelming – and it’s why a rating system with reviews would be incredibly helpful.

It’s also important for candidates to know what other campaigns the
consultants (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-time-for-illinois-failed-political-consultants-to-close-up-shop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) worked on, and did those campaigns win or lose?

If a campaign consultant has a track record of losing races, then a candidate should know that. And if a campaign consultant has a track record of winning races — they should know that too.

By creating transparency and accountability – with realtime information, ratings and reviews, candidates will have the opportunity to make informed decisions – just like consumers do before buying a product or service – or in this case, investing in a campaign consultant.

And if this happens, candidates will be in a much better position to win by filling their team with consultants that bring with them a track record of winning.

If every day businesses are subjected to rating systems and reviews, then why not campaign consultants too?

Illinois Review is contemplating developing a grading system and invites people to confidentially share their consultant experiences with us at
articles@illinoisreview.com (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com?subject=Confidential%20-%20Consultant%20Review) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-the-one-issue-that-cannot-even-be-discussed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A number of legal challenges have already been dismissed. Those that remain haven't gained significant traction. (Source: Spencer Platt/Getty Images)

Di Leo: The One Issue that Cannot Even Be Discussed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-the-one-issue-that-cannot-even-be-discussed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It’s been two and a half years, and soon the 2024 presidential primary season will be upon us, so it’s worth revisiting. Not all the details, just the big picture, and just a couple of very big numbers.

Over the past two and a half years, the Left has constantly reminded us that the courts threw out a number of 2020 election challenges (usually without even taking a look at the evidence presented), and that the various people involved in filing the challenges have given up and withdrawn their charges after seeing the overwhelming forces marshalled against them.

But none of that changes one basic, fundamental fact.
CLICK TO READ MORE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-the-one-issue-that-cannot-even-be-discussed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/ifi-no-common-sense.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois Family Institute: No Common Sense (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/ifi-no-common-sense.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Schools throughout Illinois have implemented rules that require students to be allowed to use the restrooms and locker rooms consistent with their gender identity, but it is not clear exactly how many. So a trans boy, who is really a girl, is allowed to use the boys’ restroom and locker room. While a trans girl, who is really a boy, is allowed to use the girls’ facilities. The requirement is based on a guidance document from the Illinois State Board of Education. CLICK TO READ MORE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/ifi-no-common-sense.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/isra-thursday-bulletin-april-13-2023.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois State Rifle Association: Thursday Bulletin (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/isra-thursday-bulletin-april-13-2023.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago. The Midwest will be a battleground in 2024. The Republican 2024 National Convention will be in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. I remember the 1968 Democratic National Convention. Brace yourself. CLICK TO READ MORE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/isra-thursday-bulletin-april-13-2023.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://illinoisfamily.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://isra.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89ae151cae-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89ae151cae-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

# ICYMI: Why I’m leaving Newsmax...

[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=746b02338e&e=f6564bbe3b)

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e38ecb0c9d&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.
# More on my podcast...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=90463fc25a&e=f6564bbe3b)
This Monday’s episode of Beyond the Briefing podcast, I talked more about my decision to leave Newsmax, all the latest drama in 2024, the drama from the Sunday shows and more.
This Thursday’s episode the publisher of my latest book “The Parrots Go Bananas!” Trent Talbot, joined me. Trent has a great story and unconventional career path that was great to hear more about. Get my book and subscribe to The Freedom Island Book Club at [SpicerBook.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3336eb4963&e=f6564bbe3b).
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ebf262c49d&e=f6564bbe3b)

|

# Stories I’m Reading...
[WH quietly corrects press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre’s claim Biden has taken more press questions than Trump, Obama, Bush combined](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f0e38a5cb3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News
[Biden’s pick for Labor looking doubtful](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8546ecf13e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Axios
[Biden’s claim to have no knowledge of Hunter’s business dealings is becoming harder to maintain](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d3bb2ec824&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News
[Dramatic realignment swings working-class districts toward GOP](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b8ffe95fd1&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Axios
[What Gavin Newsom’s ‘Make America California’ tour conveniently ignored](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a20b874ad3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CA GOP chair Jessica Millan Patterson, Fox News
[NFL Sunday Ticket on YouTube starts at $249 for the 2023 season ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ab4463847e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Verge
[Matthew Miller, a veteran Democratic communications operative, is the top contender to be the spokesperson for the State Department, according to three people familiar with the matter ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5910a4dca5&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Politico
I’ve been very critical of many of the staffing and nomination decisions of this administration, and while I clearly don’t share their political leanings, Matthew Miller is a qualified pick for State Department spox.
[Sheriff Mark Lamb files papers to run for Senate in Arizona ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=32e42a71a3&e=f6564bbe3b)— via AP News
After firing its communications staff, Twitter last month set its long-standing email account for press inquiries to auto-respond with the “poop” emoji — via Sara Fischer, Axios

clean_body: my latest thoughts on 2024, new podcast episode and more. | | | | | | | | ICYMI: Why I’m leaving Newsmax... Last week was the end of 3+ great years of Spicer & Co. I explained that decision in this video: I really appreciate all the support and kind words I’ve received from you all especially. Your support means a lot. If you haven’t already, , and ring the bell so you never miss a video. Also while you’re there, leave a comment on with content YOU want to see over there. | | | | | | | | | | | | "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group” In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver. Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets. If you go to the link: , they’ll know I sent you. Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free. More on my podcast... This Monday’s episode of Beyond the Briefing podcast, I talked more about my decision to leave Newsmax, all the latest drama in 2024, the drama from the Sunday shows and more. This Thursday’s episode the publisher of my latest book “The Parrots Go Bananas!” Trent Talbot, joined me. Trent has a great story and unconventional career path that was great to hear more about. Get my book and subscribe to The Freedom Island Book Club at . | | Stories I’m Reading... — via Fox News — via Axios — via Fox News — via Axios — via CA GOP chair Jessica Millan Patterson, Fox News — via Verge — via Politico I’ve been very critical of many of the staffing and nomination decisions of this administration, and while I clearly don’t share their political leanings, Matthew Miller is a qualified pick for State Department spox. — via AP News After firing its communications staff, Twitter last month set its long-standing email account for press inquiries to auto-respond with the “poop” emoji — via Sara Fischer, Axios — via Chicago Sun Times | | | | | | | | | | | | Join my team for PurpleStride... Every year I raise money for Pancreatic Cancer Action Network by captaining a team for their annual PurpleStride. subject: I owe you an explanation

body:
| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61796811/401227797/-358576059?refcode=X_041423_Baldwin_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vs_7QAy8dq7MshOpys73YFBWEpYEQphx2QSqHcdBRq4=)** Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here. [**I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet's.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61796813/401227799/-358576059?refcode=X_041423_Baldwin_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vs_7QAy8dq7MshOpys73YFBWEpYEQphx2QSqHcdBRq4=) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this donation is so important, especially right now. Over the last few years, we’ve made incredible progress. We’ve passed legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make quality health care more affordable, address the climate crisis, modernize our nation’s infrastructure, protect marriage equality for all Americans, and more. So. Much. More. **I’m so proud of all that we’ve accomplished over the last few years, but I can’t stress this enough, folks: none of it would have been possible without your support. ** Our progress was made possible because of folks like you who chipped in, organized, and volunteered to help Democrats win the Senate majority in 2020 and protect it in 2022. As I’m sure you know, we still have a lot of work ahead of us — from restoring reproductive rights to protecting the right to vote. And with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans already launching attacks against Democrats like me in order to reclaim the Senate majority next year, one thing’s for sure, I can’t do it alone. It’ll take a strong grassroots team to overcome right-wing mega-donors and protect our seat in Wisconsin (and our Democratic Senate majority with it!) so we can keep building on our progress — that’s why I’m asking: [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet's? Your support will help us protect our slim majorities in 2024 so we can keep fighting for progress for our working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61796815/401227801/-358576059?refcode=X_041423_Baldwin_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vs_7QAy8dq7MshOpys73YFBWEpYEQphx2QSqHcdBRq4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tammy Baldwin & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61796817/401227803/-358576059?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_041423_Baldwin_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vs_7QAy8dq7MshOpys73YFBWEpYEQphx2QSqHcdBRq4=)******

Over the last few years, we’ve made incredible progress. We’ve passed legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make quality health care more affordable, address the climate crisis, modernize our nation’s infrastructure, protect marriage equality for all Americans, and more. So. Much. More. I’m so proud of all that we’ve accomplished over the last few years, but I can’t stress this enough, folks: none of it would have been possible without your support. Our progress was made possible because of folks like you who chipped in, organized, and volunteered to help Democrats win the Senate majority in 2020 and protect it in 2022. As I’m sure you know, we still have a lot of work ahead of us — from restoring reproductive rights to protecting the right to vote. And with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans already launching attacks against Democrats like me in order to reclaim the Senate majority next year, one thing’s for sure, I can’t do it alone. clean_body: This overreaching, hyper-partisan BS ain’t it. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friend, Last week in an overreaching and hyper-partisan decision, a Trump-appointed judge out of Texas ruled to ban mifepristone — an FDA approved pregnancy-ending drug that’s been a safe alternative to abortion for over 23 years. This doesn’t just affect Texas, friend. Even in states where abortion and medication abortions are legal, tens of millions of people across the country won’t be able to access mifepristone from any provider if this ruling isn’t blocked. = | = The majority of Americans know that the government has zero place in our doctors’ offices, our telehealth appointments, or our own private, personal health care decisions. But until we break the filibuster and vote out the extreme MAGA Republican majority in the House, they will continue waging a war on our reproductive freedom. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Together in this fight, Team Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! [_**Hi Peter! We’re Raja’s parents, Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi -- and we’re reaching out to tell you why we’re so proud of our son. We’d love it if you would read this whole email -- but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $14 to help us reach 507 grassroots donations for Raja before midnight? It would mean the world to him to have your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61797071/401228316/-1810142053?source=20230414_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ju-20AEVfMqEPYVcwIrSQHHbZ5laCZel7hmaeRaIclY=) Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. We faced economic hardship when we first immigrated to the United States. But we worked hard to achieve the American Dream. And as parents, we couldn’t be more proud of Raja for helping others do the same. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61797073/401228318/-1810142053?source=20230414_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ju-20AEVfMqEPYVcwIrSQHHbZ5laCZel7hmaeRaIclY=) _Us with Raja in Washington!_

[_**Peter, our son has never taken anything for granted. Raja knows what it’s like to struggle. It’s why he works so hard to make sure every American has a shot to defy the odds just like he did. We know this in our hearts: Raja is exactly who we need in Congress. That’s why we’re stepping in for him today. So please, can we count on you to chip in just $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61797075/401228320/-1810142053?source=20230414_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU4MmNjOC1lNWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ju-20AEVfMqEPYVcwIrSQHHbZ5laCZel7hmaeRaIclY=)
Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you.
Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman.
But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges.
Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us.
[_**So now, we’re doing what parents do: We’re stepping in and helping our son. We know it would mean the world to Raja to see 507 grassroots supporters step up in this moment. | | Dear Peter,
We are incredibly excited about our lineup of speakers and panels that will be speaking at our 2023 Republican Action Conference, taking place on May 5th and 6th at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center. **Don't miss the opportunity to hear from these influential and inspiring individuals, and participate in engaging panel discussions and workshops!**

## Campaigning 101: Building a Winning Campaign
---
| Learn from Consutling Experts from winning campaigns at our Campaigning 101 panels as they guide you through effective strategies and tactics to create a successful campaign.
---
|
## Grassroots Activism: Organizing for Victory
---
| Join WSRP Political Director Matthew Frohlich to learn valuable insights and how to use the proper tools to mobilize your community, build a strong support base, and drive change.
---
|
## Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia
---
| Nancy Churchill and Ruth Peterson, Founders of Influencing Olympia, teach you how to make your voice heard, influence decision-makers, and effectively advocate for the issues you care about
---
|
## Ballot Collection: Get the Republican Votes
---
| State Party Strategies Political Director Thomas Smithfield and California GOP's Krista Pittman will share their knowledge and experience in ballot collection strategies they have utilized to secure the votes needed for a successful campaign.

CAGOP has seen outstanding successes in recent elections due to their ballot collection program, flipping FIVE Congressional seats from blue to red in the past two elections and we are excited to be implementing a similar program here in Washington State!
---
|
## Campaign Fundraising 101
---
| Learn from our panel of fundraising experts as they share valuable tips and strategies on how to create a compelling narrative, engage with donors, and utilize various fundraising channels.
---
|
## Digital Media: Build Your Brand
---
| Discover the latest trends, tools, and best practices for building a successful digital media strategy that can elevate your campaign and amplify your message.
---
| [More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference Panels!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0db977117a&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference Panels!")
---
|
---
|

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: As long as I’m Governor, abortion will be legal here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
If you’re anything like me, you’re sick and tired of extremist politicians and radical rulings trying to take away a woman’s right to make decisions over her own body.

Last week, a radical, right-wing judge ruled to invalidate the FDA approval of commonly used abortion medication.

If you’re anything like me, you’re sick and tired of extremist politicians and radical rulings trying to take away a woman’s right to make decisions over her own body.

So let me make one thing clear: **As long as I’m Governor, abortion will remain legal in Pennsylvania.**

But we know that the far right is not going to stop their attacks on the right to choose, so we cannot back down from defending our fundamental freedoms.

**[It’s never been more important to keep Pennsylvania blue and stand up for the right to choose everywhere. So Derek, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight to protect abortion rights here in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816735/401275861/1170836811?refcode=email_20230414_choice&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTg2ZmY4ZC0wOWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYW4cSwkiYy3z2FfCSifp8gdl8laP_lzle2I6APSBNo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816736/401275862/1170836811?refcode=email_20230414_choice&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTg2ZmY4ZC0wOWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYW4cSwkiYy3z2FfCSifp8gdl8laP_lzle2I6APSBNo=)

For decades, right-wing extremists across the country have tried to roll back the right to choose. And now that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , many on the far right want to pass a total abortion ban.

I’ve spent my career fighting to protect the rights of Pennsylvania’s women to make their own reproductive health care decisions – and I’m not going to stop now.

As Governor, I’m working to expand access to care and ensure it’s patients and doctors making those critical health care decisions – not politicians.

But it’s going to take all of us standing together to beat back the tide of anti-choice extremism and defend the right to choose for everyone.

**[So Derek, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight and make sure Pennsylvania remains a pro-choice Commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816742/401275872/1170836811?refcode=email_20230414_choice&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTg2ZmY4ZC0wOWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYW4cSwkiYy3z2FfCSifp8gdl8laP_lzle2I6APSBNo=)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: The news is out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek,
The news is out: **I’m chairing my first Senate subcommittee hearing next week!**
I’m so happy to be back. I’m excited to be the father and husband I want to be, and the senator Pennsylvania deserves.
**[You’ve had my back from the start, so I’m respectfully asking: can you chip in any amount right now? Your support will fuel our work in the Senate, and I’m just so deeply grateful for this team.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230414-1?refcode=em20230414-1-8337&refcode2=8337_434096_j0N4mk&akid=8337%2E434096%2Ej0N4mk)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230414-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230414-8337&refcode2=8337_434096_j0N4mk&akid=8337%2E434096%2Ej0N4mk)**
Our mid-month deadline is around the corner, so I’d be grateful if you can kick in even a few bucks to give us a boost. Either way, thanks for being here, Derek.
Lots more soon,
💛 John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230414-8337-footer&t=1&refcode2=8337_434096_j0N4mk&akid=8337%2E434096%2Ej0N4mk)**

clean_body: Hey Derek, The news is out: I’m chairing my first Senate subcommittee hearing next week! I’m so happy to be back. I’m excited to be the father and husband I want to be, and the senator Pennsylvania deserves. Our mid-month deadline is around the corner, so I’d be grateful if you can kick in even a few bucks to give us a boost. Either way, thanks for being here, Derek. Lots more soon, 💛 John | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Governor Katie Hobbs
subject: Just two seats…
body:
As abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety are left up to the states, Democrats are delivering for their constituents – passing compassionate, progressive legislation that aims to improve the lives of those they represent. | | |
---
| | Hi, it’s Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs. Grassroots support helped power my campaign to victory last November, and now I’m reaching out today to ask for your help to keep it up and build our Democratic power down-ballot. [But first, will you chip in $10 or more to support the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee’s work to expand Democratic power in state legislatures in places like Arizona and across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yBnvBplxTbFmvg4kRts6hG-hi0Qs8Fm3GaXl_W5wbEBTCI2HcPreIJsGC6QFRDcQLU99OckACgOaBert5uWjJVFOzpGnZihShcMh3tHMwp89zS0X_tdosjmV3befns_KSgQJ3E2pOT8eoF0ZJ4S_lW7QtEQx8dY4hfbFtec772ik3MIAPalNksloybBkUoObksnATrPCWyScWYV_-8YsnnBwXPgiaeQH1GhJ-zgajro9jO-mscpy-_rbCzzahl4uSqd4wyw7UPVSk9HsV-HLD6Qy6hd5KdZQwtjELNhVSwFfXomMUC_OoNliTWPzzdIs9lbvi68Rr5hXuXkt-wkIFqv464tWsR1koTQDJ9pkZHs33eICPZMzf7EZmfFKN0sYgAzpelz5Ty6yOklqaz4Y5yNtJvpCsfC8s6OhwCyoKohCFsndvpCUZ2lUgSunHorn2dw6seLoyGqkvRPBH2dM2KFYl6B1TDY3Y8Sp3p8fllA8FYqcRkqrwYxpZsX3OyKWRPs8g2wSdYmTqvlg1AoKk1KVeBMyZRKE52QETuiHPMkQ/3vc/abTcTcDsQj2jTxykEWy30A/h0/HKUOG5DQqoHzYBdpQmxHvGex5YZfPl4t2H32xnd89io) Throughout this legislative session in Arizona, only 24 Democratic bills have made it to a vote, while Republicans have put up more than 300 Republican bills to a vote. It doesn’t have to be this way: Republicans only hold a narrow two-seat majority in both the Arizona House and Senate – that’s right, Democrats only need to flip _two seats_ to gain control. **I’m a firm believer in the idea that government only works well if it’s led well – and Democrats are the leaders we need at this moment.** As abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety are left up to the states, Democrats are delivering for their constituents – passing compassionate, progressive legislation that aims to improve the lives of those they represent. Meanwhile, Republicans have set their sights on passing reductive bills that target the LGBTQ+ community and strip people of their right to reproductive care. [That’s why I’m calling on you to support the DLCC today – with the help of grassroots supporters like you, we can expand Democratic power, protect our progress, and elect leaders who will fight for our Democratic values in states like Arizona and across the country. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more right now? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yBnvBplxTbFmvg4kRts6hG-hi0Qs8Fm3GaXl_W5wbEBTCI2HcPreIJsGC6QFRDcQLU99OckACgOaBert5uWjJVFOzpGnZihShcMh3tHMwp89zS0X_tdosjmV3befns_KSgQJ3E2pOT8eoF0ZJ4S_lW7QtEQx8dY4hfbFtec772ipPlbX2Lb3rX_k92gHzwjeQ-ETYjbgTS5H0lz1qqALn-NAJTKcbH0q-HvaKX6OKKZ8z6tHbMf75mOln_t9tfVwj-161Um7BGlwLAg0p38FyK4gBKDXBpjxv4koU1VR83dcMHPkHU5IRy0laKleGoM-Wrqrnjv42lmVAqu2KPor89d-XtQlVB1bF57HxAK9YIMhkfyO6Q6ubSHvcAJr4zxuuql1KK0pEJeqtzSIgTanXzBpE9wEYMT5VZquAGzAbYCaYckVVqf0WcbDHukQbUH5aS23dzgbb2_OnYQsVr_lbCptGweZqRH8LRu000K43Wp0bgb2zkaFNZA0MuOPt9DiT94u4BpFVYKK-OiVzXY8FprnKe3TLgiR1UYvi-gDWAAQ/3vc/abTcTcDsQj2jTxykEWy30A/h1/pB4y7YfmUQPHH7x4-ccEZCsLOH7OxJ-KXaOI4MXjdxs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

With more Democrats serving in Arizona’s state legislature, I won’t be limited to _defending_ Arizonans against Republican attacks on abortion access, voting rights, and the LGBTQ+ community. **I’ll be able to work _with_ lawmakers to pass our Democratic agenda and create opportunity for all – regardless of zip code, gender, race, or ability.**
The DLCC is the only party committee dedicated solely to electing Democrats to state legislatures across the country, and we need to come together _now to fuel their work._ **By investing even just a few bucks in this movement, you can help lay the groundwork for Democratic victories in states like Arizona and nationwide.**

clean_body: As abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety are left up to the states, Democrats are delivering for their constituents – passing compassionate, progressive legislation that aims to improve the lives of those they represent. | | | | | Hi, it’s Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs. Grassroots support helped power my campaign to victory last November, and now I’m reaching out today to ask for your help to keep it up and build our Democratic power down-ballot. Throughout this legislative session in Arizona, only 24 Democratic bills have made it to a vote, while Republicans have put up more than 300 Republican bills to a vote. It doesn’t have to be this way: Republicans only hold a narrow two-seat majority in both the Arizona House and Senate – that’s right, Democrats only need to flip two seats to gain control. I’m a firm believer in the idea that government only works well if it’s led well – and Democrats are the leaders we need at this moment. As abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety are left up to the states, Democrats are delivering for their constituents – passing compassionate, progressive legislation that aims to improve the lives of those they represent. Meanwhile, Republicans have set their sights on passing reductive bills that target the LGBTQ+ community and strip people of their right to reproductive care. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | With more Democrats serving in Arizona’s state legislature, I won’t be limited to defending Arizonans against Republican attacks on abortion access, voting rights, and the LGBTQ+ community. I’ll be able to work with lawmakers to pass our Democratic agenda and create opportunity for all – regardless of zip code, gender, race, or ability. The DLCC is the only party committee dedicated solely to electing Democrats to state legislatures across the country, and we need to come together now to fuel their work. By investing even just a few bucks in this movement, you can help lay the groundwork for Democratic victories in states like Arizona and nationwide. Together, Katie Hobbs Governor of Arizona | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . **AN URGENT MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER KEVIN MCCARTHY**
Fellow Conservative,

My efforts as Speaker to protect our conservative beliefs and restore American prosperity is NOT going unnoticed by the Democrat extremists in Washington.

Led by AOC, Adam Schiff, and Ilhan Omar I am the Left’s number one target and **[I need your URGENT help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZpm830sWbsqSODPOK3keJPkUoKhCeorB-Hb4G_u-UE9q7unLP_48JNVPtQ833VVp5jNacqwo-o_7ljx69RZCbdmkSnE7XKzIK5QKsxY0txWG-mZrPbfG9IF9UaWaz9pj4PEQOz3JuL5bmQp8FD3diBtA%3D%3D)**

As Speaker of the House, I have daily goals I must meet, and my team just let me know – we’re already BEHIND today’s. Will you please STEP UP RIGHT NOW and let me know I have your support?

**[I can’t win this fight without hearing from you.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZpjqwujvtx_31aMSXsK1td9KFUkUHRJ5oAPzzbhbnDcD_92F2ac_7xfdgmfq8_kkFB-NfSRsgGnu4d1Uv1P7fIcxXuVAx4b2sUAwR2SRbaAlBzkt7QyG5UQJ6Q1uacBkiucVYVorsubRl-fPRJ3OYODw%3D%3D)**

[**GIVE NOW**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZpAfXRzAWSpgtMJmnRDhnMK9NDas79MeYht-H-dm1zop1hjlMgJHlt1uC4aksENWeZMgotT4KR1FQF8T815CQh3m8NdhuG1j-aaoEXoY0crco-q2pW1XhJrMeD1bxV6SSTp7Nzn23Vul6Iag2TGmBPCA%3D%3D)
We’re holding a thin majority in the House and EVERY SINGLE SEAT is critical to our success. The Democrats are already making plans and planning on dumping MILLIONS into flipping Red seats and taking back power.

Fellow Conservative, we saw how destructive their agenda was to America. I started cleaning up their mess on DAY ONE, but this is not an easy fight.

My friend and colleague in the House, Greg Murphy, has been fighting right alongside me. But the Democrats have marked his seat and I need your URGENT help.

**[I’m already behind my goal for the day and Greg and I are counting on hearing from you before it’s too late.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZpz-28Oy_VZ8IoIgKem15ayspmhb_3Rg_KSfsP-Hefr8LAY-Cc-bmardGBei_BBZy-Rrf3l9OCr5ojeH-6UkaGGeTSMGT23eeMEg1E-VatQP8JpCd7EhZVd5AuBfxHD1fZE337NL0bX2kFO7INGI988Q%3D%3D)**

[**GIVE NOW**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZp2qSzifrLRSLuKJeLnkjOpvR60gJxqHQHTRHTzdnPCDAisJkGk1_ndv08YkQw2raVkPo3G_1WJNHzNwIQwTihZR4iLxuz7CCP0pJv-pn-qWZNOMz6lpi4gkVwd-zK2_EdwVN2iykL7GOP5CwPa1gQrw%3D%3D)
The Democrat extremists in Washington are coming after Greg and I and we need to know we have your support.

We can win this fight and save America, **[but it will come down to your actions today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZprQMb1MGn7iD5ctAgBrrn3mWN2WcIctmyM7CDd9gIssdwPM3HwNUhn-8LGnSQewmA4mj6wjOEeMspm0TWFBbykSnhDvVZgKiKE6l9oDyKXJF01xDrTSr5ElescfG-L2Cf7gmQzpHDWFKuYxPY2aCL4w%3D%3D)**

Thanks,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d74bc88b8e584ac68d9ad2e1b57ec323&_e=8eOZVS4YqHIi88Zzqvt3QVDJtIt_5XqVbhGRUeL9Zxos-kxnXbDcosYCmCt1Gp2qac_kdxdsxLV4ckGe9S0GZZIJuzCduMkDGr-0-WqsT2s7hnx2unfWbuu0-8aaxiquUDQuHCaSF6xIzW3YBtLseex0O4WclbyZLw8aub3-bo-ph9ypOkNl9P9e8cFPdVFACxMRmlT1bJOSiim-4zK0tuFzz6_Y4wwPp-ITT9uJWBsdBIvyODQh5UIDo26m8MZpeHHgC-yS3SA_OglGaKV3z47Y1P83UvFkQWq8Luu31RQ-2q4zopPRL4ruZzRz65Mr19-jpCs7d96qQ-aJP3XsQIyppiqgpf6vWhfg5_R_WEzcNIAgpjETRs8q-T_z8DL7gUFnrxfcuDb0ak3bs0I4bg%3D%3D)

I look forward to meeting so many of you as we crisscross the Commonwealth.

name: Wesley Share, Finance Director
subject: Campaign Update for You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
Wesley Share here, Kirsten Engel's Finance Director. This week, we launched our campaign, and I wanted to update you on our progress.
Here's the great news: we've already had a tremendous outpouring of grassroots support since our announcement.
Last year, everyone underestimated our campaign. But thanks to our incredible network of small dollar donors, we were able to fight back — and Kirsten only lost by a tiny margin. We showed that folks in Southern Arizona actually want leaders who fight for our basic freedoms and stand up for working families.
Here's the reality check: Kirsten's opponent is backed by corporate PACs, special interests, and the Republican establishment.
This is going to be an extremely tough, extremely competitive race. We're going to be fighting a lot of outside spending from groups who don't want to see this seat flipped blue.
Kirsten is committed to making a better Arizona, but first, we'll need support from folks like you.
By becoming a Founding Donor now, you'll help us create a winning campaign early, so we can win this seat in 2024. Can we count on you? Every bit makes a difference! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C]
CHIP IN MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C&recurring=1]
Thanks for being on Team Engel,
— Wesley Share, Finance Director
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041423_FoundingDonor_C]

clean_body: [] Hi friend, Wesley Share here, Kirsten Engel's Finance Director. This week, we launched our campaign, and I wanted to update you on our progress. Here's the great news: we've already had a tremendous outpouring of grassroots support since our announcement. Last year, everyone underestimated our campaign. But thanks to our incredible network of small dollar donors, we were able to fight back — and Kirsten only lost by a tiny margin. We showed that folks in Southern Arizona actually want leaders who fight for our basic freedoms and stand up for working families. Here's the reality check: Kirsten's opponent is backed by corporate PACs, special interests, and the Republican establishment. This is going to be an extremely tough, extremely competitive race. We're going to be fighting a lot of outside spending from groups who don't want to see this seat flipped blue. Kirsten is committed to making a better Arizona, but first, we'll need support from folks like you. By becoming a Founding Donor now, you'll help us create a winning campaign early, so we can win this seat in 2024. Can we count on you? Every bit makes a difference! [] CHIP IN NOW [] CHIP IN MONTHLY [] Thanks for being on Team Engel, — Wesley Share, Finance Director [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? | Peter,

Last week, a judge in Texas ruled to enact a nationwide ban on a drug that has been commonly and safely used in abortion procedures for more than 20 years. **If this decision goes into effect, it will impact the ability to safely access reproductive care across the nation.**

Like many of you, I am angry and frustrated at the Republican party’s unrelenting attempts to strip us of our reproductive freedom. _**But I am emboldened and determined to fight back.**_

I know that with a dedicated team of supporters behind me, we can stand up to the Republican party’s extremist agenda and get them out of office. Peter, if we want to protect access to reproductive care, we must stay focused on electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Setting an early foundation is key to making that happen. clean_body: I know that with a dedicated team of supporters behind me, we can stand up to the Republican party’s extremist agenda and get them out of office. | = | Peter, Last week, a judge in Texas ruled to enact a nationwide ban on a drug that has been commonly and safely used in abortion procedures for more than 20 years. If this decision goes into effect, it will impact the ability to safely access reproductive care across the nation. Like many of you, I am angry and frustrated at the Republican party’s unrelenting attempts to strip us of our reproductive freedom. But I am emboldened and determined to fight back. I know that with a dedicated team of supporters behind me, we can stand up to the Republican party’s extremist agenda and get them out of office. = | = | = Here in North Carolina, the Republican Party is following in the same footsteps. Just this month, they introduced a slew of bills, one of which seeks to ban abortion at conception. And with their new veto-proof majority, nothing is stopping them from stripping people of their autonomy. Peter, if we want to protect access to reproductive care, we must stay focused on electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Setting an early foundation is key to making that happen. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. Hey there – I wanted to reach out to personally introduce myself. My name is Alex, and I’m Greg’s Finance Director. It’s so great to meet you!

As the campaign’s Finance Director, I spend my days analyzing our budget to ensure we’ll have the resources we need to reach voters, fend off Republican attacks, and keep Greg in Congress next November.

So you can believe me when I say: None of that will be possible without the support of this grassroots team.

**Greg made a commitment to not accept corporate PAC money.** That means everything we can afford to do – including the number of ads we can run, doors we can knock, and votes we can turn out – is determined by the generosity of people like you.

This is truly a people-powered campaign, so I’m going to need you with us every step.

[**In a toss-up race like ours, early grassroots support will make all the difference. So please, is there any amount you can chip in to our campaign today? A contribution of any size will go a long way toward ensuring we’ll have the resources we need to keep Greg fighting for us in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61799909/401238133/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.14_b1_ah_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWQxZGY3ZS1lY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAr9Ub1-eIxsJhUzoFB8jmV0ko8SPURELiewQz-c59w=)

It’s so great to meet you! | = Hey there – I wanted to reach out to personally introduce myself. My name is Alex, and I’m Greg’s Finance Director. It’s so great to meet you! As the campaign’s Finance Director, I spend my days analyzing our budget to ensure we’ll have the resources we need to reach voters, fend off Republican attacks, and keep Greg in Congress next November. So you can believe me when I say: None of that will be possible without the support of this grassroots team. Greg made a commitment to not accept corporate PAC money. That means everything we can afford to do – including the number of ads we can run, doors we can knock, and votes we can turn out – is determined by the generosity of people like you. This is truly a people-powered campaign, so I’m going to need you with us every step. = | = With gratitude, Alex Alex Hensley Finance Director Greg Landsman for Congress | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. **Crow’s right wing connections are well known** — including bankrolling lavish vacations for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his wife Ginni Thomas, a far-right activist herself.

Last year **Sinema’s PAC received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow** , and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to **return $2,900 to Crow** after he exceeded federal contribution limits.
**Sinema has a long history of hobnobbing with shady, dark money billionaires** — we certainly know she’s more comfortable spending time with that set than with everyday Arizonans.
Time and again Sinema proves she’s more interested in prioritizing the needs of Wall Street and billionaires than her own constituents' needs. **That’s why we’re doing everything we can to get the message out to Arizonans: the 2024 cycle is quickly approaching and it’s going to be a tough one.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: “oh, you’re one of those”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I joined Stephen Colbert earlier this week.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)
When I first got to Congress in 2019, a lobbyist said to me, “oh, you’re one of those.”
_An attractive single-woman I wondered?_ No, he meant one of the new Members who was breaking with tradition and rejecting corporate PAC money. I told the story to Stephen Colbert the other day, **[check it out.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230414-1?refcode=EMAG14_1_COL_20230414_V1_F&refcode2=21189_3422442_ZxKG7G&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230414-1?refcode=EMAG14_1_COL_20230414_V1_F&refcode2=21189_3422442_ZxKG7G&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)
After meeting that guy, I decided not to take lobbyist money either. **I’m one of less than a dozen House members who has made that decision.**
I’m proud to run a grassroots powered campaign, and so appreciative that you’re on our team. Your donation will help prove that we don’t need lobbyists or corporate PACs to run a winning campaign. **[Can you contribute today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230414-1?refcode=EMAG14_1_COL_20230414_V1_F&refcode2=21189_3422442_ZxKG7G&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230414-1?refcode=EMAG14_1_COL_20230414_V1_F&refcode2=21189_3422442_ZxKG7G&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)**
Thanks a ton!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG14_1_COL_20230414_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21189_3422442_ZxKG7G&akid=21189%2E3422442%2EZxKG7G)**
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: don't miss this new tax billionaires sticker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

With tax day around the corner, Bernie is
battling the billionaires to make them pay their fair share. As Bernie
says, it’s absurd that oligarchs pay less than teachers, baristas, and the
rest of the working class.

It’s not rocket science, we need to tax the rich and invest in education,

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230414_charleskick_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230414_charleskick_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230414_charleskick_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230414_charleskick_logo]Hi there,
Last week, Lisa sent you an email about losing her husband, Charles Rochester, to sudden complications from blood clots that went to his heart and lungs.
Now, she’s more dedicated than ever to raising awareness and recognizing March as Deep Vein Thrombosis and Pulmonary Embolism Awareness Month.
Her email below tells more of the story. Give it a read and then, if you haven’t already, add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor today. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/T237LVMs0EabR0SLIgiXcA2]
Thanks so much,
All of us on Team Lisa
------------------ORIGINAL MESSAGE------------------
Hello.
Nearly a decade ago, I lost my husband, Charles Rochester, to sudden complications from blood clots that went to his heart and lungs.
He was a healthy man in his early 50s who kept a vegetarian diet and worked out every morning. One day, he ruptured his Achilles tendon playing basketball before a business meeting with his colleagues. A few weeks later, he passed away.
Why am I telling you this?
When I decided to step up and run for office for the very first time ever, it was on the anniversary of his passing.
I made that decision with the knowledge that I didn’t know how to run a campaign. I had never done it before.
Looking back on that first campaign in 2016, I realize I was in mourning. As I traveled up and down our state, people shared their stories of challenge and triumph with me. They inspired me and gave me the motivation to keep going.
I’m just as inspired by Delawareans today as I was then, and I’m so grateful for the hope and healing they unknowingly gave me. It’s why I plan to continue to be an advocate and a fighter.
The reality is that many deaths from blood clots are preventable. Because of my own experience and the countless stories I’ve heard on the campaign trail, I’m spearheading a bipartisan effort in Congress to raise awareness and recognize March as Deep Vein Thrombosis and Pulmonary Embolism Awareness Month.
It would mean so much to me if you could be a part of this effort. Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/T237LVMs0EabR0SLIgiXcA2]
Thank you,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230414_charleskick_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Following up on the annual fund -- we haven't heard from you, Peter
body:
__Environmental protection in serious jeopardy. |
---

|
Peter -- earlier this week, we reached out about our 2023 Annual Fund. I'm following up because we haven't heard back from you yet -- and I really hope we will.

Here's why: right now, congressional negotiations on a massive budget deal are heating up. Without a deal, the government could go into default, giving Republicans a window to attempt to sneak giveaways to the fossil fuel industry into the must-pass deal.

**Your contribution helps ensure they don 't succeed.** We need to be running an intense environmental pressure campaign all the way until this bill passes, Peter -- but that only happens with your help.

The best thing you can do right now is to chip in to LCV's 2023 Annual Fund Drive. We're calling on our members to help us reach our critical fundraising goal.****

[Can you chip in to support our 2023 Annual Fund Drive and bring us closer to our goal? I hope we can count on your support during this critical time. Please make a gift of just $5 to power our campaign to stop Republicans from gutting environmental protections.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

Republicans showed their hand a few weeks ago when the House passed H.R.1 -- a bill dubbed the "Polluters Over People Act."

The bill was their _number one legislative priority_ and included a massive increase in oil and gas drilling. More dangerous pipelines. Deep cuts to clean energy investments. And it gutted the power of communities to push back on projects that would expose their communities to pollution -- while blocking President Biden from being able to intervene.

This bill will not move in the Senate, but with budget negotiations looming, **we expect Republicans to attempt to force many of those same handouts to Big Oil execs into the deal.**

| | **
** **LCV 2023 ANNUAL DRIVE**

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Campaign Giving Status: [PENDING -- GIVE NOW >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

Deadline: April 30, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $45,000

[DONATE TODAY >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-) |
---|---|---

**We won 't let Congress gut environmental protections without a fight, Peter.** We're gearing up for a massive pressure campaign, demanding that Senate Democrats and President Biden hold the line and refuse to support a budget deal that includes anti-environmental poison pills.

Our campaign is making a real difference, Peter. Moderates in the Senate are hearing from environmentalists like you and thinking twice about any deal that would sacrifice the health of our environment and our communities for the sake of compromise with extreme MAGA Republicans.

**We _need_ to keep our campaign going in order to hold the line in the Senate. **But whether we can do that depends on support from our members. Without your support, our campaign can't work.********

[We're counting on environmentalists like you to chip in to our campaign to stop Republicans' anti-environmental agenda. Please make a gift today to help us reach our 2023 Annual Fund goal. Even $5 helps when you give today.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

I know that we can win with you in our corner. Thanks for everything that you do for our environment.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9403855&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcyMDM1NDI4MwS2&spReportId=MTcyMDM1NDI4MwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9403855&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcyMDM1NDI4MwS2&spReportId=MTcyMDM1NDI4MwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_) |

body:

Hi Peter,

Last month, you helped us close out the first quarter of 2023 with strength. It was our first opportunity this year to show the strength of our grassroots campaign as we prepare for another tough race, and I’m so appreciative of the support you showed our team.

But our fundraising can’t slow down for even a second. In 2022, Republicans spent big trying to defeat me, and they came within 4 points of winning. We know the same attacks are coming again ahead of 2024 — in fact, Republicans already named me to their list of top targets going into the next election.

**That means the attacks could start at any moment, and we need to be prepared for whatever comes next.**

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** Republican Politicians are Failing Hoosiers by Embracing NRA, Failing to Take Action on Senseless Gun Violence Days after a mass shooting claimed five lives just across the Ohio River in Louisville, Indiana Republicans are lining up to join the National Rifle Association at its Annual Meetings this weekend in Indianapolis. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Republican Politicians are Failing Hoosiers by Embracing NRA, Failing to Take Action on Senseless Gun Violence Days after a mass shooting claimed five lives just across the Ohio River in Louisville, Indiana Republicans are lining up to join the National Rifle Association at its Annual Meetings this weekend in Indianapolis. Governor Eric Holcomb, Senator Mike Braun and former Vice President Mike Pence are joining former President Donald Trump to speak to the NRA. In addition, Republicans honored NRA CEO Wayne LaPierre and other executives of the State Senate on Tuesday, just one day after the Louisville shooting in a tone-deaf move. While the gun lobby and their allies spend millions to buy-off the GOP and influence elections, Hoosier Democrats are committed to respecting the Second Amendment and protecting Hoosiers by advocating for safe storage laws, red flag laws and other popular measures. Read INDems’ release by . ** Statehouse Republicans Pass Disgraceful Bill Making it Harder for Hoosiers to Vote Instead of making it easier for people to vote, Republicans passed legislation this week that requires elderly Hoosiers and military members to jump through extra hoops to cast a ballot. It seems that they are worried about people in nursing homes or those serving our country overseas committing voter fraud. The legislation includes new restrictions on all forms of remote absentee ballots, including ballots by-mail, military/overseas ballots, traveling board and ballots for those with print disabilities. Simply put, this bill will only make Indiana’s abysmal voter turnout problem worse. Check out INDems’ on the topic for more. ** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Sen. Rodney Pol (Chesterton) passed legislation unanimously this week out of the Senate to bar law enforcement from lying to minors as part of an interrogation. The bill now goes to Gov. Holcomb for his signature. After passing the Senate, Pol : "With the passage of SB 415, we will protect juveniles from providing law enforcement with false confessions because they were given intentionally false information. This legislation also aims to build more trust in the criminal justice system among our young people." **** Counter Events to the NRA Meetings Saturday, April 15, 9:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m. ET: The “Body Count” protest will take place downtown at Hudnut Commons as a counter to the NRA’s meetings. Gun violence is now the leading cause of death among young people. Join protesters in remembering those who have been taken by gun violence. Find more details and Saturday, April 15, 11:00 a.m. ET: Join gun safety advocates at the Indy Reads bookstore for an educational event. Browse the book selection, and meet with others looking to make a difference. Sunday, April 16, 9:30 a.m. ET: Local gun safety leaders will hold the In Their Shoes Memorial on the Circle at the Christ Church Cathedral. Join them as they remember each life lost to gun violence locally in 2023. Upcoming Candidate Trainings ** Monday, April 17, 1-2 p.m. ET: “How to Connect with Voters Through Personal Stories”: Learn how sharing personal stories on the campaign trail can make a crucial difference in connecting with voters. In addition, learn tips on how to craft your story for the trail. Register by Tuesday, April 18, 1-2 p.m. ET: “How to Write Your Stump Speech”: Hear why you should craft a stump speech and what a successful stump speech looks like for your campaign. Register by Allen County Democrats Hosting Multiple April Events Allen County Democrats are organizing and hosting multiple events throughout April. On Saturday, join State Sen. Andrea Hunley for a breakfast meeting. On Wednesday, , come grab a seat at the ACDP Luncheon Club at Cosmos Restaurant. And there’s even more – See all of ACDP’s upcoming events by . 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! INDems IN the News Gary Crusader: FOX 59: Indiana Public Media: FOX 59: WFYI: ABC News: WVPE: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WANE: WSBT: NBC News: Opportunities with INDems** To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. name: Interesting Facts

body:
We know $1 sounds small, but it adds up. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61802347/401246678/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230414_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmYzYWM2Zi1mMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vDgiwl9DIyFlXHhnPbgMtN54blurqlKHIwELuR5d24=&emci=1344e266-f2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=76f3ac6f-f2da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Folks, grassroots support of even just $1 at a time can add up to make a powerful difference in Martin’s work to create a better future for New Mexico and our country. Right now, he is hard at work in the Senate to defend and expand important benefits like SNAP and Medicaid, conserve our wildlife and public lands, and advance policies to electrify America. While Martin is focused on delivering results in the Senate, our campaign team is focused on delivering strong fundraising numbers so we have the resources to keep him there. **That's why we're reaching out ahead of our mid-month deadline. We're only one day away, so we’re asking:[Will you pitch in $1 — just four quarters! — to support Martin and our work to defend the Democratic Senate Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61802349/401246680/1960715033?amount=1&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230414_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmYzYWM2Zi1mMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vDgiwl9DIyFlXHhnPbgMtN54blurqlKHIwELuR5d24=)** | [CHIP IN $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61802351/401246682/1960715033?amount=1&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230414_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmYzYWM2Zi1mMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vDgiwl9DIyFlXHhnPbgMtN54blurqlKHIwELuR5d24=)

Look, we know $1 may seem like a small amount. But it adds up when the next person gives $1, and the next, and so on. Your support will build a foundation of resources to help us hire staff, reach voters, and more. Thanks for all you do.
— Team Heinrich

Peter,
As a member of my team, I wanted to give you an update on our progress so far. Thanks to the support of dedicated individuals like you, we have made significant strides toward achieving our goals.

As you know, we have been working hard to ensure that our community has access to their children's education, less government overreach, and good-paying jobs. I am proud to say that we have made great strides in all of these areas.

But, our work is far from over. We need to continue pushing forward and fighting for the changes that our community deserves. That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

clean_body: | | | | View Your Message Peter, As a member of my team, I wanted to give you an update on our progress so far. Thanks to the support of dedicated individuals like you, we have made significant strides toward achieving our goals. As you know, we have been working hard to ensure that our community has access to their children's education, less government overreach, and good-paying jobs. I am proud to say that we have made great strides in all of these areas. But, our work is far from over. We need to continue pushing forward and fighting for the changes that our community deserves. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. | Thank you again for your support. With your help, we can continue making progress and building a better future for our community. Best regards, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

# About Nancy

Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. **[Every day our conservative values are under attack...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c552b145457d407f88d8d336f98db0bb&_e=x73I8odNXH5eiSjWsIlFzUV63tt_6KZLpOvoooJKNGGBtz3DuvcD9uAPyArxMBSorN3nnbRSsH7b96Bx8ThGUTvGraau7ZBMakf0uKA-1cqKNZQcG9Z9gaO0Wl4s1_BWjyuMs460uZY7c5vtN33f5V1uE8iMk2CIMBN65vB0y8lbpZO5N0vXvuy9QIN4okAo_v4sL2kaZPUJa8tbzi4wVF8Xht-DdDtfSv_MTGT88IQehdNU3n9RcsmA8YeKtZhBy18mThhmadrFUwDPDVKaf3xbAYJEDsNQqopFPfxJ3spSz9VNVHTY_hG23R6s0ZXEueY4P604wPJBYAA-WLDA0sGpkBziAFj1_k_CYBnx9xFkjD7syMj04SkXJaxT29VSy-FUFb5qmGGPBCdsEZiSSQ%3D%3D)**

Just look at the past few years under total Democrat control:

* Our economy has crumbled, and Americans are paying _**more**_ for everyday essentials to live.
* Our children are being used as political pawns and parents have no say in their children’s education.
* Woke culture is becoming the norm – with major companies forcing employees and customers to conform to their radical ideas.
* The war on American energy is evident, with China and other foreign countries continuing to be a _**major**_ threat.

**Under the Democratic stronghold, our conservative way of life is being chipped away.**

**[We need a strong team of Conservative warriors on hand to fight back,_and I’m leading the charge._](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c552b145457d407f88d8d336f98db0bb&_e=x73I8odNXH5eiSjWsIlFzUV63tt_6KZLpOvoooJKNGGBtz3DuvcD9uAPyArxMBSorN3nnbRSsH7b96Bx8ThGUTvGraau7ZBMakf0uKA-1cqKNZQcG9Z9gaO0Wl4s1_BWjyuMs460uZY7c5vtN33f5V1uE8iMk2CIMBN65vB0y8lbpZO5N0vXvuy9QIN4okAo_v4sL2kaZPUJa8tbzi4wVF8Xht-DdDtfSv_MTGT88IQehdNU3n9RcsmA8YeKtZhB0rKPkFClYkfwHq6IcoREwvqYVCTF_pCch4y_HwRnGrJAzwOBbPBc7MmzAYAUHSj74_4YiZvJJu1TJUHmgiCQ0uXcjLSA8aCbvunGvE0VfhavlVEiJU7MrG9dBrTdCrYjhgevHlt3hTHNg4zHlk87IA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: They are willing to waste millions of dollars of taxpayers' money on frivolous investigations and trials.| | | Peter, did you see my most recent Fox News interview? I’m doing everything I can to expose Alvin Bragg’s indictment of President Trump for what it is—another political witch hunt. | | | | FIRST , the phony Russia investigation was launched because of Democrat misinformation that dragged on for years. THEN , it was two ridiculous and drawn-out impeachments that never had a chance of succeeding. NOW , it’s a laughably weak political prosecution and show trial of President Trump. Democrats have repeatedly shown that they are willing to waste millions of taxpayers’ dollars on frivolous investigations and trials against their political enemies, but they have no interest in prosecuting actual murderers and criminals. That's why I am reaching out to you today to ask for your support. We MUST** send a strong message to the Democrats that their endless political prosecutions and abuse of power will NOT be tolerated. With your help, we can fight back and defend our country from the left’s weaponization of government.** | | | | Thank you, Claudia Tenney | Peter, thank you for standing with Claudia. She has always fought to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York and the American people, such as... → Founding the Election Integrity Caucus → Defeating Unconstitutional Concealed Carry Laws → Calling for Joe Biden’s Impeachment → Demanding Accountability from the FBI If you’d like to go that extra mile for Claudia, you can support her fight with a or at our . | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | . |

body:
Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv6KuMAU__H8rNsILAswo_rbD-3sDSFhnLGdFTnBqrsMf-9gvRsi2qFxvAuhoqCFY5fnyID4GfbhvnTajksE5KSiamralA3s7ARNOL1CV5cMCMwqz-VgQM0mSOCmGnrhGbSJc-1GM4Tw4LKfb5MWsudkaqKAH6ivOOmCU5jqvi87Ud6OWi9at9koATgrxvogEp/3vc/EOAvv9F7QUiiHMtyNMe7FQ/h0/4HFDkmE82TOyJCHSTHE1ql-P64Mk3kGHmhd7iFAu8tg)

Friend, As the top provider of military funding to Israel, the U.S. has helped perpetuate Israel’s apartheid regime and ongoing massacres of Palestinians -- including last week’s bombs on Gaza. This year marks 75 years of an ongoing Nakba, or catastrophe, for the Palestinian people. Ethnic cleansing, forced displacement, and violent dehumanization created the Israeli state in 1948 and continues today. That’s why I introduced a resolution to recognize the Nakba and to support the implementation of Palestinian refugees’ rights as enshrined by the United Nations. And it’s why I continue to demand the U.S. stop sending billions of dollars in military aid to Israel. **Since the U.S. government funds these apartheid atrocities, we’re uniquely situated to hold the Israeli government accountable to international humanitarian law.** Unfortunately, instead of condemning Israel’s human rights abuses, many Democrats and Republicans in Congress have condemned me for shining a spotlight on these abuses. Meanwhile, legislators across the country are cracking down on pro-Palestinian activism.
