From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Thu, Apr 13, 2023
Subject: the U.S. government funds Israeli apartheid:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
After recent violent raids on West Bank villages, the Israeli armed forces did it again. They attacked Palestinians at a holy site during Ramadan and then bombed the captive refugee population in Gaza.
**For multiple days last week, the violent Israeli forces wounded and arrested hundreds of Palestinian worshippers at the Al Aqsa mosque** —which is situated in illegally occupied Palestine. They completely destroyed the medical clinic and prevented medics from entering.
**Then, the military fired bombs on Gaza, where millions of Palestinians are trapped and suffering under a years-long blockade that prevents critical access to life-sustaining necessities.** The bombs damaged a children’s hospital, terrifying the patients and traumatizing nearby families.
To be clear: U.S. taxpayers are funding these horrific human rights abuses against Palestinians. **The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel.**
Recently I met with Dr. Abu-Jamei of the Gaza Community Mental Health Program, who let me know about how almost all Gazan children experience anxiety and depression after years of trauma. And outside of Gaza, Palestinians also endure daily trauma living under the illegal military occupation.
**As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I understand the urgency of ending U.S. complicity in the Israeli apartheid regime.**
**Our President as well as every single one of my colleagues in Congress should also be calling this horrific violence out. Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up.**
We need to keep the spotlight and the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized—and we need leaders who will sustain this push.

clean_body: Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up. | | | Friend, As the top provider of military funding to Israel, the U.S. has helped perpetuate Israel’s apartheid regime and ongoing massacres of Palestinians -- including last week’s bombs on Gaza. This year marks 75 years of an ongoing Nakba, or catastrophe, for the Palestinian people. Ethnic cleansing, forced displacement, and violent dehumanization created the Israeli state in 1948 and continues today. That’s why I introduced a resolution to recognize the Nakba and to support the implementation of Palestinian refugees’ rights as enshrined by the United Nations. And it’s why I continue to demand the U.S. stop sending billions of dollars in military aid to Israel. Since the U.S. government funds these apartheid atrocities, we’re uniquely situated to hold the Israeli government accountable to international humanitarian law. Unfortunately, instead of condemning Israel’s human rights abuses, many Democrats and Republicans in Congress have condemned me for shining a spotlight on these abuses. Meanwhile, legislators across the country are cracking down on pro-Palestinian activism. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together, we can achieve justice for all people. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Thu, Apr 13, 2023 Subject: the U.S. government funds Israeli apartheid: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, After recent violent raids on West Bank villages, the Israeli armed forces did it again. They attacked Palestinians at a holy site during Ramadan and then bombed the captive refugee population in Gaza. For multiple days last week, the violent Israeli forces wounded and arrested hundreds of Palestinian worshippers at the Al Aqsa mosque —which is situated in illegally occupied Palestine. They completely destroyed the medical clinic and prevented medics from entering. Then, the military fired bombs on Gaza, where millions of Palestinians are trapped and suffering under a years-long blockade that prevents critical access to life-sustaining necessities. The bombs damaged a children’s hospital, terrifying the patients and traumatizing nearby families. To be clear: U.S. taxpayers are funding these horrific human rights abuses against Palestinians. The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel. Recently I met with Dr. Abu-Jamei of the Gaza Community Mental Health Program, who let me know about how almost all Gazan children experience anxiety and depression after years of trauma. And outside of Gaza, Palestinians also endure daily trauma living under the illegal military occupation. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I understand the urgency of ending U.S. complicity in the Israeli apartheid regime. Our President as well as every single one of my colleagues in Congress should also be calling this horrific violence out. Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up. We need to keep the spotlight and the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized—and we need leaders who will sustain this push. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting by my side for Palestinian safety and liberation. Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. | Peter,

You read that right.

Recently, Florida Republican Governor Ron DeSantis signed a 6-week abortion ban – _**an incredibly restrictive, dangerous law.**_

Now, **DeSantis is visiting Virginia** , where our own Republican governor has said he wants to roll back essential reproductive rights. That’s why I was just on Morning Joe to talk about what a sobering reminder this is of what’s at stake in our country and why it’s so important we regain our Democratic House majority in 2024 and codify a woman’s right to privacy and abortion access at the federal level.

Without it, _**Republicans across the country – and in Congress – will continue to introduce dangerous bills just like the one DeSantis signed into law.**_

I will continue to be a strong advocate for reproductive rights here in Virginia and nationwide. clean_body: We must do all we can to stop Republicans from restricting abortion access any further, and I’m counting on your support to make sure I can continue that mission. | = | Peter, You read that right. Recently, Florida Republican Governor Ron DeSantis signed a 6-week abortion ban – an incredibly restrictive, dangerous law. Now, DeSantis is visiting Virginia , where our own Republican governor has said he wants to roll back essential reproductive rights. That’s why I was just on Morning Joe to talk about what a sobering reminder this is of what’s at stake in our country and why it’s so important we regain our Democratic House majority in 2024 and codify a woman’s right to privacy and abortion access at the federal level. Without it, Republicans across the country – and in Congress – will continue to introduce dangerous bills just like the one DeSantis signed into law. I will continue to be a strong advocate for reproductive rights here in Virginia and nationwide. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We must do all we can to stop Republicans from restricting abortion access any further, and I’m counting on your support to make sure I can continue that mission. = | = With sincere appreciation, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1ed36bed7dd4bc5828a5f9e518bcc90&_e=3SceQyvN3nsUdcgRXdMYeUAuwcKMb3_hZpKxeVNu8YA9lW5zwU6bxvlP6n5il8s8kwHh51WagPCoaAbzkm-fLhTofGljpeAdY-9gQ7viWdH2rsaKBOVpw6oRzIf4RmyrS92jnJ3sipMC9xqm7MVAfH0Sm9_giIm-s8cph0_UBqXp3eg0pgHHf3m6MlzDATGE2OPGzNnJT5nBK2STVnJ7c1va5iGmV7JIVzGm-IPZnUcbjyo0hdcha_f7er5wisnqJFJuQOuhWH961IeFNf21uw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1ed36bed7dd4bc5828a5f9e518bcc90&_e=3SceQyvN3nsUdcgRXdMYeUAuwcKMb3_hZpKxeVNu8YA9lW5zwU6bxvlP6n5il8s8kwHh51WagPCoaAbzkm-fLhTofGljpeAdY-9gQ7viWdH2rsaKBOVpw6oRzIf4Rmyr6sqgn3iP1ABTz4eJ6Ceg6M2Hxkb_uYNMpF0hSj6jgfuQ0yieW6wP7-WgWsAZKV7Aj6ltsrR7xoperSn3nmrotaVrG2xjg7xnrtL3G8epflM7Ci1wyrmrnv9rSYTXfpx-cTDYyRVPADcPksW5mK2a-w%3D%3D)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6b606df48744132bdd791c06de460a1&_e=FhE1Q51c9csgusBWYqO7n-D3ojctrxbb52XC-LLG7SzGC3Vhy1unedryDWLzCESCiRYz7KYjIY_EqwfUWo9ongbzPIxdzWSppL-N1jQdIZDQv53cfqCY6xa3Jbah6jStfHv9wjEvSpjyodWcBXjIne4atMymhUb-eTIPYhPq4M4kPxr6m7JW76_ww4mKia9bTinW_qL-ZhJuE3nat776HTSuPSt-wYfH82XPbT60LkwyPX2KfZSrBvuezsRsMxJJfMgPgkuM7ZeqXYeX3jlX4bM-bNZKTck_YBDV_NOwlPmyQ4lPeb1wwyU3eJJHupMAiMj6_k-e-Dc0pmwE6qYF_vuCgiu_ABArjwpXErg2E34Ess4B0O75q1Co-kVpJo_7Ca9fv1zwXKcttAKP0A28jjJCFBAbMTc6THURA3hEvEQ%3D) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus_--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6b606df48744132bdd791c06de460a1&_e=FhE1Q51c9csgusBWYqO7n-D3ojctrxbb52XC-LLG7SzGC3Vhy1unedryDWLzCESCiRYz7KYjIY_EqwfUWo9ongbzPIxdzWSppL-N1jQdIZDQv53cfqCY6xa3Jbah6jStfHv9wjEvSpjyodWcBXjIne4atMymhUb-eTIPYhPq4M4kPxr6m7JW76_ww4mKia9bTinW_qL-ZhJuE3nat776HTSuPSt-wYfH82XPbT60LkwyPX2KfZSrBvuezsRsMxJJfMgPgkuM7ZeqXYeX3jlX4YZS4hs8q-erXzufoxbv4KObT5r9W42d3ljgbfhcT7Flg6V2MVhNxKfY9tk8i1rM63yy5meN1h4YptPjqLbXNmpIpkLuToHgiDvVX8rJVWtgnXAudyd1_mA_f4WLp_odhPJISi1he3u0Jk_wwoFD15A%3D) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. ** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. ** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _ The New York Times_' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will... **
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our "Liberty Walk." The cards are a thank you for your support. ** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6b606df48744132bdd791c06de460a1&_e=FhE1Q51c9csgusBWYqO7n-D3ojctrxbb52XC-LLG7SzGC3Vhy1unedryDWLzCESCiRYz7KYjIY_EqwfUWo9ongbzPIxdzWSppL-N1jQdIZDQv53cfqCY6xa3Jbah6jStfHv9wjEvSpjyodWcBXjIne4atMymhUb-eTIPYhPq4M4kPxr6m7JW76_ww4mKia9bTinW_qL-ZhJuE3nat776HTSuPSt-wYfH82XPbT60LkwyPX2KfZSrBvuezsRsMxJJfMgPgkuM7ZeqXYeX3jlX4Stoh0JNuSAy9OoRM2dd0vW-PpKw7NBvNKKKDZpSxDwjetk2bqcKPofyvuBumktyAJs6y-h_amKuYeeg0MdCOcxFqD8B3fgWshwl2hdAj_1C0l202nPMIi03jmUOSoZhrMtGK1nLRBT4eTrTNCoRISM%3D) After receiving your notecards, I hope you'll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale's many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty --no matter the cost. ** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include George Washington and Thomas Jefferson ... Abraham Lincoln and Frederick Douglass ... Winston Churchill , Margaret Thatcher , and Ronald Reagan. All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times ' "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of Imprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope." Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our "Liberty Walk." The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you'll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale's many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times ' "1619 Project." It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty --no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why on Tuesday, April 11th, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate. I[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyEcLkDdY47xhoL8IOB-VnCqbcT2Mcs4RXzx6r5m8iPKFle2y1ahBCL2cjqchmOVmjby-0X-VG5fpyAsZ4xVyeBKeytiQt7ImaTV4DdRp0bwylpY1Z2OVfdJSdH0-SKvA9RIZZAtjTqHAbelwxi89l2Q%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJySsUcqdVTBq_Ewtjox0Nmjc3GJfeVOxnnTuWwDWYKm85gN5P-MRz5IBLQOydeznTP3pDEef0dsMMdC_G6YZjnmpyrxHTOSEEED1FNWY59wImLh07Y-W9Fgf0Dp4DQLznFuc7rQsuyk-V_Ryqj09IWbw%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJy0pp4b5KERJQ40xWJByh-sszTB16LMe52lNOac6Q_TmsF8x7SyBsBUsyG-vbHT85UohtF-0iy295w6zx2bfASGjys0B2AnmTceAGkLCuNeImjLtO-qlS3-GnqckkVH9rjnC-bsuWQaVLP9gj9Q70AXQ%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why on Tuesday, April 11th, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyZ-yEr_euJbzG3OSFALVL6VCImcgilJlQEPnM4xusLc7GqD0pouykuqcS1f5CUafHdq9CdAHTxr4AeYQuIajdSsYzuc6R78kOfpa0nPAs9Ey678VZVRpyOVyb02Mbco12cG_NjK25Ij6aDYxlDSTcVA%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJy_eawTPe7_PDSM7Eu6b3zVbjiEmr5Kio9HApA0eXOyI-Cf1gHTPqknP7EUeyipAUfchoSbVfQ3jTFcvVEdokYRSgJBdQWU3l0IPVzop4a0jLBI-7TVlKT1tV5q77Y6k2VvzbB0l4JnW8L7nuJpBRIYg%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyOcFW2Mlac86bA4CwEgAiQ25MDlZJPkeIcxV42D-AMEOvZiA302pAFF_T_yGBJK_vhQtZQEO6rxqbz0fzA15wbVKlCaQKKImdUQ_87LX1-boY1oq9c8shxLpHz1kGZR1qcpZm6avXZuLNjuj9XaSvOg%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyCUb7jWRAF_XywsJS54kgoK4mSZUDqQMnzkhZ2nbNIx5rwNOJd9HyBuCSyyC3vEbhbYf0fkBh2eaGFVWN7IBeMJhsD3ULatGKVACaG9Zxql5EUsGgp8WFvC891DCXKvnxpTicQwYj_hfRqdf047Dqnw%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJy0SdE_wpqNYj0g_rHC3CqD-pxyiGWxRMS7X47qKwpMik4VsgNtalQ1tcB7J5w7JTtji-WporTYdpt_L2dGxVd0zH6NXlIBPh5RUPB9yICwheCmZ1Z-UIloe5CzIHVMHeIzPOymnDQiVt3gAdkH6Fohw%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyGemOGcVwAEhHj9AFnHyLbwLOL4nU4NIIkluxAYF7eiOporjgFBx8BtBOzcjmi7cn_m2KUvRPklPyGvdfJtybqGofBBwq_XM5s4Ypra09G3LgBzwRByccLAVm7LLi6eNZywpCRMZcvEpUUflq-MLVfA%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1c75fe9b7783400892bcdf29a3f74e24&_e=spBYUbFmljGvUg0KV3MIAMvH1un1nt8XGHvEg8JN_zG4884zQzq7S_32pEDRAEJ0uzYh4X04tkrR_9kDqCg8vHqDFxLBDVGr5JNpsFVjjSHPsqeF_xpveljsOx4vEHxYcfopMqK7nShaquGcuS9TfYFDJIbjnZsKYxzomjIhPSyReMPQ_4az61Br8vQ6QIj1R8Qnm3dEgZh2TSEcpBhsyieTGA3No3mJXEiUsFkpGpARX7GF82JHBIXc-esiBMJyXBW641RZyU1St3vHnyTtLUYBPHB8C3F4__SzniDHxa5uWnv32DVT-XJqu5zaxfrMJisANtCwQdMfQPvA3F8NX9D83Cwi6zDadz9Z1qMXQJ5JAOltPmWPG2GtmJcLSvj5ifmIaTt2Cx7bQb7bOLTGZA%3D%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb

clean_body: In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why on Tuesday, April 11th, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate. I Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

The TRUTH is: this witch hunt is outright election interference orchestrated by Biden 's cronies to weaponize our justice system and secure him a second term. But what they fail to understand is that our MAGA movement is the most resilient movement in HISTORY. name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: 💥🗳 Here's your need-to-know overview of the primaries: Pt.1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
The power of the people is greater than the people in power| | |
---
Hi Friend, With all that is happening in the news it's easy to get overwhelmed and want to tune it all out. One of the topics that can be confusing, or fly under the radar, is the importance of our local, municipal, and judicial elections. The impact these seats have on our daily lives is enormous — from our children's safety to our property taxes to our very bodily autonomy. For instance, did you know that [PA has the 3rd most banned books nationwide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806007/401257483/1293960524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)? This is a direct impact of school board elections.
The positive news is that we have the power to do something about it! Here at Keystone, our first step is to provide you with a series of short, easily digestible summaries of the election roles and process to get you ready to vote in the May 15th primaries!
---
| | ELECTION BASICS
---
| | **What is a primary election?** A primary election is where each political party determines who will be their candidate to represent them and run for general election. This is where you can make sure that a more progressive candidate is in the running!
---
|
---
**When and How do I register to vote?** The registration deadline for the PA Primaries is **MAY 1ST,** so take a minute to do it asap!It's just a quick, simple form:
---
[English: Register to vote here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806010/401257486/-71211468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
---
[Español: Regístrese para votar aquí ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806013/401257488/-805755570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
---
|
---
**Can I check to see if I'm already registered?** Check your registration status [**here**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806015/401257491/88266837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). You can either use your name and address or a form of state-issued identification.
---
|
---
**Pennsylvania has a closed primary. What does that mean?** A closed primary means that you have to be registered with one of the major political parties (Democrat or Republican) to vote in that parties' primary. This means that people registered as Independents cannot vote for candidates in the primary election.
---
_Exception to this rule_ Anyone registered to vote, regardless of party, can vote on: • Constitutional amendments • Ballot questions • Any special election votes held at the same time as a primary election _* Note: In PA, people registered to vote as Independents are shut out of voting in primary elections._ _In order to have a say in selecting the people who will represent you in the general election,__we encourage you to consider registering for one of the two major political parties_ _(or changing your registration if you're registered as Independent)__._
---
|
---
That's your Primary Primer for today! Next time we'll look at the judicial elections and which seats are open for the Superior Court, Commonwealth Court, and Supreme Court. Don't worry, we won't judge you for not knowing the difference, but after the election they will!
---
| | When people vote for progressive candidates, communities win representatives that fight for our rights. At KPEF, we're [uniting progressives across the spectrum](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806017/401257493/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=) to show up and vote like our democracy depends on it!

---
| [Yes! I support a strong, united progressive movement](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806020/401257496/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=)
---
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806022/401257498/393539709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806025/401257500/1473617521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61806027/401257503/2084364585?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MDcyY2Q2LWZjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B3F2amirMgcxcEqG6H6XE4TETXv83PpCFxjbkva95Mk=&emci=d6cdcfa6-f8d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c5072cd6-fcda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)

Exception to this rule Anyone registered to vote, regardless of party, can vote on: • Constitutional amendments • Ballot questions • Any special election votes held at the same time as a primary election * Note: In PA, people registered to vote as Independents are shut out of voting in primary elections. In order to have a say in selecting the people who will represent you in the general election,we encourage you to consider registering for one of the two major political parties (or changing your registration if you're registered as Independent). | That's your Primary Primer for today! Next time we'll look at the judicial elections and which seats are open for the Superior Court, Commonwealth Court, and Supreme Court. Don't worry, we won't judge you for not knowing the difference, but after the election they will! | | When people vote for progressive candidates, communities win representatives that fight for our rights. At KPEF, we're = to show up and vote like our democracy depends on it! | = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.Keystone Progress Education Fund 354 S Atlantic Ave Pittsburgh, PA 15224 United States

| | **Biden's Disastrous Afghanistan Exit ❌**
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeEVSGqobY6LN1UhCaPDBK1k_GE38_GXnv1TIAdOo-g2WRNrAb_hL9PqIkTGw1zKL6venc3o4yXZoIzOjPSxQZQHdzBB45D1uQ-CNRRtoXXl407HdEvL2jTuhhDJ_ZiMzXirHoZRtEe4p3aCAhmLxOQa4a1ZZFxoO0Mtcd2-vNPg64RQQ8CpAnG8YoTnx-OwfjIjdR7XLR4MoB2WPYEmrnQE%3D "Burchett | Biden Afghanistan Lies")
| | The botched Afghanistan withdrawal will forever be President Biden’s scarlet letter, and this administration’s lack of transparency underscores the fact that they messed up **BIG TIME**. You probably didn’t hear about the 12-page report released last week because they intentionally published it right before Easter weekend. This was a sure-fire attempt to let it fly under the radar—but I won’t let it. 13 brave Americans should be at home with their families. Instead, their families are remembering them at their graves. Tennessee native [Ryan Knauss](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeGWaX6VT5yXbLlQsna-T2dYdWuLbxujPQ7aByqX_THdz1QyPGdUTdAYLttXpiCMY2cqP9vx88GVulEYS_N28rAy0wK8vnNaq5FIGQ6rG-z7NiWevTb-8Xwmk1-uBKF7daDx8ZXI3usWlm3aEp0TY-JBQtb3NPdPfTElrs5wJIxir0uv2atB7cqHhru1xrCjHoZezOS_Hg_zUyy27O7spTxhbNme8oPFpO5z4dVcBAh0IYOou1wChelsPm0zJrylr_a7ygzaqJdrFxesplxJ5DYLmrx55zcn7xu8WswbqlLCQYkasm4RWBfcwzAqxJBkPrA%3D%3D) was one of the 13. He was on his second deployment to Afghanistan when he was killed in the suicide bombing near Kabul airport. Our courageous service members deserved better than the incompetence of the Biden administration, and it’s baffling that they think they can continue to [play the blame game](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeOWK-VYoXOMJhmHa5lIveCjta71L71q3HtiJo9pNQtFDjQJp6nRQq_y0Xjc5o90ABNGP2_fhZfHXbseBJBhwVLqfZnZdUAp8NYcv713uCTfbeIvgctA8OhRGFRaKOkllQKRN5xNaHRg5gHIWrhYa9OV7faB4zeVxbHHSyiZhiH1hy6BYv98BODm85i0x79PdFv81pmXULXsT9Vj_tZTM3mcaLKdvN6i11A9mcbb_SgkP46WUj8ujfc2Mrx_Nkduw-LI1nPYqLyx7dPtYCPdBIro%3D).
So let's hold a mirror up to their failures:
* They failed the thousands of Americans abandoned to fend for [themselves](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeCW1Mjd45-UeXsT9a2m5WJomenH4rtdUyEdqhBKMdpUOhhLnOjYvc9e5GwxfZT4-sNuh5NDmhg1okkdVnt52gH45AgxeZelsmTEtrrjFA42UHNySSmGNDJn7NU3vY-eNLMqK1nLfzMhlJ3l3YuZAdn-j3vQp8zRjsZh9yW4_uQe1VfzTnQub2nx0VMj_0yNG8s9-a-PhIeXZZI4FHzzJnSye3mZwZBms-CcXxRU_TbiWpmDzr5HbE2ti7reMLSwOMw%3D%3D) under Taliban rule.
* They failed our allies who sent soldiers to Afghanistan to support our mission.
* They failed the people of Afghanistan who risked their lives to help us.
* They failed the Americans serving there and we [emboldened](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeFynZXV8xX7Vk8pKzNqXFC1zjm4Ab5fzdl1LjPOrDzPghaPPYnUNFkaL2sUqCwzcig60XmzGgeH-_ND4GCXCS3ML1mHGG0mb9mcNjfb6SXVb7TDNMomHnbJAFSTYlvqwMDfrZiwSleZxa2guNg2UXg1-oGFW7LhKzNpFk3oZmK3bGjR3PGhnpCf_wxRctTZyxD8jSy44HU09wQIl-gaQCyh1P1hPkgikIA9mFoKCqpjvWUwjU9P45dINrANmGjucEg%3D%3D) our enemies like never before.

This fumbled withdrawal was a total disgrace, and I’m confident that Americans like us won’t forget it, no matter how hard the Biden administration tries to [downplay](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeOcyJbielaqVdUw0fzBnW_ua9_RtAdo3_wzcdT1Xue-k6_AqaWh2VQb1kG3swnB8reQOtyN39bsK58ukdW55nL21fyPOgv10SFgE9iNRcOhFIb-EVrj9N1u0Kx4fIiXKPmDbqv3R5SsiWSjADgCmD1XNnjsmk8iOPWcfsuWT-Z186-lGZJPGQVKyXWbHE_ioYQQ4J8vV1hy6KqnsUh63On01jupJttyku8biFhCZmSzR4c2h30xKj1G8Td7NhHtQKdw44gQfpYG9o5YpaEkJzKk%3D) this tragedy.

One of our very own is in the spotlight after being named [champion of the boys 14-15 age bracket](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=89a2861248d84892a92ce191c0070695&_e=AN80uIVtbptz33ZhxnuZeA6HsScZOTIUa49UOFcHndPQSwp0Ij0ioGofzVDDKvusAzfEXTVYMMHJn4D3AEyq_Ki_C1w2IxwrJCInG0lRQuEsWg9QrquxRM5o5G4uhIYn_V0xi6Sm3c08YpUqvekdJn2bcvjqH1JXzq_YaiKMWqsKqSYm7fVaSsX8dEZJ4pKm-CIE9rxiX1tSx-5n78jO4UESvxkb9bt37oFBC6Pk29pBJoXgmHtdQEG3pknZHbiHnA50oJXy5IYkYIJtC4BXuR6nED_WTQy_TQ4qGT-JBPOCaxrqGCqtd-5r7neUQDVW) at the Drive, Chip & Putt National Finals, an initiative of the Masters Tournament. The competition in Augusta, Georgia had 3,000 young entrants from around the country, but 14-year-old Jake Sheffield of Knoxville earned his way to the national finals after winning a regional qualifier.
In the end, he left the iconic golf course as a champion, making all of us in Tennessee proud!
Jake has been golfing since he was just seven years old and has his sights set on the PGA tour one day. I have a good feeling we will see him there sooner rather than later!

name: Team Raquel
subject: 🚨 LUCHA endorses Raquel Terán 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://raquelteran.com/ [https://raquelteran.com/]
We have great news to share -- Living United for Change in Arizona (LUCHA) has proudly endorsed Raquel Terán for Congress!
Led by changemakers fighting for social, racial and economic transformation, LUCHA is an organization committed to human dignity, inclusion, equity and collective growth.
“Terán is a fearless advocate who, for nearly two decades, has been serving communities under attack. She has never shied away from a fight and is ready to serve our communities in Congress...We’re excited to announce our formal endorsement of Raquel Terán for Congressional District 3” said Alejandra Gomez, Executive Director of LUCHA Arizona
Join LUCHA in support of Raquel today by chipping in $5, $10 or $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_041423_Luchaendorsement&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_041423_Luchaendorsement&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_041423_Luchaendorsement&amount=25]
Having LUCHA's support means we're starting this campaign with family. Raquel has dedicated her career to being a strong voice for women, immigrants and working families, and fighting for healthcare for all. With the support of LUCHA and a large coalition that we've already started building, she will continue that fight in Congress.
Team Raquel is counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign. Join LUCHA and support Raquel today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_041423_Luchaendorsement&amount=25]

Team Raquel

Gun safety is a public health crisis. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61807057/401261535/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc4MDhlZC1mZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQZZYBDuUGYv7OQ8W2K9PUjRLQMVV2k8_QnEPwROtoY=&emci=4b1a930d-69d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=777808ed-feda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Gun safety is a public health crisis, and I'm proud to do my part in keeping our families safe. I led an effort requesting $23 million for School Safety National Activities Project Prevent grants, which are designed to help schools in communities experiencing pervasive violence break that cycle. I also co-sponsored bills from the Enhanced Background Check Act of 2023 to the Assault Weapons Ban of 2023 — and more. We need effective legislators willing to work to find bipartisan solutions to gun violence, whether that be closing the bump stock loophole, requiring safe storage, or strengthening red flag laws. **[If you agree that we need to prioritize gun safety, give $20 right now to support my re-election campaign because I've been named one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the House!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61807063/401261538/-1930090685?refcode=E20907-20230413-GunSafety-SL-GunViolence-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc4MDhlZC1mZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQZZYBDuUGYv7OQ8W2K9PUjRLQMVV2k8_QnEPwROtoY=) ** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61807075/401261545/-1930090685?refcode=E20907-20230413-GunSafety-SB-GunViolence-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc4MDhlZC1mZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQZZYBDuUGYv7OQ8W2K9PUjRLQMVV2k8_QnEPwROtoY=)

Our margin of victory could be easily squashed by the slightest of red waves. _That’s why the NRCC has already named me one of their top targets for 2024!_
And our organizing efforts in this battleground district will be critical to keeping Nevada’s Senate seat and the White House blue.

subject: Democrats Pass SB 5599: Assault on Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
This is an assault on parental rights and will drive a wedge between loving parents and their children

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

subject: What is really going on at our border?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress](https://links
body:
Will Biden ever tell the truth?| | | There's chaos at our southern border, friend! Instead of fixing the problem, Biden has resorted to his favorite tactic... lying and blaming Republicans. He recently tweeted "...Republican proposals would slash funding for border security – a move that could allow nearly 900 pounds of fentanyl into our country. We need more resources to secure the border. Not less." _[_But let's look at Biden's actual record..._](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=0d5766997ad24cca83edb1e2f312f9f4&_e=tALsyjfl9iXTrXM6vu4TSBGpnbCDSmzC4wAw8g-osEqmNpX6bH-aKxuNF8F4Tll1taXPgt0JIRjNRkLZjeUpW1TvTKUgaDS0GDzp1mblBGvhb-CtyzsyuQB1ZKOEqdzlzE4ZxR4jRCRk70PkXsVd9k4x-ylvalKR1qFoWUmjb2gjvwIPb7f5LvFt_GbXpqsPVYm9WM9yw0IR1PuqjRpMaLwjyNB3zga_zRd8cNFhdmEjsb3mjLv1ukPUQ2vGuq3o2l2jenE0qayO0qVqSGmq6Q%3D%3D)_ Under Joe Biden, the amount of fentanyl caught at the border was up 800% from last year. While over 14,400 pounds (enough to kill every single American twice!) were seized, there's no telling how much MORE fentanyl made it into the country. And, monthly illegal border crossings reached the highest level in recorded history under Joe Biden's watch! Biden is lying about what is really going on at our border. [**Click here to find out what's really going on.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=0d5766997ad24cca83edb1e2f312f9f4&_e=tALsyjfl9iXTrXM6vu4TSBGpnbCDSmzC4wAw8g-osEqmNpX6bH-aKxuNF8F4Tll1taXPgt0JIRjNRkLZjeUpW1TvTKUgaDS0GDzp1mblBGt4vi40w0nx6aI7A7tnNnywmci8AEHvB0Tsb2n8WAjWfk18BFrW7UkZDiNV-aSCvHLYKX2M3h_Q1SfAQss5LJQ8PQEJiXp8YRPXCWaErEP1b9U8EbA28JRth0uV3Kt-yONBLbhLw5RJQNQPyUBTcdnXL-s5yFwEq_QvvqZQ6s8J3w%3D%3D)

clean_body: Will Biden ever tell the truth?| | | There's chaos at our southern border, friend! Instead of fixing the problem, Biden has resorted to his favorite tactic... lying and blaming Republicans. He recently tweeted "...Republican proposals would slash funding for border security – a move that could allow nearly 900 pounds of fentanyl into our country. We need more resources to secure the border. Not less." Under Joe Biden, the amount of fentanyl caught at the border was up 800% from last year. While over 14,400 pounds (enough to kill every single American twice!) were seized, there's no telling how much MORE fentanyl made it into the country. And, monthly illegal border crossings reached the highest level in recorded history under Joe Biden's watch! Biden is lying about what is really going on at our border. The security of America is at stake as long as the left continues to ignore the insanity taking place at our southern border. Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: ShariceForCongress.com
subject: we need a well-run postal system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Sharice knows the importance of a well-run postal system. It’s necessary for seniors to receive their prescriptions, families to receive their packages, and voters to receive their ballots.

**[We’re calling on Louis DeJoy to do his job and stop undermining the USPS. If you’re with us, add your name here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61809875/401266369/-728630520?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230414_PT_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_usps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjI3ZDIwOC0wMWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjBZGhTXxvmCK9IGfaLxcfRh-whbZi_wBDQH30rgolw=&emci=c9cbdcca-feda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1227d208-01db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Hi,

The USPS is one of the most important federal agencies in our nation. That’s why I’m working with Democrats and Republicans to hold the USPS accountable when mail delivery is slow or delayed in Kansas.

Last year, I voted for bipartisan legislation that would improve the USPS, but so far, Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has failed to implement many of the legislation’s provisions.

**A reliable and efficient USPS is necessary for seniors to receive their prescriptions, families to receive their packages, and voters to receive their ballots.**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My first 100 days in office.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x83M4dZJugfYV1qaqFPlv6RqhHUwGp3jx00BzdM94JVAiiWKvLXtSSr7G8RUinwS7_HPOEHFtsBC3bwDWxIOjU0FtmvuuC96aicTrXGdRp4HDJsPwEinq7S2U5aMK7G236k03Y6tkGC52OL5llKiNjLuYO-TRiyTTwu1Q7156Osxc_2xEW6IAj-DcPa182Qi8Xyz19ZDt5I7YxHddg1MM3fWll11KXPuSfVumV1C4Q76rt1fZw-w7cD6v1pPV7B-Hn1razcNQhkMaOIxNJfmXkuvO2wDeCyVH-OPJgKqGZJpAsSKQ0--fBTUm8sMaWaMU/3vc/H0IP5v2pRTqi7Ge3py1GNA/h0/LgROwzmcf2_Wubg5eyPZWm3eqVWjz75CRDAT5eFkhDI)
---
Peter, It’s officially been **100 days** since I was sworn in to represent Illinois’ 17th District in Congress. It’s been a bit of a whirlwind, but _very_ productive, and I wanted to share some stats highlighting the work we’ve done for the people of Central and Northwestern Illinois.
---
| **Legislative Accomplishments**

**So far, I've cast 182 votes in Congress.** This includes supporting measures to protect women's right to choose, create sustainable jobs in our district, and lower home energy costs.

**I've already cosponsored 29 bills.** I'm proud to add my name to good legislation like the _PRO Act,_ which would restore and protect workers' rights to organize in the workplace. I also introduced my own legislation to lower energy costs for working families and block a GOP-led measure that would add a 30% national sales tax on the middle class.
---
---
| **Constituent Services**

Many don't know this, but a _huge_ part of my job includes helping constituents navigate issues they're facing with federal agencies. This includes problems getting passports or securing entitlements like Medicare and veteran benefits.

**So far, we've replied directly to over 4,000 Illinoisans** who've mailed or called our office with questions about federal policy or issues they face.

**Our office has completed 115 constituent cases** \-- that's more than one case for each day I've been in office!

**Local taxpayers have recovered $221,933 in savings** thanks to my team's efforts in resolving issues with the IRS.
---
It’s been the honor of a lifetime to serve my community in Congress. That's credit to your support for getting me there! And while I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished, there’s _a lot_ more to be done here in Congress. **I’m ready to keep fighting for the best interests of Illinois' 17th district and the American people.**

clean_body: | | Peter, It’s officially been 100 days since I was sworn in to represent Illinois’ 17th District in Congress. It’s been a bit of a whirlwind, but very productive, and I wanted to share some stats highlighting the work we’ve done for the people of Central and Northwestern Illinois. | Legislative Accomplishments So far, I've cast 182 votes in Congress. This includes supporting measures to protect women's right to choose, create sustainable jobs in our district, and lower home energy costs. I've already cosponsored 29 bills. I'm proud to add my name to good legislation like the PRO Act, which would restore and protect workers' rights to organize in the workplace. I also introduced my own legislation to lower energy costs for working families and block a GOP-led measure that would add a 30% national sales tax on the middle class. | Constituent Services Many don't know this, but a huge part of my job includes helping constituents navigate issues they're facing with federal agencies. This includes problems getting passports or securing entitlements like Medicare and veteran benefits. So far, we've replied directly to over 4,000 Illinoisans who've mailed or called our office with questions about federal policy or issues they face. Our office has completed 115 constituent cases \-- that's more than one case for each day I've been in office! Local taxpayers have recovered $221,933 in savings thanks to my team's efforts in resolving issues with the IRS. It’s been the honor of a lifetime to serve my community in Congress. That's credit to your support for getting me there! And while I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished, there’s a lot more to be done here in Congress. I’m ready to keep fighting for the best interests of Illinois' 17th district and the American people. I can't thank you enough, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. | Peter,

**I’m running for re-election.**

It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.

**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**

[_**If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Fight for Progress and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61811799/401267479/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230414-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxZGVhYzdiLTAyZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urSvX3AognkWIKcfMfsYiFAGA2qWJD7IWKAGOXIxjMU=)

In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.

Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.

**Peter, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.

But it’s going to take all of us.

[_**Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Fight for Progress today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61811803/401267481/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230414-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxZGVhYzdiLTAyZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=urSvX3AognkWIKcfMfsYiFAGA2qWJD7IWKAGOXIxjMU=) In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.

Thank you,

Bob Casey

name: Team IDCCA
subject: Clawing back democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
What happened in Tennessee perfectly shows why we need to be investing in Democrats all across the nation.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmwMWJ7oUoDvf6_mB2Nc7_Ck1UlM9sM-HIi3Exc6f6Q=/qID-MXp67uiuprtiLKVV202iMbs0RAw9HibY9yRRDKs=?refcode=IDCCAEM_C_230414TNDEMCCA_TEAM_90DO_8_NG_A_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Over the past two weeks, the nation has again witnessed the disturbing reality of the modern Republican Party. In the wake of another tragic school shooting, Tennesseans staged massive protests calling on their legislators to take action to prevent it from happening again.

**Tennessee Republicans responded to this cry for help with an outrageous attack on our democracy. The GOP took the extreme action of expelling the two Black legislators who joined their fellow concerned citizens, stripping their voters of their duly chosen representatives. A third White legislator who joined in calling for remedy, herself, narrowly missed being expelled by the out of control GOP.**

This is a shocking and unprecedented action.

Republicans throughout the country have amped up their efforts to circumvent our democracy and undermine the rule of law, but what can we do here in Illinois?

We can support our sister organization, the Tennessee Democratic County Chairs' Association (TDCCA)!

TDCCA is our partner, fighting back against the GOP extremists and supporting those expelled Democratic legislators. Like the IDCCA, the TDCCA is working tirelessly to build stronger County Parties, elect Democrats, and defend democracy.

With a little bit of assistance, the TDCCA has a chance to flip several seats needed to break the GOP supermajority. We are stepping up our efforts to help make that happen.

**[Refuse to just stand idly by and join us in backing our sister organization. Chip in $10 or more to the TDCCA right now and defend democracy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmwMWJ7oUoDvf6_mB2Nc7_Ck1UlM9sM-HIi3Exc6f6Q=/qID-MXp67uiuprtiLKVV202iMbs0RAw9HibY9yRRDKs=?refcode=IDCCAEM_C_230414TNDEMCCA_TEAM_90DO_8_NG_A_L1&amount=10)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmwMWJ7oUoDvf6_mB2Nc7_Ck1UlM9sM-HIi3Exc6f6Q=/qID-MXp67uiuprtiLKVV202iMbs0RAw9HibY9yRRDKs=?refcode=IDCCAEM_C_230414TNDEMCCA_TEAM_90DO_8_NG_A_B1&amount=10)
Thank you,

Team IDCCA

clean_body: What happened in Tennessee perfectly shows why we need to be investing in Democrats all across the nation. Fellow Democrats, Over the past two weeks, the nation has again witnessed the disturbing reality of the modern Republican Party. In the wake of another tragic school shooting, Tennesseans staged massive protests calling on their legislators to take action to prevent it from happening again. Tennessee Republicans responded to this cry for help with an outrageous attack on our democracy. The GOP took the extreme action of expelling the two Black legislators who joined their fellow concerned citizens, stripping their voters of their duly chosen representatives. A third White legislator who joined in calling for remedy, herself, narrowly missed being expelled by the out of control GOP. This is a shocking and unprecedented action. Republicans throughout the country have amped up their efforts to circumvent our democracy and undermine the rule of law, but what can we do here in Illinois? We can support our sister organization, the Tennessee Democratic County Chairs' Association (TDCCA)! TDCCA is our partner, fighting back against the GOP extremists and supporting those expelled Democratic legislators. Like the IDCCA, the TDCCA is working tirelessly to build stronger County Parties, elect Democrats, and defend democracy. With a little bit of assistance, the TDCCA has a chance to flip several seats needed to break the GOP supermajority. We are stepping up our efforts to help make that happen. subject: SURVEY: will you vote against Ted Cruz next year?
disclaimer_text: paid for by The Real Texas PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25]
Senator Ted Cruz is up for re-election.
In 2018, he won by less than 3%.

Peter – A lot has happened over the last few months here in OH-13, so we want to make sure you’re up to speed on the state of our race.

_**FIRST:**_ Leading non-partisan election forecasters deemed OH-13 as **a pure TOSS-UP race** , meaning our election could come down to only a handful of votes.

_**THEN:**_ Our former opponent,**a Trump-backed, anti-choice, Fox News commentator, filed to challenge Emilia** and run again in 2024 – and she’s more determined than ever to flip this seat red and force her extremist agenda on our community.

_**NOW:**_ Republicans are wasting no time in preparing to attack and unseat Emilia. In fact, **national Republicans just named OH-13 as one of their top targets** for the 2024 election cycle.

It couldn’t be more clear that the election here in **OH-13 will be another ultra-competitive showdown, with the power to determine control of the House Majority. **

[**Peter, with Republicans prepared to throw everything they’ve got at flipping this seat, we need your grassroots support more than ever. name: Cameron - Team Stanton
subject: Do you know a high school or college student looking to get involved?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friends –
I wanted to make sure you saw our last email - our campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This Democratic Fellowship program – founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in a historic partnership with the DCCC – is dedicated to training the next generation of political activists through on the ground campaign work.
As part of this initiative, we are looking for dedicated high school and college students to join our team as Stanton for Congress Fellows! [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Greg_Stanton_Email]
This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a special curriculum designed by Congressman Jamie Raskin, while also organizing on the ground with Greg's campaign here in AZ-04.
The priority deadline to apply is TODAY, April 14th, 2023 . If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email and remind them to select our campaign on the application — they won’t want to miss out!
APPLY NOW → [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Greg_Stanton_Email]
Thank you for your support,
- Cameron, Team Stanton
To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit StantonForArizona.com [https://www.stantonforarizona.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/stantonforarizona [https://www.facebook.com/stantonforarizona] http://twitter.com/gregstantonaz [http://twitter.com/gregstantonaz] https://www.instagram.com/gregstantonaz/ [https://www.instagram.com/gregstantonaz/]
Paid for by Stanton for Congress
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

Arizona has plenty of corrupt, career politicians like David Schweikert. Instead, why don’t we elect a CEO who puts people over profits?

We need your support to elect Helen Gym.
