Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and **we need your support to elect Helen Gym as the mayor to guarantee climate action in the city.**

Climate victories at a local level will not only keep the fossil fuel industry in check, but encourage more climate champions to run for office at every level of government.

[**_Will you contribute $10 today to elect climate champions at every level of government? Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I recently gave an interview with _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ and wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it!

The year between midterm and presidential elections is considered an “off-year” in politics, but I strongly believe _**there is no such thing as an “off-year” for the climate movement.**_

Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role in reducing the city’s fossil fuel consumption, regulating it’s fossil fuel polluters, and taking action against new fossil fuel projects.

We are proud to support climate champion Helen Gym in Philadelphia who has a proven track record of climate action, _**but we can’t elect her without you.**_
[_**Will you contribute $10 today to help us support climate champions in crucial elections in 2023 and beyond?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61816391/401274787/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230414-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZTE3NmE1LTA4ZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0AM_L1rr8MR7ypuAOXcwizpHZGL82FZc8yuLyxYX854=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61816392/401274788/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230414-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZTE3NmE1LTA4ZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0AM_L1rr8MR7ypuAOXcwizpHZGL82FZc8yuLyxYX854=)

By electing climate champions like Helen, **_we set ourselves up to take meaningful climate action at the local level._**

clean_body: We need your support to elect Helen Gym. | We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Jane’s interview with The Philadelphia Inquirer and her important message about why local elections matter. Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and we need your support to elect Helen Gym as the mayor to guarantee climate action in the city. Climate victories at a local level will not only keep the fossil fuel industry in check, but encourage more climate champions to run for office at every level of government. = | = Read more from Jane here: = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I recently gave an interview with The Philadelphia Inquirer and wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it! The year between midterm and presidential elections is considered an “off-year” in politics, but I strongly believe there is no such thing as an “off-year” for the climate movement. Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role in reducing the city’s fossil fuel consumption, regulating it’s fossil fuel polluters, and taking action against new fossil fuel projects. We are proud to support climate champion Helen Gym in Philadelphia who has a proven track record of climate action, but we can’t elect her without you. = | = Philadelphia is home to chemical plants in the surrounding area dumping hazardous waste and polluting clean, drinking water. And this is not just an environmental issue, but a public health and safety one, too. By electing climate champions like Helen, we set ourselves up to take meaningful climate action at the local level. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. New York’s Attorney General, Letitia James, campaigned on a promise to TAKE ME DOWN. Or, as she put it in her own words... “we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” | Now, she’s living up to the promise she made to her donors and left-wing backers by inciting a $250,000,000 witch hunt against yours truly. The Left is hoping that if they bury me in enough witch hunts, I will close down my presidential campaign and let George Soros BUY the White House for Biden for another 4 years. But, let me say it again: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR COUNTRY. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | If Democrats take back control of the House, we can pass crucial legislation, like the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ , to expand voting rights. **But protecting our democracy starts now**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816656/401275645/-743381656?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230414_FR_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDg2ZmY4ZC0wOWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jc6gCgjglXZYZvnfTt_-d_fErnla12LM3MX8xB9D5HE=)

**_[Can you donate $10 today to protect our democracy and our election process in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816657/401275646/-743381656?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230414_FR_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDg2ZmY4ZC0wOWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jc6gCgjglXZYZvnfTt_-d_fErnla12LM3MX8xB9D5HE=)_**

After stripping Americans of their rights, delaying Congressional action to fight amongst themselves, and threatening Social Security for months, Republicans know they are unpopular.

That’s why they are rapidly introducing measures to gut voting access. They do this every election, _but this time it’s different_.

In Wisconsin we had a MAJOR victory when Janet Protasiewicz won her election to the state Supreme Court, marking the first time in 15 years Democrats have control over the court.

Abortion rights and voting rights will be protected in a heavily gerrymandered state.

They lost because they have gone too far by taking away our rights and compromising our electoral process. But the process to win was expensive and we need that effort nationwide.

**From the rustbelt to the south, we have the chance to get every eligible voter to the polls next year. name: Briale Harris
subject: What’s going on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
I’m confused by this.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816912/401276336/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNjMzZi0wYWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mb5xtqNepiTcmfhTsSRIiPwWTW0M6efn03LXxbceab8=&emci=e1a224a0-62d9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c852633f-0adb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

I won’t lie, when I saw how our grassroots team reacted to our donor drive to flip the Georgia legislature, I had a whole lot of hope.

**_That evaporated today._**

We watched donations drop like a rock, and honestly – **_I’M CONFUSED._**

What’s going on? We’ve told you how important it is that we flip the Georgia legislature, but would it help if we told you that donating right now is the most impactful time to pitch in? Would it help to know that establishing an early field presence is critical to reaching the voters that you need to win? Does it help to tell you that hiring a field organizer who can knock on every voter’s door in a district could mean the difference between victory and defeat?

[**_Your donation right now could _NEVER_ be more impactful. So please, help us turn things around and donate right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61816913/401276337/710125701?refcode=20230414.2_BH_4AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNjMzZi0wYWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mb5xtqNepiTcmfhTsSRIiPwWTW0M6efn03LXxbceab8=)_**

Every moment that goes by without fully funding our team is wasted potential.

– Bri

Briale Harris
Finance Director
Democratic Party of Georgia
---

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

**TO: President Joe Biden
FROM: Peter
RE: Your Reelection**
Dear President Biden,

For the last 2 years, you’ve fearlessly led the country out of a pandemic, through Republican extremism, and forward into progress.

**Because of your leadership, we’re all far better off than we were before you became president!**

I wanted to tell you that, despite dishonest Republican attacks, I am 100% with you and I want you to run again in 2024!

[Along with my signature on this letter, I’m chipping in $3 to UniteDemocrats to make sure you make it to another term in the White House with Democratic Majorities in the House and Senate to support your agenda! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61817312/401277876/1898476523?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230414_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkNTQ0ODgxLTBiZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VqF2iNEbHzxf_RSE2Vy3uPnZ4kdiJRvh-oej2CRcH3A=)

Friend -
As you may be aware, a Trump-appointed judge out of Texas recently issued a ruling that would overturn FDA approval for the critical abortion and miscarriage medication mifepristone.
Make no mistake about it, mifepristone has been safe for decades. This is yet another example of an anti-abortion extremist abusing their power. These extremists are coordinated in their attacks which is why we can’t take our access to these rights in Virginia for granted.
Unfortunately, my primary opponent does not seem to agree.
He was a Patron on Amanda Chase’s abortion ban, voted against the Reproductive Health Protection Act, AND failed to show up for an amendment vote that would constitutionally ensure our rights. My opponent has no business serving our district with such a sorry record, and that's one of the many reasons I'm in this race.
I will never jeopardize your right to reproductive health care, and I will fight tooth and nail against any proposed threats to take it away.
If you're with me, please consider immediately donating to our campaign today. We've got a competitive Primary Election coming up this June, and the stakes are too high for us to send my opponent back to the Virginia Senate. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I'm not going away from political or public life anytime soon.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61817455/401278421/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDkxZjU1OC0wY2RiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYS17jaGoFkBM5D_PardGlhl8jfGGaV48rbcGCNh2ok=&emci=3d0b634b-e5da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1091f558-0cdb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Earlier this week, I announced that I have been diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease. I wanted to take a moment to acknowledge all the well-wishes and words of wisdom I've gotten from loved ones, friends, colleagues, and constituents. I know that I'm not facing this alone — and I plan to use my platform to better educate the public about Parkinson's and work in Congress to marshal greater funding for research that will one day help millions of people.

**I want to make something clear: I've got lots of work still to do, and I’m not leaving political or public life anytime soon.**

I'm more determined than ever to fight for greater access to affordable healthcare. It's not lost on me that I have access to doctors and treatments that aren't accessible or affordable to everyone else. And I’m thankful every day that Americans are no longer subjected to lifetime coverage caps, nor can we be kicked off our insurance due to a pre-existing condition. And in light of recent court rulings that have imperiled key provisions of the Affordable Care Act and the availability of medication, it's more important than ever to have people in Congress who will always put the health and well-being of families first.

The past few days have put a lot in perspective. They've reinforced my determination to be the best public servant I can be. Serving in Congress is a privilege I don't take lightly, and I know that I have many years left in me to use my office to make life better for my constituents and for the American people.

To all who've reached out to me or to my office this week, it really means a lot. And now, let's double down together on the work that our country so desperately needs done. Thank you,

Jennifer
---
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fiVGoHflEE-FgL2jy2tvRQ2?unsubscribedata=xZiWz1ReeJeD73pezlIQYcBIRQ3azc6CGAW36tWIIGREQGvnYc%2Fescy17MSrzVGNQvcmw90Dz%2FBeUEerjcjHS%2FYMctqwoYe4OykY9l5CiPhok%2BV3tjdkJGz8Dt2TiOS1to%2FCwtAPIdr9VrxrqZPX5Wrzd3DgiGid9wdMLDVgEnalF8YYlDcUk5I8%2BplucYI5cwFM8E6Y8FQUTIyNeIFAIPOTYLD17FRwsuoelzKoLZX0FAPWO%2Buiv0zdjIAwPIT%2FzX1T0AoUaci2ZwCSgJaCWSYTMKb4EPExJ6T%2FV4%2Bchzcsm%2FYXFInfEkR%2BYY9m4TgZG2gufBoLX97P0hxBojAzqm2cLuWIh8a%2B%2F5jQ8WSXPtLsUFiTFVNpFtw0enYGFS2WfCcBYiPbpaf9CH8d5I%2FtNL0%2B0y0rqU55kGWmCUXYR%2FcCeFBiG3qFRzjN0zztTLqy).

clean_body: We can’t do this alone | Friend, Joe Biden and the Left want biological males to compete in girls’ sports, and I simply won’t have it. The core principle behind Title IX is fairness so that women have equal opportunities to pursue their athletic goals as men have. Joe Biden and his woke administration are doing the opposite by expanding Title IX to include “gender identities” and threatening to withhold funding if schools don’t comply. Simply put, Joe Biden wants biological males to compete in women’s sports, and I will not stand for this. As your Senator, I will bring common sense back to Washington, D.C. Our children shouldn’t suffer from the Left’s woke propaganda. We need to stand up for them. Thank you, | | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: Your Signature Is Needed: STOP Formosa Plastics from building a destructive Cancer Alley plant
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1722248?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Do NOT let Formosa Plastics construct its massive pollutant-ridden project in Cancer Alley! ** **_Cancer Alley_** is the name given to an area along the Mississippi River in Louisiana that Big Oil and Big Plastic has occupied with **OVER 200 petrochemical factories and refineries** \-- releasing colossal amounts of **toxic pollutants** that are harming the region’s people, wildlife, and ecosystems. And now, Formosa Plastics wants to build a GIANT _**2,400-acre industrial complex**_ so dangerous that it’s not even allowed to operate in Taiwan, _where Formosa’s own headquarters are located! _ **Look, Friend, there’s still a chance to STOP this monstrous corporate project from moving forward if we can get President Biden to REVOKE the factory’s permit.[But it’s going to take environmentalists like you to speak up NOW and help apply enough public pressure. Can we count on you to step up and take action today before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1722249?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1722250?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Big Plastic’s corporate greed has already taken a toll on our oceans, people, and our planet. Rampant plastic pollution is consuming the Earth, contaminating everything _**from the water we drink, the food we eat, and even the air we breathe. **_
On top of that, plastic production is **exacerbating the climate crisis, **burning through large amounts of**harmful fossil fuels** and releasing tons of **global warming emissions** into the atmosphere. These destructive facilities are predominantly located in rural, Black, and low-wealth communities who are forced to bear the brunt of this _dirty petrochemical pollution_ \-- which has been linked to **_cancer, respiratory damage, brain injury, and heart issues._**
But Formosa Plastics is willing to threaten public health and our planet all for the sake of profit -- so we MUST demand action immediately to prevent this disastrous project from causing even more harm to our communities and our precious Earth. [**Please, Friend, we’re almost out of time: Add your name NOW to urge President Biden to STOP this destructive Formosa Plastics project! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1722251?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1722250?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Putting Money in China's Pocket
body:
Blowing the Whistle! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday. Thank you for choosing us to be your daily place to become informed. You are not alone!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-j/) **Military Secrets Exposed** The Pentagon document leak has been **[traced to a man in his 20s who works on a military base](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-t/)**. The leaked information **[confirms that DOD has lied to the American people.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-i/)** **It Won't Stop Crime** A firearms instructor from Washington is **[calling out lawmakers for targeting competitive shooters and lawful gun owners](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-d/)** with their sweeping gun bans. **Putting Money in China's Pocket** Biden's aggressive plans to push Americans to purchase electric vehicles **[will increase our reliance on China](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-h/)** because they dominate the mineral and battery supply chains. **Benefits for DACA** Biden is expected to announce that he is **[expanding eligibility for Medicaid and health care to hundreds of thousands of immigrants](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-k/)** brought to the U.S. illegally as children. **Nice Try Joe** The children running Biden's Instagram account**[continue to post fake news and statistics](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-u/)** and think we won't call them out on it. Or maybe Joe is posting these himself! **Blowing the Whistle** A former Obama staffer **[can't get the FBI to respond to information he has](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-o/)** about Joe and Hunter's kickback scheme.

**What Are We Paying For?** The trove of recently leaked intelligence documents related to the Ukraine war should prompt Americans to ask tough questions about our involvement in that conflict,**[which one of the documents describes as a "grinding campaign of attrition" that has reached a "stalemate."](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-x/)** **Calling All Moms!** Are you a mom? If so, **[Moms for America, hosts some really great webinars centered around freedom](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-m/).** Registration is free. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* [**Never Again**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-q/)
* When you are [**stressed**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-a/)...
* Argument [**done**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-f/)
* Spin the [**wheel**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-z/)

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-v/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qujjrkd-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qujjrkd-trhiujldw-yu/)

body:
Uniting conservative voices and candidates in a 'Blue' state | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=1520b336a4)

|

# FREEDOM PROJECT USA
# IS BRINGING INNOVATION TO CONNECTICUT ELECTIONS WITH
# THE LAUNCH OF 2WINCT
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
April 13, 2023

CONTACT
Matt Wylie
[press](mailto:press@freedomprojectusa.com)[@freedomprojectusa.com](mailto:info@freedomprojectusa.com)

AUBURN, NH- Freedom Project USA announces the launch of 2WINCT - a new initiative that will bring innovation to Connecticut Elections. Dominic Rapini will serve as Chair of 2WINCT and Chris Coyle will serve as its COO.

“Connecticut is plagued by out-of-touch leaders who are willing destroy the economy, ignore the middle class, disregard parental rights, and leave people feeling less safe,” said Matt Wylie president of FPUSA. "This is no way to run a state. I am excited to have Dominic and Chris lead this initiative so we can educate the next generation of leaders and restore economic sanity.”

2WINCT’s focus is on the fundamental principles of our Founding Fathers and The Constitution. What makes us different is our new, modern approach and commitment to winning.

“Having run for office in Connecticut, 2WINCT is exactly what candidates need to truly be competitive,” said Dominic Rapini. “We are going to modernize the campaign playbook. 2WINCT will bring innovation across all campaign tactics and strategies so candidates will have the tools they need to win elections and change Connecticut.”

“Our focus is on identifying, recruiting, and educating candidates that are committed to defending individual rights and the constitutional freedoms, said Chris Coyle. “We are the ‘Constitution State’ and our voters deserve elected leaders who put citizens as their first priority.”

**Dominic Rapini** is a life long Connecticut native; a husband, a father, and a fighter committed to our fundamental freedoms and liberties.. Dominic is a former science teacher and lifelong veteran of the Consumer Electronics industry with strong experience in storefront and online retail. In 2022 Mr. Rapini was the 2022 Republican candidate for Secretary of the State. The time is now for innovation, new ideas, and systematic approach to engaging voters with the right messages, the right candidates, and of course, the best possible outcomes.

**Chris Coyle** is a Connecticut native and has been active in our state for decades as a high school teacher and coach, law school graduate, volunteer for police and fire departments, and other entrepreneurial activities. Chris's professional experience includes helping companies bring new technology innovations to market and win major contracts. In this role, Chris refined his expertise in developing and implementing creative strategies for winning, more effective writing and coaching presenters to break through. More recently, Chris has applied his experience and creativity to helping candidates who seek to return our state to its citizens based on our nation's founding values and constitutional principles.

_Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.__###_

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43594?t=9&akid=7117%2E878179%2E80YQwf)

name: James Carville
subject: Help send these MAGA extremists packing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61818353/401282029/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmMjdmNjYzLTEwZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AXBvkv21F2z16S1zldNypbbUpUqff_nduSSUmhuIlp0=)
**Friend, I know you agree with me: MAGA extremists like Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz and Ron DeSantis are NO GOOD for our democracy!**

Have you seen what's happening under their destructive agenda?

⏩ A federal judge in Texas just overturned the FDA's approval of mifepristone, making it even harder for people to get abortions.

⏩ The GOP is threatening to cut critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, impacting millions of Americans.

⏩ We're experiencing mass shootings day after day while Republicans REFUSE to take action on this gun violence crisis.

**Here's the thing: Some of these MAGA extremists – like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene and Ted Cruz – are up for reelection, so we need to defeat them at the ballot box and send them packing!**
**Defeating these loonies is going to take a LOT of resources, so we need all hands on deck. name: Cliff
subject: Did you miss Chuck Schumer’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Hey -- Not sure if you get these emails, so wanted to make sure you saw this.

Donald Trump just rallied his far-right base at the NRA conference, and our petition for commonsense gun safety reforms is about to close -- so we need to act quickly.

**[Please answer Chuck Schumer's call to fight back against Trump and the NRA before midnight by signing on to support commonsense gun safety reforms.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)**

Thanks,

Cliff, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Chuck Schumer
Date: Fri, April 14, 2023
Subject: Sign our urgent gun safety petition
---
| | | Team, I needed to reach out right away:

Donald Trump will soon take the stage at the NRA conference to rally his far-right base against President Biden and our Democratic Senate -- all while refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence that’s gripping our country.

**We simply can't let Trump be the loudest voice on this issue, so we need to take action _right now._[That’s why I’m asking you personally: Sign our petition to show your support for commonsense gun safety reforms >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)**

For years, NRA-backed Republicans like Donald Trump have opposed meaningful gun safety reform. We need to stand up to the cynicism of Trump and the NRA and _prove_ that we won’t stop until our communities are safe from the terror of gun violence.

**The time to speak out is NOW, and that’s why I’m calling on 250,000 Democrats to show their support for commonsense gun safety reforms. Voters need to know that Democrats are with them on this issue, so _don't let Donald Trump drown us out._**

**[Please add your name to show that you support _urgent action_ to stop senseless gun violence >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)
---

Thanks,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12738?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230414-Cliff-SchumerGunReformBump2-ETG-sl1&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=10485_9716520_5kwyvk&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10485%2E9716520%2E5kwyvk)** to unsubscribe.

name: Katie Young
subject: Bang for your buck
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=041423 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=041423]
Friend,
Did you know you can make a donation to the House DFL at no cost to you? It might sound too good to be true, but through Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program you can make a contribution of $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded to you – really! It’s the best bang for your buck and is a great opportunity for you to become a grassroots supporter of our House DFL majority. Will you make your PCR donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$50 PCR Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=041423]
$100 PCR Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=041423]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane_other=true&refcode=041423]
Your support is key to our efforts, friend. It’s because of DFLers like you that we are able to pass important legislation to make Minnesota a better place for all of us. Together we can protect and expand our House DFL majority and keep doing this important work. Thank you.
Katie Young
Digital Director
Minnesota House DFL

subject: Before logging off

body:
| Tammy just announced she’s running for reelection, and she’s counting on this grassroots team to help her start this campaign on the strongest possible footing.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=144%2E35263%2Eq5hn73)
You're probably close to logging off for the weekend, so we’ll keep this short, Peter: **Tammy announced this week that she’s running for reelection, and she’s counting on this grassroots team to help her start this campaign on the strongest possible footing.** This will be one of her toughest fights yet, and it’s going to take every single one of us doing our part to keep Tammy in the Senate fighting for working families. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Florida’s dangerous education precedents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Team,

**The abhorrent attacks on education are escalating _daily._**

Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is moving to expand the “Don’t Say Gay” law to high school grades, and a school district in his state has banned a book about Anne Frank. Missouri is defunding all public libraries. In New Jersey, the national groups pushing these policies are recruiting school board candidates and are on the verge of taking over more district boards.

Districts for Democracy is fighting to protect our kids and our schools from culture wars and censorship. Polls show that the overwhelming majority of Americans oppose book bans. When we don’t organize, Florida is a prime example of what happens when our majority fails to organize. We’re not going to make that mistake again!

[Can you pitch in $10 or any amount you can right now to defend freedom of expression and educational excellence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61818591/401282840/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230414_FR_Florida_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_Florida&refcode2=33bb1275-11db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JiMTI3NS0xMWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYdXp74Rk4uKPimYiJrlliSboPqwauQCWfYwp9fKHsM=) Your support will help us expose censorship campaigns for what they are, and to elect non-partisan school board candidates who will protect our students, teachers, and librarians from extreme right-wing attacks. **Our first race will be decided in two weeks** in Westfield, New Jersey.

There is a twisted logic to the far right’s censorship crusade. If you believe that QAnon is real and science is not, if you’re convinced that Donald Trump won the 2020 election and that pedophiles run America, then of course you’re going to be threatened by public schools and libraries that expose people to facts.

What’s sad and scary is that what once would have been a fringe movement in America — banning books and libraries — is now embraced by politicians who cynically exploit fear and anger to win elections. Some of them want to ride this issue all the way to the White House. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

**Let’s face it:** This is a top-down political strategy to win power for people who don’t actually care one way or another about what’s taught in our public schools. But public education and democracy in our country will be its casualties, as teachers and librarians are intimidated out of their professions, and as children get taught that critical thinking and asking questions is shameful. **We need to stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our kids to cherish and keep partisan culture wars out of their lives.**

[So, what do you say? Will you pitch in $10 today to ensure our country stands up for our children and their right to fair, uncensored education?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61818627/401282903/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230414_FR_Florida_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_Florida&refcode2=33bb1275-11db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JiMTI3NS0xMWRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYdXp74Rk4uKPimYiJrlliSboPqwauQCWfYwp9fKHsM=)

Thank you,

Tom Malinowski

| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

When we don’t organize, Florida is a prime example of what happens when our majority fails to organize. We’re not going to make that mistake again! = Your support will help us expose censorship campaigns for what they are, and to elect non-partisan school board candidates who will protect our students, teachers, and librarians from extreme right-wing attacks. Our first race will be decided in two weeks in Westfield, New Jersey. There is a twisted logic to the far right’s censorship crusade. If you believe that QAnon is real and science is not, if you’re convinced that Donald Trump won the 2020 election and that pedophiles run America, then of course you’re going to be threatened by public schools and libraries that expose people to facts. What’s sad and scary is that what once would have been a fringe movement in America — banning books and libraries — is now embraced by politicians who cynically exploit fear and anger to win elections. Some of them want to ride this issue all the way to the White House. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s face it: This is a top-down political strategy to win power for people who don’t actually care one way or another about what’s taught in our public schools. But public education and democracy in our country will be its casualties, as teachers and librarians are intimidated out of their professions, and as children get taught that critical thinking and asking questions is shameful. We need to stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our kids to cherish and keep partisan culture wars out of their lives. = Thank you, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

Peter, Since the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , our country has experienced a reproductive health crisis unlike we have ever seen before. Last Friday’s announcement of a stay on the federal order on Mifepristone is just the most recent conservative attempt to restrict the freedoms of women and pregnant people in America. For years, conservatives have clarified that they will take it to the states and the courts to ensure that abortion access, reproductive healthcare, and women’s rights are curbed, _including convincing the Supreme Court to enact a stay on a 20-year-old federal order guaranteeing access to critical prescription medication for pregnant people._ **If right-wing extremists in the states want to violate simple human rights on their land, then we are obliged to allow those rights to occur on federally protected land. We need to develop a system to allow groups like Planned Parenthood to operate on federal land to give pregnant people everywhere access to needed reproductive healthcare.** [_**If you support this bold and necessary step to secure the future of reproductive healthcare for millions of Americans, sign on now and tell Congress it’s time to allow abortions on federal lands.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819205/401285133/1457799141?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVkOTg1ZmItMTVkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LaXzAeeRLxYz46YiB2CYGvb-S587-Z8Xj8wqgBC1Wbs=&emci=22b1062e-ccda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=55d985fb-15db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819206/401285134/1457799141?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVkOTg1ZmItMTVkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LaXzAeeRLxYz46YiB2CYGvb-S587-Z8Xj8wqgBC1Wbs=&emci=22b1062e-ccda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=55d985fb-15db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) Thanks for taking action with us, **— Tean Signorello HQ** _P.S.[Watch Joe’s latest TikTok on Abortion Access →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819207/401285135/1416644905?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7205335445929559598&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVkOTg1ZmItMTVkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LaXzAeeRLxYz46YiB2CYGvb-S587-Z8Xj8wqgBC1Wbs=&emci=22b1062e-ccda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=55d985fb-15db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376)_ |

_I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. **I'm ready to get to work!**_ _Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.**I need your support to build our grassroots movement — [so please chip in what you can right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819208/401285136/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVkOTg1ZmItMTVkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LaXzAeeRLxYz46YiB2CYGvb-S587-Z8Xj8wqgBC1Wbs=)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819209/401285137/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVkOTg1ZmItMTVkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LaXzAeeRLxYz46YiB2CYGvb-S587-Z8Xj8wqgBC1Wbs=) Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. name: Team Sherrod
subject: live poll closing at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
re: minimum wage
| | |
---
Friend: From bringing union manufacturing jobs back to America to working to make sure corporations pay their fair share in taxes, Sherrod's been fighting for the Dignity of Work his entire life.

**To keep up this fight with as much momentum as possible, he needs to know that folks like you are with him. So please, add your voice to our LIVE poll before it closes at midnight tonight:**
| | **Do you support raising the minimum wage?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819687/401286985/-489313664?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk107-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWY4NmZjNi0xOGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWJrRYzK8uSQ8E80ZMJIBLXNMf0LFk1VW-pBOAGvbEM=&emci=43154b0c-02da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=31f86fc6-18db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61819688/401286986/-489313664?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk107-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWY4NmZjNi0xOGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWJrRYzK8uSQ8E80ZMJIBLXNMf0LFk1VW-pBOAGvbEM=&emci=43154b0c-02da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=31f86fc6-18db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Wed, Apr 12, 2023
Subject: Do you support raising the minimum wage?
---
| | |
---
I've said it before and I'll say it again, friend: If you love your country, you fight for the people who make it work.
Unfortunately, too many Washington politicians don't understand – or refuse to acknowledge – this simple idea. In the last 40 years, corporate profits and salaries of those at the very top have _skyrocketed,_ but the federal minimum wage is just $7.25.
**It’s long past time that we recognize the dignity of work in our country – and **raising the minimum wage is a critical step.
**That's why I'm fighting as hard as I can in the Senate to advocate for fair compensation, overtime pay, and a higher minimum wage – but to make these values a reality, I need to know that this team is with me. I'm counting on 27 more folks to respond to my live poll before midnight – including you, friend. So please, tell me right now:**

clean_body: re: minimum wage | | | Friend: From bringing union manufacturing jobs back to America to working to make sure corporations pay their fair share in taxes, Sherrod's been fighting for the Dignity of Work his entire life. To keep up this fight with as much momentum as possible, he needs to know that folks like you are with him. So please, add your voice to our LIVE poll before it closes at midnight tonight: | | Do you support raising the minimum wage? | | | | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Sherrod Brown Date: Wed, Apr 12, 2023 Subject: Do you support raising the minimum wage? | | | I've said it before and I'll say it again, friend: If you love your country, you fight for the people who make it work. Unfortunately, too many Washington politicians don't understand – or refuse to acknowledge – this simple idea. In the last 40 years, corporate profits and salaries of those at the very top have skyrocketed, but the federal minimum wage is just $7.25. It’s long past time that we recognize the dignity of work in our country – and raising the minimum wage is a critical step. That's why I'm fighting as hard as I can in the Senate to advocate for fair compensation, overtime pay, and a higher minimum wage – but to make these values a reality, I need to know that this team is with me. I'm counting on 27 more folks to respond to my live poll before midnight – including you, friend. So please, tell me right now: | | Do you support raising the minimum wage? | | | | Poll deadline: 11:59 p.m. on Missing response from: dpwillis67@gmail.com Thanks for speaking out. Change only comes when we all work together. In solidarity, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: It will be my PERSONAL MISSION to restore the scales of justice in America. | | | Friend, What George Soros has done to our justice system is an absolute disgrace. You’ve already seen what Soros’ District Attorneys have done to me... ...But they’re also destroying America’s cities, shredding the Constitution, and letting violent criminals roam free. What they’ve done to me is only a preview of what they could one day do to YOU. As your next president, it will be my PERSONAL MISSION to restore the scales of justice in America. I will appoint U.S. Attorneys who will be the polar opposite of Soros's Attorneys. They will be the 100 most ferocious legal warriors against crime and communist corruption in the country. | Thank you, | Donald J.
